The splinters are possessed of individuality, and such units will never be dissolved.
quotes.translation: 你们无法欣赏也无法理解——我也不能——身份认同在整体中被认知的本质。我们所知的身份认同代表了我们称之为自我的碎片与裂片。然而这些是主要身份认同的一部分。这些裂片拥有个体性，这样的单元永远不会被消解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: All necessary information is given to you through these inner channels, and unbelievable inner activities take place before you can so much as lift a finger, flicker an eyelid, or read this sentence upon the page. This portion of your identity is quite natively clairvoyant and telepathic, so that you are warned of disasters before they occur, whether or not you consciously accept the message, and all communication takes place long before a word is spoken.
quotes.translation: 所有必要信息都通过这些内在通道给予你们，在你们能抬起手指、眨动眼皮或阅读纸上这句话之前，就有难以置信的内在活动在进行。你们身份认同的这一部分天生具有天眼通和心灵感应能力，因此你们在灾难发生前就会收到警告——无论你们是否有意识地接受这个信息——所有沟通在言语说出之前很久就已发生。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In those early times, then, consciousness was more mobile. Identity was more democratic. In a strange fashion this does not mean that individuality was weaker. Instead it was strong enough to accept within its confines many divergent kinds of experience. A person, then, looking out into the world of trees, waters and rock, wildlife and vegetation, literally felt that he or she was looking at the larger, materialized, subjective areas of personal selfhood.
quotes.translation: 因此在早期时代，意识更具流动性。身份认同更民主。以一种奇特的方式，这并不意味着个体性更弱。相反，它足够强大，能在其范围内接纳许多不同种类的经验。因此，一个人望向树木、流水与岩石、野生动物与植被的世界时，会真切地感到自己正看着个人自我更宏大、物质化的主观领域。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am not saying that, nor implying it in the case just mentioned. In your system you have a direct hand in the formation of physical reality. Your natural given data is the result of individual, mass, and collective thoughts, feelings, and emotions, materialized. Your system in this respect is more creative than the systems just mentioned. On the other hand, within these other systems there is a strong innovative group consciousness developing, in which identity is retained but greater inner play allowed between individuals, a large creative interchange of symbol-pools, a drawing upon mental and psychic symbols with greater facility. Because of this, these individuals recognize more clearly the connection between creative images and given sense data. They purposely alter and change their given sense data, and experiment with it.
quotes.translation: 我并非在说，也并非暗示刚才提到的情况。在你们的系统中，你们直接参与物质实相的形成。你们天生的给定数据是个体、群体和集体的思想、感受与情感物质化的结果。你们的系统在这方面比刚才提到的系统更具创造力。另一方面，在这些其他系统中，正在发展一种强大的创新性群体意识，其中身份认同得以保留，但个体之间允许更大的内在游戏，进行符号库的大规模创造性交流，更自如地运用心智与心灵符号。正因如此，这些个体更清晰地认识到创造性意象与给定感官数据之间的联系。他们有意改变和转化自己的给定感官数据，并对其进行实验。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We must unfortunately often deal with analogies, because they can form bridgeworks between concepts. There are units of consciousness,3 then, as there are units of matter. I do not want you to think of these units as particles. There is a basic unit of consciousness that, expressed, will not be broken down, as once it was thought that an atom was the smallest unit and could not be broken down. The basic unit of consciousness obviously is not physical. It contains within itself innately infinite properties of expansion, development, and organization; yet within itself always maintains the kernel of its own individuality. Despite whatever organizations it becomes part of, or how it mixes with other such basic units, its own identity is not annihilated.
quotes.translation: 我们不幸必须经常运用类比，因为它们能在概念之间搭建桥梁。因此，有意识单位，正如有物质单位一样。我不希望你们将这些单位想象成粒子。有一种基本意识单位，一旦被表达出来，就不会被分解，就像曾经人们认为原子是最小单位且不可分解一样。这种基本意识单位显然是非物质的。它自身内在地包含着无限扩展、发展和组织的属性；然而，在自身内部，它始终保持着其个体性的核心。无论它成为何种组织的一部分，或如何与其他此类基本单位混合，其自身身份都不会被消灭。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: At certain levels the brain can handle simultaneous material, of course, even though you may be conscious of only a smattering of it. The body is aware of multitudinous simultaneous stimuli that consciously escape you, and is able to act on the information. This includes all kinds of sense data that are not consciously pertinent. (Intently:) Because of the particular kind of ego-orientation that the race decided upon, however, many probabilities of development inherent in the species have been latent. Inherently the physical brain is capable of dealing with more than one main line of consciousness. This does not mean the development of dual personality, by the way. It means the further expansion of the concept of identity: "You" would not only be aware of the you that you have always known, in the same way that you are now, but a deeper sense of identity would also arise.
quotes.translation: 当然，在某些层面上，大脑能够处理同时性的材料，即使你只意识到其中的一小部分。身体意识到大量同时性的刺激，这些刺激在意识层面上被你忽略，并且能够根据这些信息采取行动。这包括各种不具意识相关性的感官数据。（专注地：）然而，由于种族决定采用的特定自我导向，物种内在的许多发展可能性一直处于潜伏状态。本质上，物理大脑能够处理不止一条主要意识线。顺便说一句，这并不意味着发展出双重人格。它意味着身份概念的进一步扩展：“你”不仅会意识到你一直以来所认识的自己，就像你现在这样，而且还会产生一种更深的身份感。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 692
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Sometimes you act as though one ability contradicts another. You think "I cannot be a good parent and a sexual partner to my mate at the same time." To those who feel this way a definite contradiction seems implied. A woman might feel that the qualities of a mother almost stand in opposition to those of an exuberant sex mate. A man might imagine that fatherhood meant providing an excellent home and income. He might think that "aggressiveness,"6 competition, and emotional aloofness were required to perform that role. These would be considered in opposition to the qualities of love, understanding, and emotional support "required" of a husband. In actuality, of course, no such contradictions apply. In the same way, however, you often seem to feel that your identity is dependent upon a certain highly specific role, until other qualities quite your own seem threatening. They almost seem to be unselflike.7
quotes.translation: 有时你表现得好像一种能力与另一种能力相矛盾。你认为“我不能同时成为一个好父母和伴侣的性伴侣。”对于那些有这种感觉的人来说，似乎暗示着明确的矛盾。一个女人可能觉得母亲的特质几乎与一个充满活力的性伴侣的特质相对立。一个男人可能想象父亲身份意味着提供优越的家庭和收入。他可能认为“进取心”、竞争和情感疏离是扮演该角色所必需的。这些会被认为与丈夫“所需”的爱、理解和情感支持的特质相对立。当然，实际上并不存在这样的矛盾。然而，同样地，你常常似乎觉得你的身份依赖于某个高度特定的角色，直到其他完全属于你自己的特质显得具有威胁性。它们几乎显得不像你自己。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 735
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The ego considers itself the self and considers anything outside of its self as being either no self or another such separate identity, and so the individual man is led to believe that telepathy is basically a communication between two or more basically alone, separate and aloof selves. Telepathy does not operate at the level of the ego, although its actions may protrude into the domain of the ego. Telepathy operates within the inner self, within various levels, different levels of the subconscious, where the ideas of separation and limitations of self are not nearly so limiting.
quotes.translation: 自我将自己视为自己，并将自身之外的任何事物视为非自我或另一个如此分离的身份，因此个体的人被引导相信心电感应基本上是两个或多个本质上孤独、分离和疏离的自我之间的沟通。心电感应并不在自我层面运作，尽管其行动可能突入自我的领域。心电感应内在自我内部运作，在潜意识的不同层面运作，在这些层面，分离和自我限制的概念远没有那么具有限制性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As you know, so-called inert objects possess consciousness also, though in a more generalized and much less specific manner, in which to a large degree choice is denied to them. It should be apparent that psychic identity is no more dependent upon physical permanence, certainly when you consider that even a chair retains its form as a chair, even though it is actually not one thing or object, and that no atom or molecule remains the same within it.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，所谓的惰性物体也拥有意识，尽管是以一种更普遍且更不具体的方式，在这种方式中，选择在很大程度上被剥夺了它们。显然，心灵身份并不依赖于物理的持久性，当然，当你考虑到即使一把椅子也保持其作为椅子的形式，尽管它实际上不是一个单一的事物或物体，并且其中没有原子或分子保持不变时，这一点就显而易见了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In such a state the personality is free from the limitations of a closed system concept. Identity is not really lost though you may seem to forget yourself, but the props of identity are lost. It is in this same sort of state that the most significant and beneficial inner sense experiments take place.
quotes.translation: 在这种状态下，人格摆脱了封闭系统概念的限制。身份实际上并未丧失，尽管你可能似乎忘记了自己，但身份的支撑物却丧失了。正是在这种状态下，最重大且最有益的内在感官实验才会发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Gradually psychological structures are able to focus upon vaster areas, and in order to achieve proficiency in this manner you do indeed begin to build up layered selves that have been independent identities. These varying perceptive abilities organize so that their perceptive powers are pooled in a gestalt that eventually forms a new identity, a more complicated psychological structure that is capable of perceiving larger areas of reality.
quotes.translation: 逐渐地，心理结构能够聚焦于更广阔的领域，为了以这种方式达到精通，你确实开始构建起曾经是独立身份的层叠自我。这些不同的感知能力进行组织，使它们的感知力量汇聚成一个完形，最终形成一个新的身份，一个更复杂的心理结构，能够感知更广阔的现实领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I suggest your break, and if this hasn't broken you up then nothing will. You are indeed as you can see broken up a million times, and put together in many various manners; and yet you retain the inner ego, and in other words your own identity. But this identity must change. This again is no contradiction. Nothing can be static, and believe it or not, nothing is.
quotes.translation: 我建议你们休息一下，如果这还没把你们打散，那就没什么能做到了。你们确实如所见被分解了无数次，又以各种不同的方式重组；然而你们保留着内在自我，换句话说，保留着你们自己的身份。但这个身份必须改变。这同样没有矛盾。没有任何事物可以是静止的，信不信由你，没有什么是静止的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The whole self is obviously the sum of these characteristics, and more. After the final incarnation, the physical, sexual type of creativity is simply no longer needed. You do not need to reproduce physically, in other words. In simple terms the whole self contains male and female characteristics, finely tuned together, blended so that true identity can then arise -- for it cannot, when one group of characteristics must be emphasized over the other group, as it must be during your present physical existence.
quotes.translation: 整体自我显然是这些特征的总和，甚至更多。在最后一次转世之后，物质性的、性别的创造力就不再需要了。换句话说，你不再需要以物质形式繁衍。简单来说，整体自我包含男性和女性特征，它们被精细地调和在一起，融合得如此完美，以至于真正的身份才能由此产生——因为当一组特征必须被强调而压制另一组特征时，真正的身份就无法出现，就像你们当前物质存在中必须做的那样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Many who write want to develop and use the same abilities, yet it is obvious from their letters that their beliefs prevent them from trusting the inner self enough. You cannot fear your own being and expect to travel through it, to explore its dimensions. First you must take the simple step of affirming your identity. That affirmation will release those attributes that you have and open up new avenues of experience. They will and must be your own. When you ask others to interpret your dreams, for example, you are automatically putting the fulfillment of your own potentials a step away. When you ask another to tell you the direction of your life, then to some extent you keep from yourself the realization that you yourself possess it. Without that awareness no methods will help you.
quotes.translation: 许多写信的人想要发展并运用同样的能力，但从他们的信件中明显看出，他们的信念阻止了他们足够信任内在自我。你不能害怕自己的存在，却又期望穿越它、探索它的维度。首先你必须采取简单的步骤来肯定你的身份。这种肯定将释放你所拥有的那些特质，并开辟新的经验途径。它们将而且必须是属于你自己的。例如，当你请别人解读你的梦境时，你就在自动地将实现自身潜能的步骤推远了一步。当你请别人告诉你人生的方向时，在某种程度上，你就阻止了自己认识到你本身就拥有它。没有这种觉知，任何方法都帮不了你。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Intently:) I am saying that the individual self must become consciously aware of far more reality; that it must allow its recognition of identity to expand so that it includes previously unconscious knowledge. To do this you must understand, again, that man must move beyond the concepts of one god, one self, one body, one world, as these ideas are currently understood.5 You are now poised, in your terms, upon a threshold from which the race can go many ways. There are species of consciousness. Your species is in a time of change. There are potentials within the body's mechanisms, in your terms, not as yet used. Developed, they can immeasurably enrich the race, and bring it to levels of spiritual and psychic and physical fulfillment. If some changes are not made, the race as such will not endure.
quotes.translation: （专注地：）我说的是，个体自我必须有意识地觉知到远为更多的实相；它必须允许其对身份的认知扩展，以包含先前无意识的知识。要做到这一点，你必须再次理解，人类必须超越目前所理解的"一个神、一个自我、一个身体、一个世界"这些概念。用你们的话说，你们现在正站在一个门槛上，从这个门槛，人类可以走向许多方向。存在各种意识物种。你们的物种正处于变革时期。用你们的话说，身体机制中存在着尚未被利用的潜能。如果这些潜能得到发展，它们将无可估量地丰富人类，并将其带到灵性、心灵和物质满足的层面。如果不做出某些改变，这个物种本身将无法存续。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Any true psychic development of personality, however, is bound to lead to an understanding of the nature of the psyche that is far too large for any such confusion of basic identity with sexuality. The concept of reincarnation itself clearly shows the change of sexual orientation, and the existence of a self that is apart from its sexual orientation, even while it is also expressed through a given sexual stance. To a good extent, sexual beliefs are responsible for the blocking-out of reincarnational awareness. Such "memory" would necessarily acquaint you with experiences most difficult to correlate with your current sexual roles. Those other-sex existences are present to the psyche unconsciously. They are a portion of your personality. In so specifically identifying with your sex, therefore, you also inhibit memories that might limit or destroy that identification.
quotes.translation: 然而，任何真正的人格灵性发展，都必然导向对心灵本质的理解，这种理解远非任何将基本身份与性别相混淆的认知所能容纳。轮回转世的概念本身就清楚地显示了性别取向的变化，以及一个独立于其性别取向的自我的存在，即使它同时也通过特定的性别立场来表达。在很大程度上，性别信念是阻碍轮回转世觉知的原因。这种"记忆"必然会让你了解到与你当前性别角色最难关联的经历。那些异性的存在在无意识层面存在于心灵中。它们是你人格的一部分。因此，当你如此具体地认同你的性别时，你也抑制了那些可能限制或摧毁这种认同的记忆。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is simplified. Consciously you deal with those problems of one given physical life. Consciously you are not aware of what you call reincarnations, though these occur within your own system. Now these are not separate existences at all. They only appear so to you. Your earth identity (smile) in singular terms, is one existence. When you sleep at night and awaken, you do not suppose yourself a new personality, or imagine that you have died during the night. This is what you do when you imagine that you have several existences as different people. Your real existence, even within your system, is too much for you to deal with in conscious terms, therefore the seeming segments. You know you live these seemingly different lives simultaneously, as you gain development, but it is always you gaining development in a variety of roles. I stress therefore that unity. It is only because consciously you do not realize the unity that the various reincarnations seem so diverse and separate.
quotes.translation: 这是简化的说法。有意识地，你处理的是某一特定物质生命的问题。有意识地，你并不知道你所谓的转世，尽管这些发生在你自己的系统内。现在，这些根本就不是独立的存在。它们只是在你看来如此。你的地球身份（微笑）以单数形式来说，是一个存在。当你晚上睡觉早上醒来时，你不会认为自己是一个新的人格，或想象自己已经在夜间死去。而当你想象自己作为不同的人拥有好几个存在时，你正是这样做的。你真实的存在，即使在你自己的系统内，也太过庞大，无法以有意识的方式处理，因此才有了那些看似片段的部分。你知道自己同时过着这些看似不同的生活，随着你获得发展，但始终是你以各种角色获得发展。因此我强调那个统一性。仅仅是因为有意识地你没有意识到这个统一性，各种转世才显得如此多样和分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: New paragraph (and more rapidly): As egotistical consciousness expands to include hereto largely neglected data, then it will experience, practically speaking, a new kind of identity; knowing itself differently. Its concepts of godhood will significantly alter, as will the dimensions of emotion. Your heritage includes vastly richer veins of love, yet your concepts of self and godhood have severely limited these. You often seem to hate those with different beliefs than your own, for example, and you have perpetrated cruelties upon others in the name of religion and in the name of science, because your limited ideas about the nature of the self led you to fear your emotions. Often you are afraid that love will overwhelm you, for instance.
quotes.translation: 新段落（语速加快）：随着自我意识扩展，以包含迄今大多被忽略的数据，那么实际上，它将体验到一种新的身份；以不同的方式认识自己。它对神性的概念将显著改变，情感的范围也将如此。你的传承包含远为丰富的爱的矿脉，然而你对自我和神性的概念严重限制了这些。例如，你常常似乎憎恨那些信仰与你不同的人，并且你以宗教和科学的名义对他人施加残酷行为，因为你关于自我本质的有限观念导致你恐惧自己的情感。例如，你常常害怕爱会淹没你。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: First of all you must understand, again, that now you do not realize your true identity. You identify instead with your present ego, so when you think in terms of life after death you really mean a future life of the ego that you know. At the end of the reincarnational cycle you understand quite thoroughly that you, the basic identity, the inner core of your being, is more than the sum of your reincarnational personalities.
quotes.translation: 首先你必须再次明白，现在你并没有认识到你真正的身份。相反，你认同于你当前的自我，所以当你思考死后生命时，你真正指的是你所知的自我未来的生命。在转世循环结束时，你相当透彻地理解到，你，基本身份，你存在的内在核心，大于你转世人格的总和。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Putting this as simply as possible, your actual experience is far too vast for you to physically follow. Your particular kind of consciousness is the result of specialized focus within a particular area. You imagine it to be "absolute," in that it seems to involve an all-exclusive state that includes your identity as you think of it -- only you give it boundaries like a kingdom. It is, instead, a certain kind of organization that is indeed inviolate even while it is itself a portion of other kinds of consciousnesses, with their own points of focus. Your body itself is composed of self-aware organizations of consciousness that escape your notice and deal with perceptual material utterly alien to your own ways.
quotes.translation: 尽可能简单地说，你实际的体验太过浩瀚，无法以物质方式追随。你特定种类的意识是在特定区域内专门聚焦的结果。你想象它是"绝对的"，因为它似乎涉及一种全包状态，包含你所以为的身份——只是你给它划定了像王国一样的边界。相反，它是一种特定种类的组织，确实不可侵犯，即使它本身是其他种类意识的一部分，那些意识有它们自己的聚焦点。你的身体本身由自我觉察的意识组织构成，这些组织逃过你的注意，处理与你自身方式完全陌生的感知材料。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He projected a meaninglessness upon reality, and then fell prey to it. Here the senses themselves can help revive him. (Long pause.) He seems now to be choosing between identities, but there is one waiting for him, and it is a probable ego that he did not adopt as a child. He has been plunged back into a physical universe that he would not accept even as a valid mirage. This time he will be able to find himself within it. (Long pause.) In his case he must accept himself as a human being before he can hope to discover the inner self. The ego got no help from him, and it could not carry on alone. There was a definite splitting of personality elements, and a complete abandonment by the inner self of the ego.
quotes.translation: 他将无意义投射到实相上，然后成为其牺牲品。在这里，感官本身可以帮助他复苏。（长停顿。）他现在似乎在选择身份之间，但有一个身份在等待他，那是他童年时没有采纳的一个可能性自我。他被抛回一个物质宇宙，即使作为有效的幻象他也不接受。这次他将能够在其中找到自己。（长停顿。）在他的案例中，他必须先接受自己作为一个人，然后才能希望发现内在自我。自我没有得到他的帮助，无法独自继续。人格元素发生了明确的分裂，内在自我完全抛弃了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Love exists whether or not it is sexually expressed, though it is natural for love to seek expression. Love implies loyalty. It implies commitment. This applies to lesbian and homosexual relationships as well as to heterosexual ones. In your society, however, identity is so related to sexual stereotypes that few people know themselves well enough to understand the nature of love, and to make any such commitments.
quotes.translation: 爱存在，无论是否以性方式表达，尽管爱寻求表达是自然的。爱意味着忠诚。它意味着承诺。这适用于女同性恋和男同性恋关系，也适用于异性恋关系。然而，在你的社会中，身份与性别刻板印象如此相关，以至于很少有人足够了解自己，以理解爱的本质，并做出任何这样的承诺。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The identity, indeed, is as much and more the inner self as it is the ego. This has been mentioned in the past, but Ruburt became so fearful of his own spontaneity in early life that he was more or less forced, out of fear, to deny the validity of his identity with the inner self. On some occasions, as the other evening, he spontaneously accepts this identification, particularly when alcohol acts as a depressant.
quotes.translation: 身份认同确实与内在自我密不可分，甚至比自我（ego）更贴近内在本质。这一点过去曾提及，但鲁柏在早年生活中对自己的自发性如此恐惧，以至于他出于恐惧，几乎被迫否认自己与内在自我身份认同的有效性。在某些场合，比如前几晚，他会自发接受这种认同，尤其是当酒精作为抑制剂时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We will return to our material dealing with projection shortly. First however it is necessary that the nature of identity itself be studied more carefully. The nature of identity is strongly dependent upon the innate ability to draw upon, utilize and direct psychic energy.
quotes.translation: 我们很快就会回到关于投射的资料。但首先，有必要更仔细地研究身份认同本身的本质。身份认同的本质强烈依赖于汲取、运用和引导心灵能量的先天能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: At the same time, you make this information available to all these other portions of your identity, who dwell in entirely different realities, and you receive from them comparable information. You do not lose contact with your ordinary waking self. You simply do not focus upon it. You turn your attention away. In the daytime you simply reverse the process. If you were looking at your daily normal self from the other viewpoint, you see, using an analogy here, you might find that physically waking self as strange as you now find the sleeping self. The analogy will not hold however, simply because this sleeping self of yours is far more knowledgeable than the waking self of which you are so proud.
quotes.translation: 同时，你将这一信息提供给栖身于完全不同实相中的、你身份的其他所有部分，并从它们那里接收类似的信息。你并未失去与平常清醒自我的联系，只是不再聚焦于它，而是转移了注意力。白天你只是逆转这一过程。若从另一视角看待日常的清醒自我，打个比方，你或许会发现物质性的清醒自我与你此刻所见的睡眠自我同样陌生。不过这个类比并不完全成立，只因你这睡眠自我的知识远比你引以为傲的清醒自我渊博得多。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In the beginning, then, these units operated both as identities or particles, and as waves. The main concentration was not yet physical in your terms. What you now think of as the dream state was the waking one, for it was still the recognized form of purposeful activity, creativity, and power. The dream state continues to be a connective between the two realities, and as a species you literally learned to walk by first being sleepwalkers. You walked in your sleep. You dreamed your languages. You spoke in your dreams and later wrote down the alphabets--and your knowledge and your intellect have always been fired, sharpened, propelled by the great inner reality from which your minds emerged.
quotes.translation: 最初，这些单位既作为身份或粒子运作，也作为波运作。其主要的凝聚尚未以你们所说的物质形态呈现。你们现在所谓的梦境状态曾是清醒状态，因为它仍是公认的有目的活动、创造力与力量的形式。梦境状态始终是连接两种实相的桥梁，作为物种，你们实际上是通过先成为梦游者才学会行走的。你们在睡眠中行走，在梦中创造语言，在梦中说话，后来才写下字母表——而你们的知识与智慧，始终被那孕育出你们心智的伟大内在实相所点燃、磨砺与推动。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is obvious that physically there is no one self, since the molecules and atoms that construct the cells, that construct the organs, change constantly. And yet we say that identity is retained, and yet even what we mean by the core of identity also constantly changes.
quotes.translation: 显然，物质层面并不存在单一的自我，因为构成细胞、进而构成器官的分子与原子在不断变化。然而我们仍说身份认同得以保留，但就连我们所说的身份核心也在持续改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Historical knowledge and verifications of identity--identities--may be achieved through communication with those layers of the subconscious dealing with past lives. But no information may be gathered here that was unknown to the particular previous personality as a rule. Some particularly girted may use one of these levels as a focus point, looking outward even to the present personality, but this is unusual.
quotes.translation: 通过处理过去世的下意识层面进行沟通，可获得历史知识与身份认同的验证。但通常而言，无法在此收集到特定前世人格未知的信息。某些天赋异禀者可能以这些层面之一为焦点，甚至向外观察当前人格，但这并不常见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner references of reality involve a different kind of experience entirely, with organizational patterns that mix and merge at every conceivable point. You tune your consciousness while you sleep as one might tune a piano, so that in waking reality, it clearly perceives the proper notes and values that build up into physical experience. Those inner fields of reference in which you have your existence are completely changing themselves as your experience is added to them, and your own (long pause) identity was couched in those references before birth as you understand it.
quotes.translation: 实相的内在参考系涉及完全不同的经验类型，其组织模式在每一个可想象的点上混合交融。你在睡眠中调整意识，如同调校钢琴一般，使清醒实相能清晰感知构成物质经验的正确音符与价值。你赖以存在的那些内在参考场域，正随着你经验的加入而彻底改变自身，而你理解的（长停顿）身份在出生前便已蕴藏于这些参考系中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 4. In the Preface for Volume 1 of Dreams, see Session 881, with its Note 1. Then I suggest a review in chapters 1 and 2 of all of the material pertinent to evolution and creationism.

quotes.text: Human personality will reap benefits that now would seem unbelievable. An open-ended consciousness will imply far greater freedom. From birth, children will be taught that basic identity is not dependent upon the body, and that time as you know it is an illusion. The child will be aware of many of its past existences, and will be able to identify with the old man or woman that in your terms it will become.
quotes.translation: 人类人格将收获如今看似不可思议的益处。开放式的意识意味着远为广阔的自由。从出生起，儿童将被教导基本身份不依赖于身体，而你们所知的时间是幻相。孩子将知晓自身的许多过去存在，并能认同于按你们说法将会成为的老者。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The consciousness always comes first, representing individualized, extremely potent bits of energy that compose the basic or inner universe. They materialize upon your plane, forming their blocks of construction. The creation that causes the whole to be more than the sum of its parts is merely the inner identities, the bulk of this consciousness not able to fully materialize upon the physical plane. In other words, no consciousness fully materializes upon the physical plane.
quotes.translation: 意识始终居于首位，代表着构成基本或内在宇宙的个体化、极具威力的能量单位。它们在你们层面物质化，形成自己的建构模块。使整体大于部分之和的创造，不过是内在身份——这些意识的主体无法在物质层面完全物质化。换言之，没有意识能在物质层面完全物质化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Each reader, being presently ensconced within a physical form, I presume (humorously), knows only a small portion of himself -- as I mentioned earlier. The entity is the overall identity of which his personality is one manifestation -- an independent and eternally valid portion. In these communications, therefore, Ruburt's consciousness expands, and yet focuses in a different dimension, a dimension between his reality and mine, a field relatively free of distraction. Here I impress certain concepts upon him, with his permission and assent. They are not neutral, in that all knowledge or information bears the stamp of the personality who holds it or passes it on.
quotes.translation: 我猜想（幽默地）每位读者目前都安居于物质形体中，只了解自身的一小部分——正如我先前所述。存有是整体身份，人格是其一种显现——独立而永恒有效的部分。因此在这些沟通中，鲁柏的意识既扩展又聚焦于不同维度——介于他实相与我实相之间的场域，相对不受干扰。在此我征得他的许可与同意，将某些概念烙印于他。这些概念并非中立，因为所有知识或信息都带有持有或传递它的人格的印记。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Water rushes down the hillside into the valley, and there is a constant give-and-take between the village below, say, or the meadows, and the mountain. So there is the same kind of transformation, change, and cooperation between all identities. You can draw the lines where you will for convenience's sake, but each identity retains its individuality and inviolate nature even while it constantly changes.
quotes.translation: 水流从山坡奔泻入山谷，山下村庄或草地与山峦之间存在着持续的给予与索取。所有身份之间同样存在着这种转化、改变与合作。你们可以为了方便而划定界限，但每个身份在持续变化中仍保持其个体性与不可侵犯的本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Creativity rides the tides of love. When love is denied its natural expression, creativity suffers. Your beliefs lead you to suppose that a natural bisexuality would result in the death of the family, the destruction of morals, rampant sexual crimes, and the loss of sexual identity. I would say, however, that my last sentence adequately describes your present situation (with dry humor). The acceptance of the species' natural bisexuality would ultimately help solve not only those problems but many others, including the large instances of violence, and acts of murder. In your terms, however, and in your circumstances, there is not apt to be any easy transition.
quotes.translation: 创造力乘着爱的潮汐。当爱被剥夺自然表达时，创造力便受损。你们的信念使你们认为，自然的双性倾向会导致家庭瓦解、道德沦丧、性犯罪猖獗与性别身份迷失。然而我要说（带着冷幽默），我最后这句话恰好描述了你们当前的处境。接受物种自然的双性倾向，最终不仅有助于解决这些问题，还能解决许多其他问题，包括大量暴力事件与谋杀行为。不过按你们说法，在你们的环境中，不太可能轻易实现转变。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When you eat, you must eliminate through your bowels. That resulting matter eventually returns to the earth, where it helps form all other living things. The "dead" matter -- the residue of a bird, the sloughed-off cells -- these things are not then used by other birds (though they may be occasionally), but by men and women. There is no rule that says your discarded cellular material can be used only by your own species. Yet in your terms any identity, no matter how "minute," retains itself and its identity through many forms and alliances of organizations.
quotes.translation: 当你进食时，必须通过肠道排泄。这些排泄物最终回归大地，滋养所有其他生命形态。那些"死亡"的物质——鸟类的残骸、脱落的细胞——这些物质并非由其他鸟类（尽管偶尔可能）使用，而是被人类所利用。没有任何法则规定你丢弃的细胞物质只能被同物种使用。然而以你们的角度而言，任何身份认同——无论多么"微小"——都能通过众多形态与组织联盟保持自身及其特性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: To continue along the lines of the various fields of actuality in which the human body exists, these fields or systems, being open, are also fields with particular identity, within which certain inner and particular laws operate. Forces entering these fields, by the very act of entry, become transformed into the sort of data that can be accepted by the given field. The field is open then, but data passing into it is in a different form from the form it had before entry. There are electrical fields of actuality which are fields in which the dominating data is electrical, in the same manner that the dominating force or data within your plane is material.
quotes.translation: 沿着人体存在的各种实相场域继续探讨，这些开放的系统或场域本身也具有特定身份，其内部运作着某些独特的内在法则。进入这些场域的力量，通过进入这个行为本身，就会被转化为该场域可接受的数据形式。因此场域虽是开放的，但进入其中的数据已与进入前的形态截然不同。存在电性实相场域，其中主导数据是电性的，正如你们物质层面中主导力量或数据是物质性的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Communications exist between all portions of the self, and all parts of the personality; or parts of the whole self, rather, operate as what you may call a supraself. Ruburt has referred to this as a supraconsciousness. This is the identity, the whole identity, of the various portions of the self that operate within various systems. To this supraself, of course, your ego future can be easily viewed.
quotes.translation: 自我所有部分与人格所有部分之间都存在通讯；更确切地说，整体自我的各个部分运作着你们可称之为"超我"的形态。鲁柏曾将此称为"超意识"。这就是在不同系统中运作的自我各部分的身份认同——完整的身份认同。对于这个超我而言，你们自我未来的发展轨迹自然清晰可见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is theoretically possible, for example, for any of you to disperse your consciousness and become a part of any object in the room -- or to fly apart, to disperse yourself out into space -- without leaving your sense of identity. This is not practical in your terms, yet many of you do it to gain refreshment while you are sleeping. Consciousness by its very characteristics carries the burden of perception. This is the kind of consciousness you are used to thinking of. You cannot imagine it without perception in your terms; and yet consciousness can be vital and alive without your idea of perception. The last part of that sentence is important.
quotes.translation: 理论上，你们任何人都可能将意识分散，成为房间内任何物体的一部分——或飞散开来，将自身散布于太空之中——却丝毫不失身份认同感。这在你们看来不切实际，但许多人在睡眠时确实通过这种方式获得休憩。意识因其特性必然承载感知的负担。这是你们惯常理解的意识形态。你们无法想象没有感知的意识存在；然而意识完全可以在没有你们所理解的感知的情况下保持活力。这句话的后半部分至关重要。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Identity could be called a strong organizing characteristic that perceives impressions in definite ordered form. As identity is strengthened through experience then it automatically expands itself to add further realities which it is now able to manipulate.
quotes.translation: 身份认同可被称为一种强大的组织特性，它以明确的秩序形式感知印象。当身份认同通过经验得到强化时，它便会自动扩展自身，吸纳其现在能够掌控的更多实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In each dimension the inner self begins to handle further aspects of reality. The primary personality must therefore deal with a much larger number of perceptions, while still maintaining its identity. It manipulates in a larger number of dimensions, until it is able you see to handle many, not just one, of its own egos at any given "time"--and you may put time in quotes--while still maintaining its own inner stability and individuality. It takes on more roles, you see, and the psychological structure becomes more complicated as the inner self becomes sure enough of itself to admit ever more stimuli, while still retaining its own core.
quotes.translation: 在每个维度中，内在自我开始处理实相的更多面向。因此主要人格必须处理更大量的感知，同时保持其身份认同。它在更多维度中运作，直到能够同时处理多个（而非单个）自我——你们可以把"时间"加上引号——同时保持自身内在稳定与独特性。它承担更多角色，随着内在自我足够确信自身而接纳更多刺激，心理结构也变得更加复杂，同时始终保留其核心本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: It is true that Priestley speaks in terms of consciousness being retained at this stage, but a consciousness devoid of personality is an odd bird indeed. The personality structure changes, it is true, but consciousness of overall identities within any given unit of consciousness is always retained. There is no blending or merging, willy-nilly, into a gigantic ever-rushing-on spirit of life. And the spirit of life in these terms cannot be considered as something apart and separate from, and outside of, those consciousnesses which illuminate it, and through which they are illuminated. And here is our second difficulty with Priestley.
quotes.translation: 确实，普里斯特利谈论的是在这一阶段仍保留意识，但缺乏人格的意识确实是个古怪的存在。人格结构确实会改变，但任何特定意识单位内的整体身份意识始终被保留。不会随意融合或合并成一个不断奔涌的宏大生命之灵。就此而言，生命之灵不能被视为与照亮它的那些意识相分离、相割裂或存在于其外的东西，而这些意识也通过生命之灵被照亮。这就是我们与普里斯特利的第二个分歧点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The mass race consciousness, in its terms, possesses an identity. You are a portion of that identity while still being unique, individual and independent. You are confined only to the extent that you have chosen physical reality, and so placed yourself within its context of experience. While physical, you follow physical laws, or assumptions. These form the framework for corporeal expression.
quotes.translation: 大众种族意识就其本身而言拥有一个身份。你是该身份的一部分，同时仍然独特、个体且独立。你只受到你选择物质实相的程度限制，因此将自己置于其经验背景中。当处于物质状态时，你遵循物质法则或假设。这些构成了肉体表达的框架。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In the dream state the actors become aware to some extent of the parts they play, and sense the true personal identity that is behind the artist's craft. I have spoken of this before, but it is important to remember that you impose a certain kind of "artificial" sense of exaggerated continuity even to the self you know. Your experience changes constantly, and so does the intimate context of your life -- but you concentrate upon points of order, in your terms, that actually serve to scale down the context of your experience to make it more comprehensible. There are no such limits naturally set about your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态中，演员们在一定程度上意识到自己扮演的角色，并感知到艺术家技艺背后的真实个人身份。我之前谈到过这一点，但重要的是要记住，即使对你所认知的自我，你也施加了某种"人为"的夸张连续感。你的经验不断变化，你生活的亲密背景也在变化——但按照你的说法，你专注于秩序点，这实际上是为了缩小你的经验背景，使其更易于理解。你的意识并没有天然设定的此类限制。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The self that sits in class is not the self that wonders in a dream state, and the self that wonders in a dream state is, my dear friends, far more educated than the, self that sits in the classroom. The self you call yourself, what does it know? To whom must it listen? The self that you call yourself knows relatively little. It is perhaps 16 years old. Indeed, the inner identity knows, and the inner identity knows that it knows. All of you are on a threshold. Uncounted millions have been at that threshold.
quotes.translation: 坐在教室里的自我并非在梦境中漫游的自我，而亲爱的朋友们，在梦境中漫游的自我远比坐在教室里的自我更有教养。你称之为自己的那个自我，它知道什么？它必须听从谁？你称之为自己的那个自我所知相对甚少。它也许只有16岁。事实上，内在身份知道，而且内在身份知道它知道。你们所有人都站在一个门槛上。无数人曾站在那个门槛上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Therefore, consciousness-of-self can appear with or without the existence of an ego. Consciousness-of-self is an attribute then of all physical species, regardless of their classification. Personality, human personality, is simply the name given to this class of self, as applied and seen within human beings. Personality changes and acts upon all other action. Personality, then, can be seen to operate as a field of action in identity; but identity that is conscious of its relation to action as a whole.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我意识可以在有或没有自我存在的情况下出现。那么，自我意识是所有物质物种的一个属性，无论其分类如何。人格，人类人格，只是赋予这类自我的名称，如同在人类身上应用和看到的那样。人格改变并作用于所有其他行动。那么，人格可以被视为身份中的一个行动场域；但这是意识到自身与整体行动关系的身份。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Personal identity, the basic "I", is a product of the subconscious, and as such it exists as an actuality within the electric field; because of this it is basically independent of the physical field, held to it mainly by the ego. The ego directs the identity toward physical orientation. This is an important point.
quotes.translation: 个人身份，基本的"我"，是潜意识的产物，因此它作为电场中的实相存在；正因如此，它基本上独立于物质场，主要通过自我与物质场相连。自我将身份导向物质取向。这是一个重要观点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: New paragraph. Basically, however, consciousness is freewheeling. Such realities therefore always exist -- in your own psyche -- outside of your "home station," and some portion of your own consciousness is always involved in them. Period. There are bleed-throughs, so to speak, in the form of unofficial perceptions that often occur, or "impossible" events that are seemingly beyond explanation. (Pause.) For now think of your own psyche, which is a consciousized identity, as a kind of "supernatural radio." All of the stations exist at once within the psyche. These do not come through with sound alone, but with all the living paraphernalia of the world. The "you" that you recognize is but one signal on one such station, tuned in to a certain frequency, experiencing that station's overall reality from your own viewpoint -- one that is unique and like no other, and yet contributing to the whole life of the station.
quotes.translation: 新段落。然而，意识本质上是自由流动的。因此，这类实相始终存在于你自己的心灵中——在你"本家"之外——而你自身意识的某部分也始终参与其中。句号。可以说，存在着以非官方感知形式出现的渗透现象，这些现象时常发生，或是看似无法解释的"不可能"事件。（停顿）现在，请将你自己的心灵——这个被意识化的身份——视为一种"超自然收音机"。所有频道都同时存在于心灵之内。这些频道传递的不仅是声音，还携带着世界所有活生生的附属物。你所认知的"你"不过是其中一个频道上的单一信号，调谐至特定频率，从你独特的视角体验该频道的整体实相——这个视角独一无二、无可比拟，却也为该频道的整体生命做出贡献。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Some of the "particles" the theoretical physicists have discovered--and/or created--in their gigantic particle accelerators have unbelievably short life-spans in our terms, vanishing, it seems, almost before they're born. I like to think of such research from the particle's point of view, though, a consideration I haven't seen mentioned in the few scientific journals I read. Keep in mind that according to the Seth material the merest particle is basically conscious in its own way. Mesons are classes of particles produced from the collisions of protons. Did a meson, for example, choose to participate in an atom-smashing experiment in order to merely peek in on our gross physical reality for much less than the billionth of a second it exists with that identity, before it decays into electrons and photons? From its viewpoint, our reality might be as incomprehensible to it as its reality is to us--yet the two inevitably go together.
quotes.translation: 理论物理学家在巨型粒子加速器中发现的——或创造的——某些"粒子"，以我们的时间尺度衡量，其寿命短得不可思议，几乎在诞生前就已消失。然而，我更喜欢从粒子的视角来思考这类研究——这是我在所读的少数科学期刊中从未见过的考量。请记住，根据赛斯资料，最微小的粒子本质上以其自身方式具有意识。介子是质子碰撞产生的粒子类别。举例来说，一个介子是否选择参与原子粉碎实验，仅仅是为了在它作为该身份存在的十亿分之一秒内瞥见我们粗钝的物质实相，随后衰变为电子和光子？从它的视角看，我们的实相可能如同它的实相对我们一样难以理解——然而两者必然共存。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 1. In Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality, I wrote in Note 7 for Session 681 that atoms are "processes" rather than things. The classical conception of the typical atom as being composed of a neat nucleus of indivisible protons and neutrons circled by electrons is largely passé, although for convenience's sake we may still describe the atom that way. (In those terms, the one exception is the hydrogen atom, which evidently consists of but one proton and one electron cloud, or "smear.") For the simple purposes of this note, then, I'm leaving out considerations involving quantum mechanics, which concept repudiates the idea of "particles" to begin with. (And surely that notion involves more than a little of the psychic, or "irrational." What a heretical thought from the scientific viewpoint!) But each atom of whatever element is an amazingly complicated, finely balanced assemblage of forces and particles woven together in exquisite detail--one of the more basic examples of the unending and stupendous creativity, order, and design of nature, or consciousness, or All That Is.

quotes.text: The effect of any thought is a quite precise and definite one, that is set into motion specifically because of the nature of its own electromagnetic identity. The physical system operates best within certain electromagnetic patterns, and is adversely affected by others. These effects change the actual molecular structure of the physical cells of the organism, for better or for worse, and because of certain laws of attraction a habitual pattern will operate. A destructive type of thought, then, is dangerous not only for the present state of the organism, but dangerous in terms of the future.
quotes.translation: 任何思想的效果都极为精确而确定，其运作的启动完全源于自身电磁身份的特性。物质系统在特定电磁模式中运作最佳，而其他模式则会产生负面影响。这些影响会改变有机体物理细胞的分子结构——无论好坏——且因某些吸引法则，习惯性模式将持续运作。因此，破坏性思想不仅对有机体的当前状态构成危险，从长远来看同样危险。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Identity of the inner self operates very well within primary conditions. It is dependent upon primary conditions. Its manipulation of primary conditions gives it the knowledge of itself. Identity is retained within the dream state, is it not?
quotes.translation: 内在自我的身份在主要条件下运作得极为良好。它依赖于主要条件。对主要条件的操控使其获得对自身的认知。身份在梦境状态中得以保留，难道不是吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The genes and chromosomes do not just happen to have within them the precisely definite coded information that will be needed. The data is impressed upon them from within. The identity exists before the form. You could say that the identity, existing in another dimension entirely, plants the seed into the medium of physical reality from which its own material existence will spring.
quotes.translation: 基因与染色体并非偶然包含所需的确切编码信息。这些数据是从内在被铭刻其上的。身份存在于形态之前。你可以说，身份完全存在于另一维度，将种子植入物质实相的媒介中，其物质存在将由此萌发。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I make these analogies because they are pertinent, yet I am aware that they can make you feel small or fear for your identity. You are more than a message, say, passing through the vast reaches of a superself. You are not lost in the universe. In a book we must use words, but such analogies can, if you let them, conjure up within your imagination some feeling of your intimate relationship with all other reality. To some extent, the feeling of grace is your emotional recognition of the necessity, purpose and freedom, the innate appreciation, of your rightness and your place in existence.
quotes.translation: 我作这些类比是因为它们切中要害，然而我意识到它们可能让你感到渺小，或为你的身份担忧。你远不止是穿越超我浩瀚领域的信息。你并未迷失于宇宙之中。在书中我们必须使用文字，但如果你允许，这些类比能在你想象中唤起与所有其他实相亲密关系的感受。某种程度上，恩宠感是你对自身在存在中的正当性与位置之必要性、目的与自由、以及内在欣赏的情感认知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Only a portion of your entire identity is "presently" familiar to you, as you know. Therefore, when you consider the question of a supreme being, you imagine a male personality with those abilities that you yourselves possess, with great emphasis upon qualities you admire. This imagined god has therefore changed throughout your centuries, mirroring man's shifting ideas of himself.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，你整个身份中只有一部分是"目前"为你所熟悉的。因此，当你思考至高存有的问题时，你会想象一个具有你自身所拥有能力的男性人格，并着重强调你所钦佩的品质。因此，这个被想象的神在你的历史长河中不断变化，映照着人类对自身认知的变迁。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Action can be experienced directly, however, but only when no effort is made to tamper with it. It must be plunged into. Once more, action is not a function of structure. Action is inseparable from structure. Structure is action. Identities are action, as I have explained. Your idea of action as it occurs within dreams comes closer to the real nature of action than does your idea of muscular force. For in dreams the ego makes little attempt to impede action. Though in dreams you see or feel your arm move, your legs run, still the arm and the legs of the physical body may not move.
quotes.translation: 然而，行动可以直接被体验，但前提是不对其施加任何干预。你必须全身心投入其中。再次强调，行动并非结构的功能。行动与结构不可分割。结构即是行动。身份即是行动，正如我所解释的。你对梦境中发生的行动的概念，比你对肌肉力量的概念更接近行动的真实本质。因为在梦境中，自我几乎不会试图阻碍行动。尽管在梦中你看到或感觉到手臂移动、双腿奔跑，但肉体的手臂和双腿可能并未移动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You are midway here. In the future the ego and the intellect will expand sufficiently so that they can contain and use and appreciate all the other functions and portions of the self which they now mistrust. Individual identity will then expand to include a greater variety of impulses and stimuli, which do not necessarily come from the self, and yet maintain specialized identity.
quotes.translation: 你正处于中间阶段。在未来，自我和智性将充分扩展，足以容纳、运用并欣赏它们目前所不信任的自我其他所有功能与部分。个体身份届时将扩展，包含更广泛的冲动与刺激——这些未必源自自我本身，却仍能维持专门化的身份认同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Because you identify your experience with the regular line of consciousness with which you are familiar, you are rarely able to "bring in" any "other-self" material and hold it while retaining your own sense of identity. Such material may at times bleed or intrude into your own thought, where it blends and is not recognized. In such cases, it takes on the coloration of your own thought patterns. It adds to the overall atmosphere of your being. Without understanding or training, you would have to "lose" your own consciousness in order to perceive the "other-consciousness."
quotes.translation: 由于你将自身经验等同于你所熟悉的常规意识流，你很少能够"引入"任何"他我"材料，并在保持自身身份感的同时将其持有。这类材料有时会渗入或侵入你的思想，在其中融合而不被识别。在这种情况下，它会染上你自身思维模式的色彩，为你存在的整体氛围增添内容。若无理解或训练，你必须"失去"自身意识才能感知"他者意识"。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 692
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Man's consciousness, and to some extent that of the animals, is more specifically identified with form, however. In order to develop his own kind of individualized awareness, man had to consciously ignore for a while his own place within the structure of the earth. His experience of time would seem to be the experience of his identity. His consciousness would not seem to flow into his body before birth, and out of it after death. He would "forget" there was a time to die. He would forget that death meant new life. A natural message had to replace the old knowledge.
quotes.translation: 然而，人类的意识——在某种程度上也包括动物的意识——更明确地与形态相关联。为了发展自身特有的个体化觉知，人类不得不暂时有意识地忽略自己在地球结构中的位置。他对时间的体验似乎等同于对身份的体验。他的意识似乎不会在出生前流入身体，也不会在死后流出身体。他会"忘记"存在死亡之时，会忘记死亡意味着新生。一种自然的信息必须取代旧有的知识。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In the beginning CU's, then, units of consciousness, existing within a divine psychological gestalt, endowed with the unimaginable creativity of that sublime identity, began themselves to create, to explore, and to fulfill those innate values by which they were characterized. Operating both as waves and particles, directed in part by their own creative restlessness, and directed in part by the unquenchable creativity of All That Is, they embarked upon the project that brought time and space and your entire [universe] into being. They were the first entities, then.
quotes.translation: 最初，意识单位（CU）存在于神圣的心理完形中，被那崇高身份的难以想象的创造力所赋予，它们自身开始创造、探索并实现那些构成其特性的内在价值。它们既以波的形式也以粒子的形式运作，部分受自身创造性的不安所引导，部分受一切万有那不可遏制的创造力所引导，开启了将时间、空间及你们整个[宇宙]带入存在的工程。它们便是最初的实体。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The most rejuvenating idea of all, and the greatest step to any true illumination, is the realization that your exterior life springs from the invisible world of your reality through your conscious thoughts and beliefs, for then you realize the power of your individuality and identity. You are immediately presented with choices. You can no longer see yourself as a victim of circumstances. Yet the conscious mind arose precisely to open up choices, to free you from a one-road experience, to let you use your creativity to form diversified, varied comprehensions.
quotes.translation: 最具更新力量的想法，也是通往任何真正启蒙的最大一步，就是认识到你的外在生活，是通过你有意识的念头和信念，从你实相的无形世界中涌现出来的，因为那时你才认识到你个体性和身份的力量。你立刻面临选择。你再也无法将自己视为环境的受害者。然而，有意识心智的产生，恰恰是为了开启选择，将你从单一道路的体验中解放出来，让你运用创造力形成多样化的、变化多端的理解。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The same applies, however, to every other person. Each of them becomes a primary focus or identity within which all others are implied. In ordinary terms, you do not "make yourselves." You are like a living language spoken by someone who did not originate it -- the language was there for you to use. The language in this case is a molecular one that speaks your physical being. The components of that language or the earth elements that form the body were already created when you were born, as the alphabet of your particular language was waiting to be used.
quotes.translation: 然而，这同样适用于其他每个人。他们每个人都成为一个主要焦点或身份，其中隐含了所有其他人。用普通的话来说，你并非“创造自己”。你就像一种活生生的语言，被某个并非其原创者的人所说——语言就在那里供你使用。在这种情况下，这种语言是一种分子语言，诉说着你的物质存在。当你出生时，这种语言的组成部分，或者说构成身体的地球元素，就已经被创造出来了，就像你特定语言的字母表正等待被使用一样。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Because of its nature ego does not want to adjust. It wants adjustments to be made to it. Because ego is another manifestation of action, it is of course impossible for its aims to be realized. For all its attempts at stability and control, ego itself constantly changes. ego most of all resents and fights against time as you know it, yet ego is to a large extent responsible for your conception of time. Basically, ego fears both the past and the present. It fears the past because it has already lost control of the past. It fears the future because it is not yet in control of it. It seeks continuity of identity, yet it is forced to realize that the "I" of today is hardly the "I" of thirty years ago.
quotes.translation: 由于其本质，自我并不想调整。它希望别人向它调整。因为自我是行动的另一种表现，它的目标当然不可能实现。尽管自我试图追求稳定和控制，但它本身却在不断变化。自我最憎恨并抗拒你所知的时间，然而，在很大程度上，正是自我负责了你对时间的概念。基本上，自我既害怕过去，也害怕现在。它害怕过去，因为它已经失去了对过去的控制。它害怕未来，因为它尚未控制未来。它寻求身份的连续性，却被迫意识到，今天的“我”几乎不是三十年前的“我”。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Practically, your own identities exist electronically, as I have explained, in codified form. At some later occasion, we shall go into seeming duplications, for such duplications are only apparent, of a nature that could be compared to a reflective result. In such cases almost, though not entirely without exception, such a duplicate is projected by an original electronically. We are not quite ready yet for this material. I wanted however to mention the possibility of such occurrences, since such projections have and do happen with some frequency.
quotes.translation: 实际上，正如我所解释的，你们自己的身份以电子形式存在，并以编码形式呈现。在以后的某个场合，我们会探讨看似重复的现象，因为这种重复只是表面上的，其性质可以比作反射的结果。在这种情况下，几乎——尽管并非毫无例外——这种复制品是由一个原始电子投射出来的。我们还没有完全准备好讨论这个材料。不过，我想提一下这种事件发生的可能性，因为这种投射已经并且确实在相当频繁地发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have my own existence, that is quite different from Ruburt's, and yet I also have a reality that is connected to his psyche.6 Each of you also have the same kind of connection with other "more knowledgeable" portions of yourself, or your greater identity, that are independently themselves and yet also alive in your psyches. They are portions of the "unknown" reality.
quotes.translation: 我有自己的存在，这与鲁柏的存在截然不同，然而，我也有一个与他的心灵相连的实相。你们每个人也都有与自身“更具知识”的部分，或你们更大的身份，有着同样的联系，这些部分本身是独立的，却又同时活在你们的心灵中。它们是“未知”实相的一部分。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The ego is a very specialized portion of your greater identity. It is a portion of you that arises to deal directly with the life that the larger You is living. The ego can feel cut off, lonely and frightened, however, if the conscious mind lets the ego run away with it. The ego and the conscious mind are not the same thing. The ego is composed of various portions of the personality -- it is a combination of characteristics, ever-changing, that act in unitary fashion -- the portion of the personality that deals most directly with the world.
quotes.translation: 自我是你更大身份中一个非常专门化的部分。它是你的一部分，出现是为了直接处理那个更大的你所过的生活。然而，如果有意识心智让自我牵着鼻子走，自我可能会感到孤立、孤独和恐惧。自我和有意识心智不是一回事。自我由人格的各种不同部分构成——它是一个不断变化的特征组合，以统一的方式运作——是人格中最直接处理世界的部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: On some relatively few occasions, for example, Ruburt has been able to contact what he calls "Seth Two." That level of reality, however, is even further divorced from your own. It represents an even greater extension of the psyche, in your terms. (Long pause.) There is a much closer relationship, in that I recognize my own identity as a distinct portion of Seth Two's existence, where Ruburt feels little correspondence. In a manner of speaking, Seth Two's reality includes my own, yet I am aware of my contribution to "his" experience.
quotes.translation: 在某些相对罕见的场合，例如，鲁柏曾能够接触到他所称的"赛斯第二"。然而，那个实相层面甚至比你们的更为遥远。用你们的话来说，它代表了心灵更进一步的延伸。（长停顿。）其中存在着更密切的关系，因为我认识到自己的身份是赛斯第二存在的一个独特部分，而鲁柏几乎感受不到对应关系。可以这么说，赛斯第二的实相包含了我的实相，然而我意识到自己对"他"的经验所做的贡献。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It may be thought that such perception patterns or identities may be limited, but this is hardly the case. For without them, whole portions of reality would never be perceived. There is much here that will take us a long while to explain, for the line can theoretically be drawn anywhere in the formation of identities and consciousness. And herein lies your freedom.
quotes.translation: 人们可能认为这样的感知模式或身份是有限的，但事实绝非如此。因为没有它们，实相的完整部分将永远无法被感知。这里有许多内容需要我们花很长时间来解释，因为理论上，在身份和意识的形成过程中，界限可以划在任何地方。而你们的自由就在于此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In itself an object should be then felt as its unique identity, and as a part of the whole universe. A stone or a flower is a very small thing. When you attach your attention say to a flower, it is not only a matter of imagining yourself as the flower, or trying to sensewhat a flower is. It is also to imagine the power of the energy that causes that flower to grow; and yet in a landscape you will have perhaps many flowers. They must each suggest the reality of the overall pulsating vitality that makes their appearance possible.
quotes.translation: 物体本身应当被感受为其独特的身份，同时也是整个宇宙的一部分。一块石头或一朵花是非常微小的事物。当你把注意力集中在一朵花上时，这不仅仅是想象自己成为那朵花，或试图感受花是什么的问题。它也是想象使那朵花得以生长的能量之力量；然而在一片风景中，你可能会看到许多花朵。它们都必须暗示着使它们出现成为可能的整体脉动活力的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: That is, not only would they be aware of what seems to you to be past, present and future within your system, but they would be aware of several other systems and be able to function within them simultaneously, gaining and creating experience within all of these systems, even while maintaining overall identity. They would be conscious, for example, of themselves as, say, an entity, and simultaneously they would be aware of separate existences as individuals in various systems. This is as far as we can carry this at present.
quotes.translation: 也就是说，他们不仅会意识到你们系统内看似过去、现在和未来的一切，还会意识到其他几个系统，并能够同时在它们之中运作，在所有系统中获取和创造经验，同时保持整体身份。例如，他们会意识到自己作为一个存有，同时也会意识到自己在不同系统中作为个体的独立存在。目前我们只能说到这里。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Phis characteristic way of interpreting perceived data, and of reacting to it, is not as constant as it appears to be however. The stability and illusion of permanence is highly misleading. The four manifestations of personality all belonged to one identity, and this is perhaps the main point missed. For if the authors say that oftentimes a subordinate or potential ego will rake over control when necessary in order to insure the survival of the whole, then this implies a decision that has been made; and who has made it?
quotes.translation: 然而，个体解释感知数据并对其做出反应的特定方式并不像看起来那样恒定。稳定性和永久性的幻觉极具误导性。人格的四种表现都属于同一个身份，而这也许是被忽略的主要点。因为如果作者们说，一个从属或潜在的自我会在必要时接管控制，以确保整体的生存，那么这就意味着已经做出了一个决定；而谁做出了这个决定？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The experience of any given unit, constantly changing, affects all other units ... Give us time ... It is difficult to explain because your concepts of selfhood are so limited ... These units contain within themselves, in your terms, all "latent" identities, but not in a predetermined fashion. Selves may be quite independent within the framework of their own reality, while still being a part of a larger reality in which their independence works not only for their own benefit, but for the sake of a greater structure.
quotes.translation: 任何特定单元的经验，在不断变化中，会影响所有其他单元……给我们一点时间……这很难解释，因为你们对自我性的概念如此有限……用你们的话来说，这些单元在自身内部包含了所有"潜在的"身份，但并非以预定方式。自我可以在自身实相的框架内相当独立，同时仍然是一个更大实相的一部分，在这个更大实相中，它们的独立性不仅为了自身的利益而运作，也为了一个更大结构的好处。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 683
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The gestalt patterns of which I have spoken is the basis here, and yet all members within such gestalts are themselves independent, possessing identity and separation even while they cooperate in a complicated pattern. It is arbitrary; that is, from your viewpoint you arbitrarily choose certain portions of reality and call them units, marking them off. But your divisions do not affect the nature of these gestalts, as my discussion speaks of separate universes without affecting the nature of any universe one whit.
quotes.translation: 我曾提及的完形模式是此处的根基，然而这类完形中的所有成员本身都是独立的，即便它们在复杂模式中协作，也同时拥有身份与分离性。这是武断的——从你们的视角来看，你们任意选取现实的某些部分，称之为单元并加以划分。但你们的划分并不影响这些完形的本质，正如我的论述谈及独立宇宙时，丝毫未影响任何宇宙的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These CU's can operate as separate entities, as identities, or they can flow together in a vast, harmonious wave of activity, as a force. Period. Actually, units of consciousness operate in both ways all of the time. No identity, once "formed," is ever annihilated, for its existence is indelibly a part of "the entire wave of consciousness to which it belongs."
quotes.translation: 这些意识单元可以作为独立实体、作为身份运作，也可以如一股力量般汇入浩瀚和谐的活动浪潮中。句号。实际上，意识单元始终以两种方式同时运作。任何身份一旦"形成"，便永不被湮灭，因为其存在不可磨灭地属于"它所归属的整个意识浪潮"的一部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This may not be a very apt analogy, but the principles are sound behind the analogy. This is complicated to explain, and yet an explanation is sorely needed, for telepathy operates mainly when similarities and attractions are set up, when like attracts like; and not, as it would seem, when as it appears one alien or separate identity is connected with another.
quotes.translation: 这或许不是个很恰当的比喻，但比喻背后的原理是可靠的。解释起来很复杂，然而这种解释极为必要，因为心电感应主要发生在相似性与吸引力建立之时，发生在同类相吸之际；而非如表面所见，当一个异质或分离的身份与另一个连接之时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are too many varieties of such dreams to discuss here, but they all involve consciousness dispersing, yet retaining its identity, consciousness making loops with itself. Such dreams involve other sequences than the ones with which you are familiar. They hint at the true dimensions of consciousness that are usually unavailable to you, for you actually form your own historical world in the same manner, in that above all other experiences that one world is predominant, and played on the screen of your brain.
quotes.translation: 此类梦的变体繁多，无法在此详述，但它们都涉及意识分散却仍保持身份，意识与自身形成回环。这类梦涉及你们所熟悉的序列之外的其他序列。它们暗示了通常无法触及的意识真实维度，因为你们实际上以同样的方式构建自己的历史世界——正因如此，在所有其他体验中，那个世界占据主导地位，并在你们的大脑屏幕上放映。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: In the past we have spoken briefly concerning a tricky subject, the relationship of intensity and the nature of distance. The electromagnetic identity of any given individual contains the past identity systems, again in coded form. In other words, the previous personalities of past lives.
quotes.translation: 过去我们曾简要讨论过一个棘手主题：强度与距离本质的关系。任何特定个体的电磁身份都包含过去的身份系统，同样以编码形式存在。换言之，即前世的过往人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: If you will remember the three creative dilemmas discussed in our past session, you will see that we have here the reason for our self-perpetuating universe, the reason for termination within it, and the inherent necessity for change. If one thought were held forever, no other thoughts would follow, no action would follow, and no identity. In your own intimate psychological experience, in the intimate psychological experience of every individual within your race, you will find recognition of the thought.
quotes.translation: 若你记得我们上次课程中讨论的三种创造性困境，便会明白此处我们找到了宇宙自我延续的原因、其中终止存在的理由，以及改变的内在必然性。若一个念头被永远固守，就不会有后续念头，不会有行动，也不会有身份。在你们自身亲密的心理体验中，在你们种族每个个体亲密的心理体验里，你们都会认出这个念头。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Here the basic experience is hastily dressed up as much as possible in physical clothes. This is not because you want to understand the experience, but because you refuse to accept it as basically nonphysical. All dreams are not of this nature. Some dreams themselves do take place in psychic or mental areas connected with your daily activities, in which case no dressing-up process is necessary. But in the very deep reaches of sleep experience -- those, incidentally, not yet touched upon by scientists in so-called dream laboratories -- you are in communication with other portions of your own identity, and with the other realities in which they exist.
quotes.translation: 此处，基本经验被仓促地尽可能披上物质外衣。这并非因为你想要理解该经验，而是因为你拒绝接受它本质上的非物质性。并非所有梦境都属此类。有些梦境本身确实发生在与你日常活动相关的心理或心灵领域，此时无需任何包装过程。但在睡眠经验的极深层次——顺便说一句，科学家们在所谓的梦境实验室中尚未触及这些层次——你正与自己身份的其他部分以及它们所存在的其他实相进行沟通。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Again, in this distortion we see the creation, however minute, of a new reality. The universe is cohesive, but it is also more various than you know even now. The nature of our object, our automobile for example, is indeed largely determined by those who perceive it, for it is different things in reality, and not one thing. Electrically it has an identity, and would be perceived as an entirely different phenomena from within an electrical system, where there would be no perceptors of physical data.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，在这种扭曲中，我们看到了新实相的创造，无论多么微小。宇宙是凝聚的，但它也比你现在所知的更为多样。我们物体的本质，例如我们的汽车，确实在很大程度上由感知它的人所决定，因为它在实相中是不同的事物，而非单一事物。从电性角度看，它有一个身份，并且从电性系统内部会被感知为完全不同的现象，因为那里没有物质数据的感知者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I mention this again in the middle of our present discussion so that you do not feel lost, or negated, or insignificant. There are obviously an infinite number of gradations in the types and kinds of forms of which we have been speaking. That energy which is projected from our "superself," that spark of intense identity that resulted in your physical birth, that unique impetus, in the one way has many similarities to the old concept of the soul -- except that it contains only a part of the story.
quotes.translation: 在我们当前讨论的中途，我再次提及这一点，以免你感到迷失、被否定或微不足道。显然，我们一直在谈论的形式类型和种类存在着无限多的层次。从我们的"超我"投射出的那股能量，那导致你物质出生的强烈身份火花，那独特的推动力，在某种程度上与灵魂的古老概念有许多相似之处——只是它只包含了故事的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now it takes study, development, and experience before an identity can learn to hold its own stability in the face of such constant stimuli; and many of us have gotten lost, even forgetting who we were until we once more awakened to ourselves. Much of this is quite automatic to us now. In the infinite varieties of consciousness, we are still aware of a small percentage of the entire banks of personalities that exist. For our "vacations" we visit amid quite simple life forms, and blend with them.
quotes.translation: 现在，一个身份需要学习、发展和经验，才能在如此持续的刺激面前保持自身的稳定性；我们中的许多人曾迷失方向，甚至忘记了自己是谁，直到我们再次觉醒于自身。如今，这对我们来说已相当自动。在意识的无限多样性中，我们仍然只意识到存在的全部人格库中的一小部分。为了我们的"假期"，我们探访相当简单的生命形态，并与它们融合。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Action, having of itself, and because of its nature, formed identity, now also because of its nature would seem to destroy identity, since action must involve change. And any change would seem to threaten identity.
quotes.translation: 行动，因其自身及其本质而形成了身份，现在又因其本质似乎要摧毁身份，因为行动必然涉及变化。而任何变化似乎都会威胁到身份。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is however a mistaken notion that identity is dependent upon stability. Identity, because of its characteristics, will continually seek stability, while stability is impossible. And this is our second dilemma.
quotes.translation: 然而，认为身份依赖于稳定性的观念是错误的。身份因其特性会不断寻求稳定性，而稳定性却是不可能的。这就是我们的第二个困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am however directing this particular discussion toward Ruburt. As far as his overall personality structure is concerned, creativity is a must. Without it he does not feel secure. His identity is strongly connected with his creativity. The financial success of his book is extremely important to you both, incidentally, on a conscious egotistical level.
quotes.translation: 然而，我正将这场特定讨论导向鲁柏。就他整体人格结构而言，创造力是必不可少的。没有它，他便感到不安。他的身份与创造力紧密相连。顺便一提，他著作的经济成功对你们两人都极为重要——在意识自我层面而言。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Moreover, there is nothing to stop it from exploring this other greater identity, or moving into it, so to speak. When this happens both identities are changed. In greater terms, the psyche or soul nowhere exists as a finished product or entity. On the other hand it is always becoming, and that becoming happens on the part of each of its own portions.
quotes.translation: 此外，没有任何事物能阻止它探索这个更伟大的身份，或说进入其中。当这发生时，两个身份都会改变。从更宏大的角度来看，心灵或灵魂并非以成品或实体的形式存在。相反，它始终处于"生成"状态，而这种生成发生在它每个组成部分之中。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They are not one-dimensional images therefore, nor for that matter are they static. They are vital, full of their own energy reality, living composites. In dreams as a rule you only perceive them as images. They possess a psychic identity however that is biological to some extent as far as you are concerned. In other words, at this time various biological changes must occur in order for you to tune in upon them directly.
quotes.translation: 因此它们并非一维影像，也绝非静止不变。它们是充满活力、饱含自身能量实相的生命复合体。在梦境中，你通常只能将它们感知为影像。然而它们拥有某种心灵身份——就你而言，这种身份在某种程度上具有生物性。换言之，此刻必须发生各种生物性变化，你才能直接调频到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json
