quotes.text: It is always because you do not trust the natural self that you resort to such drug therapy. The individuals who seek out treatment fear the nature of their own identity more than anything else. They are then only too willing to sacrifice it. (Pause, then smiling:) Your thoughts and beliefs form your reality. There is, as Joseph (Seth's name for me) said in our break, no magic therapy -- only an understanding of your own great creativity, and the knowledge that you yourself make your world.
quotes.translation: 你之所以诉诸药物疗法，永远是因为不信任自然自我。寻求治疗的人最恐惧的正是自身身份的本质。他们太乐意牺牲它了。（停顿，微笑：）你的思想和信念形成你的实相。正如约瑟夫（赛斯对我的称呼）在休息时所说，不存在神奇的疗法——唯有理解自身伟大的创造力，以及明白是你自己创造了你的世界。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The trouble is that you frequently consider the soul or entity as a finished, static "thing" that belongs to you but is not you. The soul or entity -- in other words, your most intimate powerful inner identity -- is and must be forever changing. It is not, therefore, something like a cherished heirloom. It is alive, responsive, curious. It forms the flesh and the world that you know, and it is in a state of becoming.
quotes.translation: 问题在于，你常将灵魂或存有视为属于你但并非你的、完成且静止的"东西"。灵魂或存有——换言之，你最亲密强大的内在身份——始终且必须永远在改变。因此它并非传家宝般的事物。它是鲜活的、有回应的、充满好奇的。它形成你所知的肉体与世界，且处于"生成"状态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: During his life within the physical system attractions with it are of course maintained. At physical death this connection is severed. Polarities are changed in reverse fashion. The individual identity, composed of its electrically and magnetically coded experiences, is therefore intact. I say intact, for to all purposes this is so. When the polarities are changed however in reverse fashion, the present ego follows its attraction to the subconscious, and the two are more or less united.
quotes.translation: 在物质系统内的生命期间，与它的吸引力当然得以维持。物理死亡时，这种连接被切断。极性以反向方式改变。由电性及磁性编码经验构成的个体身份因此保持完整。我说完整，是因为从所有意图和目的来看确实如此。然而当极性以反向方式改变时，当前自我会追随其对潜意识的吸引力，两者或多或少地合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Outward extensions of the self can be more clearly objectified, the concentration at the outward extensions being less, and identity correlations being kept in more concentrated areas within the boundaries of the physical self. The eye sees but it cannot see itself. In like manner the self is, but is not consciously able to examine that which it is. Therefore man must take his abilities and travel inward, since going outward will not allow him to perceive the inner portions of himself.
quotes.translation: 自我的向外延伸可以被更清晰地客体化，向外延伸处的集中度较低，而身份关联则保持在肉体自我边界内更集中的区域。眼睛能看见，却看不见自身。同样地，自我存在，却无法有意识地检视它所是的本质。因此，人必须运用自己的能力向内探索，因为向外走无法让他感知到自身的内在部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Its identity is within action. To say that its identity and its continuity or sense of continuity is within action, is not too far off, although the word continuity in this instance would be misleading.
quotes.translation: 它的身份存在于行动之中。说它的身份及其连续性或连续感存在于行动之中，虽不算太离谱，但在此例中“连续性”一词可能会造成误导。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In the same way, each of my readers has a connection with the same level of psychic reality. In greater terms, all of this is happening at once. Ruburt is contributing and forming a certain portion of my experience, even as I am contributing to his. Your identities are not something already completed. Your most minute action, thought, and dream adds to the reality of your psyche, no matter how grand or austere the psyche may appear to you when you think of it as a hypothetical term.
quotes.translation: 同样地，我的每位读者都与同一层级的心理实相有所关联。从更大的角度来看，这一切都同时发生。鲁柏正在贡献并形成我经验的某一部分，正如我也在贡献于他的经验。你们的身份并非已经完成的东西。你们最细微的行动、思想和梦境，都增添了你们心灵的实相，无论当你们将心灵视为一个假设性术语时，它显得多么宏伟或庄严。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A note now concerning thought, as it is a form of action with which all men are familiar. Here you can see that your ego accepts thoughts as a part of its identity. Thought's actions are accepted by the ego, yet the ego seems to stand apart from them; and because of ego's nature it fears to plunge into the action of a thought. For it, the ego, has but recently pried itself from action, and so perceives action now as if action were a province of the ego, and not the other way around.
quotes.translation: 现在关于思想的一点说明，思想是一种所有人都熟悉的行动形式。在此你们可以看到，自我将思想接纳为自身身份的一部分。思想的行为被自我所接受，然而自我似乎与它们保持距离；而且由于自我的本性，它害怕投入一个思想的行动中。因为自我，这个自我，才刚刚从行动中挣脱出来，所以现在它把行动视为自我的一个领域，而非相反。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You have a greater identity outside of your context, yet a part of it is inside your context, as you. Your youness is your significance, a focus of awareness, conscious of itself, that seeks out and views experience with its own unique propensities. The existence of probable realities and probable selves in no way denies the validity of your own experience or individuality. That rides secure, choosing from unpredictable fields of actuality those that suit its own particular nature.
quotes.translation: 你们在自身脉络之外拥有一个更大的身份，但其一部分存在于你们脉络之内，即作为你们自己。你们的“你性”就是你们的重要性，一个觉知的焦点，有自我意识，以其独特的倾向寻求并审视经验。可能实相与可能自我的存在，绝不否定你们自身经验或个体性的有效性。那个体性安然自若，从不可预测的实相领域中，选择那些适合其自身特定本性的部分。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In one respect, and in quite a legitimate and objective manner, all thoughts are also projections. They leave you in an objective actual manner, and exert an objective effect. They are a part of your psychic identity projected outward, yet you do not feel any loss. Nor are you aware of what happens to these thoughts. You could not retain simultaneously all and exert all the thoughts of your lifetime thus far in any normally conscious way. To do so would be psychological suicide.
quotes.translation: 从某个方面来说，且以一种相当合理而客观的方式，所有思想也都是投射。它们以一种客观实际的方式离开你们，并产生客观的效果。它们是你们心灵身份向外投射的一部分，然而你们并不感到任何损失。你们也不知道这些思想后来如何。你们无法以任何正常有意识的方式，同时保留并发挥你们一生中迄今为止所有的思想。这样做将是心理上的自杀。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is connected with me in that manner. He is also connected with any ant in the backyard in the same way. Yet I retain my identity, the ant retains its identity, and Ruburt retains his.12 But one could not exist without the other two -- for in greater terms the reality of any one of the three presupposes the existence of the others.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏以那种方式与我相连。他与后院任何一只蚂蚁也以同样方式相连。然而我保持我的身份，蚂蚁保持它的身份，鲁柏也保持他的身份。但三者中任何一方都无法脱离另外两者而存在——因为在更宏大的层面，三者中任一方的实相都预设了其他方的存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now. If you could see the body as it exists within the electric field, you would certainly not recognize it, for its shape would bear no resemblance to the physical shape as you know it. The electric counterpart to the physical body exists, then, as an identity formed by various electrical systems operating more or less as one. It is an electric reality in which most certainly even thoughts exist as actualities, ever-moving spheres of more or less independent electric systems.
quotes.translation: 现在。如果你能看见身体在电场中的存在形态，你绝对认不出它——因为它的形状与你所知的物质形态毫无相似之处。物质身体的电性对应体确实存在，它是由各种或多或少协同运作的电力系统所构成的身份。这是一个电性实相，其中连思想都确实以实相形式存在，成为不断移动的、或多或少独立的电力系统球体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The final place of refuge was near Damascus. For some time the Lord of Righteousness tried to hide himself within the city. His identity was discovered, however, and he and a band of men took to caves that were between Damascus and another nearby town, much smaller, that had been used at one time as a fortress. They were heading there.
quotes.translation: 最后的避难所靠近大马士革。有一段时期，正义之主试图藏匿于城中。然而他的身份被发现了，于是他带领一队人马躲进大马士革与附近另一个更小城镇之间的洞穴——那里曾一度被用作要塞。他们正朝那里行进。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each probable self you see also has future selves. This multidimensional identity is a psychological structure with which we shall be dealing in our discussions. The term includes the whole self as it consists of the self that you know, probable selves, reincarnated selves, and selves more highly developed than the self that you know.
quotes.translation: 你所见的每个可能自我也拥有未来自我。这个多维身份是我们讨论中将要探讨的心理结构。该术语包含整体自我，它由你所知的自我、可能自我、转世自我，以及比你已知自我更高度发展的自我所组成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Action, you may say, is carried away by itself. Reality possibilities are endless. You are familiar with very small portions of reality. Your perception characteristics at this time dictate and limit the aspects of action that you can perceive. You can, however, focus very clearly on other aspects. And particular types of consciousness and identities are merely the result of action's formation into perception patterns with which it can focus upon certain aspects of itself.
quotes.translation: 行动，你可以说，被自身所承载。实相的可能性是无限的。你只熟悉实相中极小的一部分。你此刻的感知特性决定并限制了你所能感知的行动面向。然而，你也能非常清晰地聚焦于其他面向。特定类型的意识与身份，不过是行动形成感知模式的结果——这些模式使行动得以聚焦于自身的某些面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: From this layer many of the deepest inspirations come. These ideas and concepts, having their own electromagnetic identity, nevertheless appear as "the symbolic landscape" at this level of consciousness. This is difficult to explain. The thoughts do not appear as pseudoimages for example, or assume any pseudomaterialization, yet they are felt vividly, perceived and picked up by portions of the brain -- those seemingly unused portions for which science has found no answer.
quotes.translation: 许多最深刻的灵感都来自这个层面。这些拥有自身电磁身份的想法与概念，在意识这个层次却显现为"象征性风景"。这很难解释。这些思想不会以伪影像形式出现，也不会产生任何伪物质化，但它们被生动地感受、被大脑某些部分感知并接收——那些科学至今无法解释的看似未被使用的大脑区域。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such people realize their deficiency, yet conversely because they do have a distorted but seemingly dominant "I" they are only all the more furious and confused. There is no basic unifying factor to give them consistency, and no unifying subconscious memories to give them true inner identity. This is one of the main reasons why they strike out at strongly integrated personalities, and why it is so easy for them to be catapulted by raw emotion into tragedies of this sort.
quotes.translation: 这类人意识到自身的缺陷，但正因他们拥有一个扭曲却看似主导的"我"，反而更加愤怒与困惑。缺乏基本统合因子赋予他们一致性，也没有统合的潜意识记忆赋予他们真实的内在身份。这正是他们攻击高度整合人格的主要原因，也是他们极易被原始情绪抛入此类悲剧的缘由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This identity is your physical self through which now, in your terms, all expression must come. You are more than your temporal being alone. Your life as a creature is dependent upon your alliance with flesh. You will exist when your body is dead, but practically speaking, you will always be working through an image of yourself.
quotes.translation: 这个身份是你的物质自我，在你们的时间范畴内，所有表达都必须通过它来呈现。你不仅是你短暂的存在。你作为生物的生命依赖于你与肉身的联盟。当你的身体死亡时你仍将存在，但实际而言，你永远会通过自己的形象运作。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is in connection with the lectures you are being given having to do with time and identity. Though numbers are abstract they can serve our purposes well here. One number, for example 7, can be considered itself as an identity. Now, it may become a portion of other numbers in infinite varieties, and yet it is always itself.
quotes.translation: 这与你们正在接受关于时间与身份的讲座有关。虽然数字是抽象的，但在此处能很好地服务于我们的目的。例如数字7本身可被视为一个身份。它可能以无限变化的形式成为其他数字的一部分，却始终保持着自身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Practically speaking you see, if you were aware of the constant barrage of telepathic communications that do impinge upon you, it would be most difficult to retain identity. Identity would suffer if it were forced to perceive more impressions than it could effectively handle. Shared dreams are therefore well beneath awareness.
quotes.translation: 实际上，如果你们意识到持续冲击自身的通感信息洪流，要维持身份将极为困难。若被迫感知超出有效处理范围的印象，身份就会受损。因此共享梦境完全处于意识层面之下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I am also amused because Ruburt feels more comfortable with me now. Identity has many selves, many self structures, and my identity is always the same. If what I say sounds confusing--
quotes.translation: 我也感到有趣，因为鲁柏现在与我相处更自在了。身份拥有多重自我、多重自我结构，而我的身份始终如一。若我所说听起来令人困惑——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The soul can be considered as an electromagnetic energy field, of which you are part. It is a field of concentrated action when you consider it in this light -- a powerhouse of probabilities or probable actions, seeking to be expressed; a grouping of nonphysical consciousnesses that nevertheless knows itself as an identity. Look at it this way: The young woman through whom I speak once stated in a poem, and I quote: "These atoms speak, and call themselves my name."
quotes.translation: 灵魂可被视为一个电磁能量场，你是其中一部分。从这个角度审视，它是浓缩行动场域——一个寻求表达的概率或可能行动的发电站；一群非物质的意识体，却知晓自身为身份。这样理解：借我之口说话的年轻女子曾在诗中写道，我引用："这些原子在言说，它们呼唤我的名字。"
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Individual selves will retain identity. They will be able to participate at a high level of awareness with the whole of which they are part. The whole is far more infinite than you can conceive. In a basic sense, the whole is aware of all of its parts, and in a basic senseall of its parts are aware of the whole. But each self must go its own way and develop its own abilities and explore the possibilities which it creates itself, otherwise the whole would stagnate.
quotes.translation: 个体自我将保留其身份。它们将能以高度觉知参与其所从属的整体。这个整体远比你能想象的更为无限。从根本意义上说，整体觉知其所有部分，而所有部分也从根本上觉知整体。但每个自我必须走自己的路，发展自身能力，探索自己创造的可能性，否则整体就会停滞。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is indeed no hard and fast rule to tell you which actions are basically impeding actions, and which are not. For what may appear an impeding action may indeed turn out to be the burst of a new and constructive direction, which may eventually represent a new and stronger pattern of identity and integrity, that will completely refresh the original unit and add to its vitality and strength.
quotes.translation: 确实没有硬性规定能告诉你哪些行为本质上是阻碍性的，哪些不是。因为看似阻碍的行为，可能恰恰是崭新建设性方向的爆发，最终可能代表一种更强大、更完整的身份与完整性模式，彻底刷新原始单元，为其增添活力与力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: This is not simple to explain, yet I would do poorly by you if I left you with a simple explanation. Emotional feelings are vital. Emotional identities are indestructible. Personalities that you have known in past lives will know you after transition. This does not mean that for their own purposes they have not joined in psychic mergers that you cannot presently understand. As I am joined in a psychic merger with you now, and am still myself, and you yourself.
quotes.translation: 这并不容易解释，但如果我只给你一个简单的解释，那便是对你不负责任。情感感受至关重要。情感身份不可摧毁。你在前世认识的人格，在过渡之后仍会认识你。这并不意味着他们为了自身目的没有参与你目前无法理解的心灵融合。正如我现在与你进行心灵融合，却仍是我自己，你也仍是你自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Psychic identity does not need to set up barriers in order to recognize selfhoods. One personality can therefore be a portion of more than one entity, and still retain its own identity, its own individuality. Various groupings of experience exist. It is your concept of time that highly limits your idea of individuality.
quotes.translation: 心灵身份无需设立屏障来识别自我。一个人格因此可以成为多个实体的部分，同时保留其自身身份与个体性。存在各种经验组合。正是你的时间概念极大地限制了你对个体性的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (To me): Now you early foresaw your part in these sessions, and our work. One of the paintings you did many years ago clearly foreshadowed the development of your psychic endeavors. This was the one you sold, of the man that hung for some time in the position in which my portrait now hangs. That was a portrait of Joseph; in other words of your own inner identity as you intuitively perceived it at the time. You were not consciously aware of the connection, but you were consciously aware of the painting's strong impact.
quotes.translation: （对我而言）：你早已预见到自己在这系列课程中的角色，以及我们的工作。你多年前画的一幅画，清晰地预示了你心灵努力的发展。就是你卖掉的那幅画，画中人物曾悬挂在我肖像现在的位置上。那是约瑟夫的肖像——换句话说，是你当时凭直觉感知到的内在身份。你并未有意识地察觉这种关联，但你确实有意识地感受到那幅画的强烈冲击力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There will be a joyous gathering together of his identity when the body dies. These are like the weaving together of mosaics, the weavings of the personality in and out, and no effect is meaningless nor without benefit. In this life you were meant to create, and teach. All creation is teaching. Your entity is older than your father's. You and Ruburt and I have been connected many times. The gestalt, the conditions, have in the past been beneficial for us all.
quotes.translation: 当身体死亡时，他的身份将迎来一次欢快的聚合。这就像马赛克的编织，人格在其中穿进穿出，没有一种效果是无意义的，也没有一种效果是无益的。此生你本应创造与教导。一切创造皆是教导。你的实体比你父亲的实体更古老。你、鲁柏和我已多次相连。这种完形与条件，在过去对我们所有人都有益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: True identity is as much divorced from ego reality as the photograph is from the person. There are connections between an individual and his photograph, and there are connections between the physical individual and the inner self, but the person must recognize the image in the photograph, for it will not recognize him.
quotes.translation: 真正的身份与自我实相的距离，正如照片与本人的距离。个体与其照片之间存在关联，物质个体与内在自我之间也存在关联，但人必须认出照片中的影像，因为影像不会认出他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You are constantly changing the form, the shape, the contour, and the meaning of your physical body and most intimate environment, although you do your best to ignore these constant alterations. On the other hand, we allow them full rein, knowing that we are motivated by an inner stability that can well afford spontaneity and creation, and realizing that spiritual and psychological identity are dependent upon creative change.
quotes.translation: 你不断改变身体形态、形状、轮廓和意义，以及最亲密的环境，尽管你竭力忽视这些持续的变化。另一方面，我们却任由它们自由发挥，深知我们被一种内在的稳定性所驱动，这种稳定性完全能够承受自发性和创造，并明白精神与心理的身份依赖于创造性的变化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When I come here to speak I focus my energy, but not toward this room as a destination, for in your terms this room does not exist to me. In your terms, this room does not even exist to you. You pretend to agree that it does; we meet in no place of space or time. The true meetings that take place here have nothing to do with the room or the people that you think you are. You know that you hallucinate the room, that you are as much in trance here as you ever are when you are in psychological time. I simply want you to realize that if this life is a trance, then you can turn the direction of your consciousness to perceive greater realities that presently exist. You can be aware of your own greater identity, even as I am. You sit within the miracle of yourselves and ask for signs. It is your inner eyes I would open.
quotes.translation: 当我前来讲话时，我集中能量，但不是朝着这个房间作为目的地，因为就你们而言，这个房间对我来说并不存在。就你们而言，这个房间甚至对你们也不存在。你们假装同意它存在；我们在任何时空地点之外相遇。这里发生的真正相遇与房间或你们自以为是的那些人无关。你们知道你们在幻觉中感知这个房间，你们在这里的恍惚状态与你们在心理时间中时一样。我只是想让你们意识到，如果这一生是一场恍惚，那么你们可以转变意识的方向，去感知当下存在的更大实相。你们可以意识到自己更大的身份，就像我一样。你们坐在自身的奇迹之中，却寻求征兆。我要开启的是你们的内在之眼。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Using age as an example now, it may seem to you that you are a given age, that within your subjective experience it must be paramount, that regardless of your age you are to some extent closed off from the experience of being any other age. In some simultaneous existences you are very young, however, and in others very old. Some of your physical cells are brand new, so to speak -- the regeneration of fresh life is physically within you; in your terms this is true not only until your death but even after it, when your hair and nails can still grow. Identify then with the constantly new energy alive within you in this now of your being (very intently) and realize that on all levels you are biologically and psychologically connected with that greater identity that is your own.
quotes.translation: 现在以年龄为例，你们可能觉得自己是某个特定年龄，在主观体验中这必定是首要的，无论年龄多大，你们在某种程度上被隔绝于其他年龄的体验。然而，在某种同时存在中，你们非常年轻，而在其他存在中则非常老迈。你们的一些身体细胞是全新的——可以说，新鲜生命的再生在物理上存在于你们之内；就你们而言，这不仅在死亡之前成立，甚至在死亡之后也成立，那时你们的头发和指甲仍能生长。那么，与你们存在当下内在不断更新的能量认同（非常专注地），并意识到在一切层面上，你们在生物学和心理上都与那个更大的身份相连，那正是你们自己的身份。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) I told you once that there were pulses of activity in which you blinked off and on -- this applying even to atomic and subatomic particles.1 "You" assign as real -- present here and now -- only that activity that is your signal. "You" are not aware of the others. When people think in terms of one self, they of course identify with one body. You know that the cellular structure of it changes constantly. The body is at any given moment, however, a mass conglomeration of energy formed from that rich bank of probable activity. The body is not stable in the terms usually thought of. On deeper biological levels the cells straddle probabilities, and trigger responses. Consciousness rides upon and within the pulses mentioned earlier, and forms its own organizations of identity. Each probability -- probable only in relation to and from the standpoint of another probability -- is inviolate, however, in that it is not destroyed. Once formed, the pattern will follow its own nature.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）我曾告诉过你们，存在活动的脉冲，你们在其中闪烁开合——这甚至适用于原子和亚原子粒子。1 “你们”只将作为你们信号的活动视为真实——当下在此。 “你们”对其他活动毫无察觉。当人们以单一自我的方式思考时，他们当然会认同一个身体。你们知道身体的细胞结构不断变化。然而，在任何给定时刻，身体都是由来自那个丰富可能活动库的能量形成的大量集合体。身体并非通常所认为的那样稳定。在更深的生物学层面上，细胞跨越可能性，并触发反应。意识骑乘并存在于前面提到的脉冲之内，形成其自身的身份组织。每种可能性——仅相对于另一种可能性并从其立场而言是可能的——都是不可侵犯的，因为它不会被摧毁。一旦形成，模式将遵循其自身的本性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The CU's form all systems simultaneously. Having formed yours, and from their energy diversifying themselves into physical forms, they were aware of all of the probable variations from any given biological strain. There was never any straight line of development as, say, from reptiles to mammal, ape, and man. Instead there were great, still-continuing, infinitely rich parallel explosions of life forms and patterns in as many directions as possible. There were animal-men and man-animals, using your terms, that shared both time and space for many centuries.6 This is, as you all well know, a physical system in time. Here cells die and are replaced. Knowing their own indestructibility, the CU's within them simply change form, retaining however the identity of all the cells that they have been. (Intently:) While the cell dies physically, its inviolate nature is not betrayed. It is simply no longer physical.
quotes.translation: CU同时形成所有系统。在形成你们的系统后，并从其能量中多样化自身为物理形式，它们意识到任何给定生物谱系的所有可能变体。从来没有任何直线发展，例如从爬行动物到哺乳动物、猿猴和人类。相反，存在着巨大、仍在继续、无限丰富的生命形式和模式的平行爆发，朝向尽可能多的方向。有动物人和人动物，用你们的术语来说，它们共享时间和空间长达数个世纪。6 正如你们所熟知的，这是一个时间中的物理系统。在这里，细胞死亡并被替换。知道自身不可毁灭性，CU在它们之内只是改变形式，然而保留它们曾经是的所有细胞的身份。（专注地：）虽然细胞在物理上死亡，但其不可侵犯的本性并未被背叛。它只是不再具有物理形态。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Puberty comes at a certain time, triggered by deep mechanisms that are related to the state of the natural world, the condition of the species, and those cultural beliefs that in a certain sense you transpose upon the natural world. In other respects, your cultural environment is of course natural. The time that puberty comes varies, then, and afterwards it is possible to parent a child. A time then comes when the period is over. During what is called the sexually active time; the larger dimensions of personhood become strictly narrowed into sexually stereotyped roles -- and all aspects of identity that do not fit are ignored or denied. The fact is that few people fit those roles. They are largely the result of the interpretations of religion as conventionally understood. And the scientists, for all their seeming independence, often simply found new intellectually acceptable reasons for unconsciously held emotional beliefs.
quotes.translation: 青春期在特定时刻到来，由与自然世界状态、物种状况以及某种程度投射于自然界的文化信念相关的深层机制所触发。在其他方面，你的文化环境当然也是自然的。因此青春期到来的时间各不相同，之后便可能生育后代。当这个时期结束时，便迎来了另一个阶段。在所谓的性活跃期，人格的更大维度被严格窄化为性别刻板角色——所有不符合这些角色的身份面向都被忽视或否认。事实上很少有人真正符合这些角色。它们很大程度上是传统理解的宗教诠释的结果。而科学家们尽管看似独立，却常常只是为潜意识中持有的情感信念找到了新的、在理智上可被接受的理由。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:41.) These strands are like double dreams that continue. They also serve as a framework to the recognized self. In periods of stress or challenge the recognized self may sense these other strains of consciousness, and realize that a fuller experience is possible, a greater psychological thickness. On some occasions in the dream state the recognized self may then enlarge its perception enough to take advantage of these other portions of its own identity. Double or triple dreams may represent such encounters at times. Consciousness always seeks the richest, most creative form, while ever maintaining its own integrity. The imagination, playing, the arts and dreaming, allow it to enrich its activities by providing feedback other than that received in the physical environment itself.
quotes.translation: （11:41。）这些线索如同延续的双重梦境。它们也为被认可的自我的框架。在压力或挑战时期，被认可的自我可能感知到这些其他意识流，并意识到更丰富的体验是可能的，一种更大的心理厚度。在某些情况下，在梦境状态中，被认可的自我可能扩展其感知，足以利用自身身份的这些其他部分。双重或三重梦境有时可能代表这样的相遇。意识总是在保持自身完整性的同时，寻求最丰富、最具创造性的形式。想象力、游戏、艺术和做梦，通过提供物理环境本身所接收之外的反馈，使其能够丰富自身的活动。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: These are creative distortions on your part, directly related to specializations of consciousness that cut you off from the greater concourse existing at other levels between the species and the land. Again, consciousness everywhere pervades the universe, and is aware of all conditions. The balance of nature upon your planet is no chance occurrence, but the result of constant, instant computations on the part of each most minute consciousness, whether it forms part of a rock, a person, an animal, a plant. Each invisibly "holds space together," whatever its station. This is a cooperative venture. Your own consciousness has its particular unique qualities, in that like other comparatively long-lived species, you associate your identity with your form far more rigidly. Other kinds of consciousness "leap in and out of forms" with greatest leeway. There is a biological understanding that exists, for example, when one animal kills another one for food. The consciousness of the prey leaves its body under the impetus of a kind of stimulus unknown to you.
quotes.translation: 这些是你们创造性的扭曲，直接与意识的专门化有关，这种专门化切断了你们与物种和土地在其他层面存在的更大交流。再次强调，意识无处不在，遍布宇宙，并知晓所有状况。你们星球上的自然平衡并非偶然，而是每个最微小的意识——无论它是岩石、人、动物还是植物的一部分——持续、即时计算的结果。每个意识都无形地"维系着空间"，无论其地位如何。这是一项合作事业。你们自己的意识具有独特的特质，因为与其他相对长寿的物种一样，你们将身份与形态的联系更为严格。其他种类的意识则能更自由地"跃入和跃出形态"。例如，当一只动物为食物杀死另一只动物时，存在着一种你们所不知的生物学理解。猎物的意识在一种你们未知的刺激推动下离开身体。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In titling this chapter I used the word "mechanics," because mechanisms suggest smooth technological workings. While the world is not a machine -- its inner workings are such that no technology could ever copy them -- this involves a natural mechanics in which the inner dimensions of consciousness everywhere emerge to form a materialized, cohesive, physical existence. Again, your interpretations of identity teach you to focus awareness in such a way that you cannot follow the strands of consciousness that connect you with all portions of nature. In a way, the world is like a multidimensional, exotic plant growing in space and time, each thought, dream, imaginative encounter, hope or fear, growing naturally into its own bloom -- a plant of incredible variety, never for a moment the same, in which each smallest root, leaf, stem, or flower has a part to play and is connected with the whole.
quotes.translation: 在为本章节命名时，我使用了"机制"一词，因为机制暗示着流畅的技术运作。虽然世界不是机器——其内在运作方式任何技术都无法复制——但这涉及一种自然机制，其中意识的内在维度处处涌现，形成物质化的、凝聚的物理存在。再次强调，你们对身份的解释教导你们以这样一种方式聚焦意识，以至于你们无法追踪将你们与自然所有部分连接起来的意识线索。在某种程度上，世界就像一株在时空生长的多维异域植物，每个思想、梦境、想象相遇、希望或恐惧，都自然地绽放成自己的花朵——一株不可思议的多样性的植物，无时无刻不在变化，其中每个最微小的根、叶、茎或花都有其作用，并与整体相连。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Five weeks ago [in the notes leading off Session 821], I wrote that Jane could resume work on The Further Education of Oversoul Seven -- or Seven Two -- at any time. She finished her first novel about Seven in July 1972, and within a month, long before it was published, she wrote the first five chapters for Seven Two. Then we became involved in so many other projects that she laid it aside until August 1976, when she wrote two more chapters. The book has hovered in the back of her consciousness ever since, waiting until she focused her attention upon it once again. "Seven's got all the time in the world," she laughed more than once. But now that her editor, Tam Mossman, has scheduled a visit to us at the hill house in a couple of weeks [on April 10, to be exact], Jane feels that she wants to study what she's done on Seven Two, go over it with Tam, and perhaps take up work on it again.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: This tale, I admit, is far more difficult to understand than a simple story of God's creation of the world, or its actual production in a meaningless universe through the slippery hands of chance--and yet my story is more magnificent because elements of its truth will find resonance in the minds and hearts of those open enough to listen. For men's minds themselves are alive with the desire to read properly, and they are aware of their own vast heritage. It is not simply that man has a soul that is somehow blessed while the rest of him is not, but that in those terms everything [he knows], regardless of size or degree, is made of "soul stuff." Each portion has its own identity and validity--and no portion is ever annihilated or destroyed. The form may change.
quotes.translation: 我承认，这个故事比简单的上帝创造世界的故事，或通过偶然的滑手在无意义宇宙中实际产生的故事要难理解得多——然而我的故事更为壮丽，因为其真理的元素会在足够开放去聆听的人的心灵和思想中找到共鸣。因为人类的心灵本身充满了正确解读的渴望，并且他们意识到自己庞大的遗产。这不仅仅是人类拥有某种受祝福的灵魂而其余部分则不然，而是用那些术语来说，[他所知的]一切，无论大小或程度，都是由"灵魂材料"构成的。每个部分都有其自身的身份和有效性——没有任何部分会被消灭或摧毁。形态可能会改变。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your genetic structure reacts to each thought that you have, to the state of your emotions, to your psychological climate. In your terms, it contains the physical history of the species in context with the probable future capabilities of the species. You choose your genetic structure so that it suits the challenges and capabilities of the species. You choose your genetic structure so that it suits the challenges and potentials that you have chosen. (Long pause.) It represents your physical reference point, your bodily framework. It is your personal physical property. It is a portion of physical matter that you have identified, filled out with your own identity. It is like a splendid ship, the body, that you have chosen ahead of time for a splendid challenging adventure--a ship that you have personally appointed that is equipped to serve as much as possible as a physical manifestation of your personhood.
quotes.translation: 你的基因结构对你每一个想法、情绪状态和心理氛围都有反应。用你们的术语来说，它包含了物种的物理历史，并与物种可能的未来能力相关联。你选择你的基因结构，使其适合你所选择的挑战和潜力。（长停顿。）它代表你的物理参考点，你的身体框架。它是你的个人物理财产。它是你已识别、用自身身份填充的物理物质的一部分。它就像一艘华丽的船——身体——你提前为一次华丽而充满挑战的冒险所选择的船——一艘你亲自指定、装备尽可能体现你人格的物理表现的船。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These dream activities have a pulsing quality that could be compared with the pulsing of heartbeat, and that are quite as vital to the human system. So much telepathic communication is received at this level that the lines of individuality are not as brilliant. Yet individuality does exist here, but it takes a strong organizing system, with amazing powers of discrimination, to handle such data; and it takes the human personality to stand firm upon its own identity while it is, on this other dreaming level, open to so many communications that are not its own. It is the ego, practically speaking, who attempts to do the distinguishing here; but the inner core of the self, the inner ego of which we have spoken, manages the basic chore. The setting up of the ego represented at once the necessity of boundaries, represented a cutting apart from, a divorcing, and a rigid limiting function. Initially this was necessary while this new sort of creature learned to maintain itself as a separate unit.
quotes.translation: 这些梦境活动具有一种脉动的特质，可与心跳的脉动相比，对人类系统同样至关重要。在此层面上接收到大量心灵感应信息，以至于个体性的界限不再那么鲜明。然而个体性确实在此存在，但需要一个强大的组织系统，具备惊人的辨别能力，才能处理这类数据；并且需要人格在另一个梦境层面上坚守自身身份，同时向众多不属于自己的信息保持开放。实际上，是自我在此试图进行区分；但我们所提及的内在核心自我，即内在自我，负责处理基本任务。自我的建立既代表了界限的必要性，也代表了一种切割、分离和严格限制的功能。最初，当这种新型生物学习如何作为独立单元维持自身时，这种设置是必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: ( you had a brief life as twins... Some definite clear-cut divisions within yourself have to do with this life when you were one of two... one going one way, and one the other... One twin had a strong leaning toward military things... a soldier... The organization of the church now serves the same purpose I believe.... security within the organization... The twin who was in the military found his sense of identity as a soldier within the system, but he had great faith in the system... in what he was doing... The other twin was more given to a statesmanlike sort of thing... and was in fact an orator although he had another profession... It included oration to people... The two of you had a very strong telepathic relationship... and this time the church has provided the same kind of organization...
quotes.translation: （你曾有过短暂的双胞胎生命……你内在某些明确清晰的划分与这次作为双胞胎之一的生命有关……一个走向一条路，另一个走向另一条路……其中一个双胞胎对军事事物有强烈倾向……是一名士兵……如今教会的组织我认为服务于同样的目的……组织内的安全感……那个从军的双胞胎在体制内找到了作为士兵的身份认同，但他对体制深信不疑……对他所做的事充满信念……另一个双胞胎更倾向于政治家之类的事物……实际上是个演说家，尽管他有其他职业……包括对众人演讲……你们两个有非常强烈的心灵感应关系……而这次教会提供了同样类型的组织……）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You should desire good health because it is a natural state of your being. You should trust in the innate intelligence of your own being... which produces good health. Health is a natural state of your being. Through your physical image the energy of the universe expresses itself. You as an individualized consciousness are a part of this, and you cannot express yourself fully nor fulfill your purpose as an identity, as an individual, if you are not in good health... for the effects of the body are felt in the mind... and the effects of the mind are felt in the body. You distort the picture. Now I did not intend a question and answer service this evening, but I seem to be involved in one. And some evening I will turn the tables. And when I ask you questions, I will expectat some answers. And they will not be easy questions... and they will not be general questions. And I will make you search for the answers... and the answers will form steps upon which you can walk and will serve as foundations within which you can travel within yourselves. But they will be your answers and not my answers.
quotes.translation: 你应当渴望健康，因为健康是你存在的自然状态。你应当信任自身内在的固有智慧……它产生健康。健康是你存在的自然状态。通过你的物质形象，宇宙能量得以表达自身。你作为个体化的意识是其中的一部分，如果你不健康，就无法充分表达自己，也无法完成作为身份、作为个体的目的……因为身体的影响会在心灵中感受到……心灵的影响也会在身体中感受到。你扭曲了这幅画面。今晚我本无意进行问答服务，但我似乎卷入其中了。某个晚上我会反过来。当我向你们提问时，我会期待一些答案。那些问题不会简单……也不会笼统。我会让你们去寻找答案……这些答案将形成你们可以行走的阶梯，成为你们可以在自身内在旅行的基础。但那是你们的答案，而不是我的答案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is very difficult for them to understand your ideas of past, present and future. Now give us a moment. (No real pause.) In other dimensions, or if you prefer at other stages of development, the multidimensional personality is aware of its primary identity, and is also aware simultaneously of personality offshoots that it has sent into many realities, into probable systems, as it pursues all of the probable acts and creations inherent in its nature.
quotes.translation: 他们很难理解你们关于过去、现在和未来的概念。现在给我们一点时间。（没有真正的停顿。）在其他维度，或者如果你更喜欢其他发展阶段，多维人格意识到它的主要身份，同时也意识到它已发送到许多实相、可能系统中的身份分支，因为它追求其本性中固有的所有可能行为和创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is however a portion of you, the deeper identity who forms both the inner ego and the outer ego, who decided that you would be a physical being in this place and in this time. This is the core of your identity, the psychic seed from which you sprang, the multidimensional personality of which you are part.
quotes.translation: 然而，你有一部分，那个形成内在自我和外在自我的更深层身份，决定了你会在此时此地成为物质存在。这是你身份的核心，你从中萌发的灵性种子，你所属的多维人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Much of this is very difficult to verbalize. (Long pause.) You are not subordinate to some giant consciousness. While you think in such terms, however, I must speak of reincarnational selves and counterparts, because you are afraid that if you climb out of what you think your identity is, then you will lose it.
quotes.translation: 其中很多内容很难用语言表达。（长时间停顿。）你们并不从属于某个巨大意识。然而，当你们以这样的方式思考时，我必须谈论转世自我和对等体，因为你们害怕如果爬出你们认为的身份，就会失去它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 740
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: There are many other natural and spontaneous kinds of comprehension that can also result from the waking and sleeping rhythms that I have suggested. The unconscious, the color black, and death all have strongly negative connotations in which the inner self is feared; the dream state is mistrusted and often suggests thoughts of both death and/or evil. But changed wake-sleep habits can, again, bring about a transformation in which it is obvious that dreams contain great wisdom and creativity, that the unconscious is indeed quite conscious, and that in fact the individual sense of identity can be retained in the dream state. The fear of self-annihilation, symbolically thought of as death, can then no longer apply as it did before.
quotes.translation: 我所建议的清醒与睡眠节律还能带来许多其他自然且自发的理解方式。无意识、黑色与死亡都带有强烈的负面含义，内在自体因此被恐惧；梦境状态不被信任，常令人联想到死亡或邪恶。但改变清醒-睡眠习惯能再次带来转变，使梦境蕴含伟大智慧与创造力的事实变得显而易见，无意识确实具有高度意识，而个体身份感在梦境状态中也能得以保留。对自我湮灭的恐惧（象征性地被视为死亡）便不再能像从前那样发挥作用。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You can read the world in a different way, while still maintaining your own identity, or you can move into a different country of yourself that speaks your native language but with a different slant. You do this to some extent or another whenever you tune in to broadcasts to which you usually pay no attention. The news is slightly foreign, while it is still interpreted through the language that you know. You are getting a translation of reality.
quotes.translation: 你可以在保持自身身份的同时以不同方式解读世界，也可以进入自身内在的另一个国度——那里说着你的母语，却带着不同的视角。每当你调频至平时不加注意的广播时，你都在某种程度上这样做。新闻略显陌生，却仍通过你熟悉的语言被诠释。你正在接收现实的翻译。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A dispersion has begun in which the ego will find it more and more difficult to hold energy within forms of personal identity, or to use energy for the purposes of the ego. The energy will fly every which way, uncontrolled, and no longer channeled. Habit will still have some power of restraint for a while yet, but whole blocks of conceptual realizations, and whole blocks of time realizations, are now surely drifting away from the ego's control.
quotes.translation: 一种分散已经开始，自我将越来越难以将能量维持在个人身份的形态中，或为自我目的运用能量。能量将四处飞散，不受控制，不再被引导。习惯在短期内仍具一定约束力，但整块的概念认知与整块的时间认知，如今正确实地脱离自我的掌控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As a rule you have enough difficulty dealing with the day's occurrences, much less next week's, and so in the sequence of events the reality of probable actions is usually hidden from your view. (Pause.) This more complex reality is an ever-existing property of your personal creaturehood. Beside this, in your terms you exist as a creature more than once. In each of your "reincarnational" existences you are faced with the same relationship with probabilities. In each case, also, the nature of the conscious mind sets up its own territory-of-identity (with hyphens) that it regards as its own. This provides a clear focus in which "present" action can be considered. These incarnations are all simultaneous.
quotes.translation: 通常你连处理当天发生的事都够吃力了，更别提下周的事，因此在事件序列中，可能行动的现实通常被隐藏于你的视野之外。（停顿。）这种更复杂的现实是你个人存有本质中永远存在的属性。此外，用你们的话说，你作为存有存在的次数不止一次。在你每一次"转世"存在中，你都面临着与可能性的相同关系。同样，在每种情况下，意识心的本质都会划定它视为己有的身份领域（带连字符）。这提供了清晰的焦点，使"当下"行动得以被考量。这些转世都是同时发生的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As there are portions of reality that you do not consciously perceive, and other systems of probability of which you are not consciously aware, so also are there aspects of primary godhood that you cannot at this moment comprehend. There are, therefore, probable gods, each one reflecting in its way the multidimensional aspects of a prime identity so great and dazzling that no one reality form or particular kind of existence could contain it.
quotes.translation: 正如现实中有你无法有意识地感知的部分，以及你未能有意识觉察的其他可能性系统，同样地，也存在你此刻无法理解的原初神性的面向。因此，存在可能的神祇，每一位都以自身方式反映着多维身份的本质——如此伟大而耀眼，以至于没有任何单一现实形式或特定存在类型能容纳它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Physically the structure of a cell retains its identity, even while the matter that composes it is continually altered. The cell rebuilds itself in line with its own pattern of identity, yet is always a part of emerging action, alive and responding even in the midst of its own multitudinous deaths.
quotes.translation: 在物质层面，细胞的结构保持着其身份，即使构成它的物质不断更替。细胞根据自身身份模式重建自身，却始终是涌现行动的一部分，在其自身无数次的死亡中依然鲜活并回应着。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now, mankind builds civilizations. He has gone beyond the child's game. The toys are real, and yet basically the analogy holds. I am not condoning those violence's that occur. The fact is that they can never be condoned, and yet they must be understood for what they are: man learning through his own errors. He also learns by his successes, and there are times when he holds his hand, moments of deliberation, periods of creativity. (Pause.) Identities take many roles in many lives.
quotes.translation: 人类现在正在构建文明。他已超越了孩童的游戏。玩具是真实的，但比喻依然成立。我并非宽恕那些发生的暴力。事实上，它们永远不能被宽恕，然而必须被理解其本质：人类通过自身的错误学习。他也通过成功学习，有时他会克制自己，那是深思的时刻，创造的时期。（停顿。）身份认同在众多生命中扮演着多重角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: （She reported that at the end of the session she received a strong emotional feeling from Seth. It was directed toward us and was to this effect: "Through action, see how I'm a part of you both now, and how foolish it is of you to worry about identities, when all identities are so bound together."
quotes.translation: （她报告说，在课程结束时，她从赛斯那里接收到强烈的情感。这情感指向我们，大意是："透过行动，看我现在如何成为你们两人的一部分，你们担心身份认同是多么愚蠢，因为所有身份都如此紧密相连。"）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You form your history. You form your reality, and so no one is thrust into a position which first was not accepted as a challenge. So you work out your problems and challenges in whatever way you choose, historically. In your terms, again, you and the Roman are connected; and the Arab and the American; and the African and the Chinese; and so are your identities intermixed with others who may seem to be strangers, but others who speak with your own voice -- others who communicate with you in their dreams as you communicate with them. You have comrades, and you come to this earth at a given time and place of your choice, and so do you reap and form the great challenges of your age.
quotes.translation: 你形成你的历史。你形成你的实相，因此没有人会被推入一个最初未被接受为挑战的位置。所以你以你选择的任何方式，在历史上解决你的问题和挑战。用你的话说，你和罗马人相连；阿拉伯人和美国人相连；非洲人和中国人相连；你的身份也与那些看似陌生的人交织——那些用你自身声音说话的人——那些在梦中与你沟通的人，正如你与他们沟通一样。你有同志，你选择在特定的时空来到地球，你收获并形成你时代的大挑战。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 724)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: One thing you should know: action cannot stop. It is powerless in this respect only. It cannot destroy itself. It can change form. It often changes direction. It is so many-dimensional that it must experience itself as individuals. Individuality is a direct result of the overall oneness of this action. Action is also a direct result of individual identities, for without these psychological dimensions, oneness could not multiply itself.
quotes.translation: 有一件事你该知道：行动无法停止。它仅在此方面无能为力。它无法毁灭自身。它可以改变形式。它常改变方向。它是如此多维，以至于必须作为个体体验自身。个体性是这整体行动的直接结果。行动也是个体身份的直接结果，因为没有这些心理维度，一体性就无法繁衍自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The giant image of myself, never clearly glimpsed by Ruburt, represents my own greater reality. In a particular fashion, that identity cannot be fully expressed within the confines of any one form, any more than yours can. Period. Ruburt saw many miniature versions of me. In his inner vision these appeared as identical, simply so that he would identify them as portions of myself. They are actually quite different, one from the others.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏从未清晰瞥见的我的巨大形象，代表着我更伟大的实相。以特定方式，那个身份无法在任何单一形式的限制中完全表达，正如你的身份也无法做到。句号。鲁柏看到许多我的微型版本。在他的内在视像中，这些版本看似相同，仅仅是为了让他识别为我的部分。它们实际上彼此截然不同。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 740
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: When this occurs you will be able to use your normal abilities in addition to other abilities used while in the dream state itself. You will be certain of your identity. You will realize that your physical self is sleeping, or in a dream state, and that the inner self is fully awake. Now this represents a definite increase in the scope of consciousness, and a considerable expansion over the usual limitations set by you upon the self.
quotes.translation: 当这发生时，你将能运用你正常的能力，同时运用在梦境状态中使用的其他能力。你将确知你的身份。你将意识到你的物质自体正在睡眠或处于梦境状态，而内在自体完全清醒。现在，这代表着意识范畴的明确扩展，以及对你通常加诸自体的限制的显著超越。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Joseph's focus of identity is his own. He will follow it. He was not Nebene, or the Roman officer or the woman. Yet they are versions of what he is, and he is a version of what they "were," and at certain levels each is aware of the others. There is constant interaction.13
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……约瑟夫的身份焦点是他自己的。他会遵循它。他不是尼宾、那位罗马军官或那位女子。然而，他们是他的本质的版本，而他是他们“曾经”的版本，在某个层面上，彼此都意识到对方的存在。存在着持续的互动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 721
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It will be easier （i.e., there will be less resistance; put that in parentheses） for a given individual to accept certain ideas or emotions therefore, and more difficult for him to accept certain others. I have spoken about fields and systems. While no system is closed, each system has at its furthest reaches sufficient resistance to form sufficient-enough boundaries, so that its own identity is retained.
quotes.translation: 因此，对某个特定个体来说，接受某些观念或情绪会更容易（即阻力较小，请将此放入括号内），而接受其他观念或情绪则更困难。我曾谈及场域与系统。虽然没有任何系统是封闭的，但每个系统在其最远端都拥有足够的阻力，以形成足够清晰的边界，从而保持其自身身份的完整性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is only because, particularly in your times, you have trained yourselves to limit the nature of your own consciousnesses that such ideas seem strange. You have thus far believed that you must train your great imaginations and your intelligences to confine themselves and their activities to the physical world as you have been told it exists. In childhood, before you so leashed your imaginations, however, you each had your own dreams--dreams that awakened you to other portions of your own identities. There are many experiences open to you now--if you can be free enough to allow them--that will give you glimpses of those other intervals in which you have a reality.
quotes.translation: 仅仅是因为，尤其在你们的时代，你们训练自己限制了自身意识的本质，这些观念才显得奇怪。迄今为止，你们相信必须训练自己伟大的想象力和智慧，将它们及其活动限制在被告知存在的物质世界中。然而，在童年时期，在你们如此束缚想象力之前，你们每个人都拥有自己的梦境——那些梦将你们唤醒，让你们触及自身身份的其他部分。现在有许多体验向你们敞开——只要你们能足够自由地允许它们——这些体验将让你们瞥见那些你们拥有实相的其他区间。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: No apple tree tries to grow violets. Quite automatically it knows what it is, and the framework of its own identity and existence. (Pause.) You have a conscious mind, but this is only the "topmost" portion of your mind. Much more of "it" is available to you. Much more of your knowledge can be conscious, therefore; but a false belief, a limiting one, is as ambiguous to your nature as any apple tree's idea that it was a violet plant.
quotes.translation: 没有一棵苹果树试图长出紫罗兰。它自动地知道自己是什么，以及自身身份与存在的框架。（停顿。）你们拥有意识心，但这只是你们心灵的“最顶层”。它的更多部分是可被你们获取的。因此，你们更多的知识可以成为有意识的；但一个错误的信念，一个限制性的信念，对你们本性的模糊程度，就像任何苹果树认为自己是紫罗兰植物的想法一样。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your painting was meant to bring out from the recesses of your being the accumulation of your knowledge in the form of images -- not of people you might meet now on the street, but portraits of the residents of the mind. The residents of the mind are very real. In a certain fashion, they are your parents more than your parents were, and when you express their realities, they are also expressing yours. All time is simultaneous. Only the illusion of time on each of your parts keeps you from greeting each other. To some extent, when you paint such portraits you are forming psychic bridges between yourself and those other selves: Your own identity as yourself grows.
quotes.translation: 你的画作旨在从你存在的深处，以图像的形式引出你知识的积累——不是你现在可能在街上遇到的人，而是心灵居民的肖像。心灵居民非常真实。在某种程度上，他们比你的父母更像是你的父母，当你表达他们的实相时，他们也在表达你的实相。所有时间都是同时存在的。只是你们每个人对时间的幻觉阻止了你们彼此问候。在某种程度上，当你绘制这样的肖像时，你正在你自身与那些其他自我之间架起心灵的桥梁：你作为自己的身份在成长。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 834, FEBRUARY 5, 1979
8:59 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You might say that the personalities then are but divisions of your self here. There is no competition between them. There never was any real division, but only a seeming one in which you played various roles, developed different abilities, learned to create in new and diverse ways. These reincarnational personalities continue to develop, but they also understand that their main identity is also yours.
quotes.translation: 你可以说，这些人格只是你在此的自我之分割。它们之间没有竞争。从来没有任何真正的分割，只有看似分割的表象，在其中你扮演了各种角色，发展了不同的能力，学会了以新颖多样的方式创造。这些转世人格继续发展，但它们也明白，它们的主要身份也是你的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (Smile, eyes open.) Short range predictions would be most difficult for me, since I cannot break down time as you think of it to that degree. I perceive instead at one glance seemingly whole segments of your time field. (Pause.) Seth as you knew him perceives your own system more clearly. (Pause.) From my viewpoint (pause) I do not perceive your physical universe then as you do. I do perceive your psychic values and Emotional intensities, and realize that you perceive but very small segments of these. As you break down the spacious present into moments, which you then experience, so also you break down psychic identity, gestalts, into small self structures.
quotes.translation: （微笑，睁眼）短期预测对我来说最为困难，因为我无法像你那样将时间分解到那种程度。我反而能一眼瞥见你时间场域中看似完整的片段。（停顿）你所认识的赛斯更清晰地感知你们的系统。（停顿）从我的视角来看（停顿）我并非像你那样感知你们的物质宇宙。我确实感知到你们的心灵价值与情感强度，并意识到你们只感知到这些的极小片段。正如你们将广袤的当下分解为一个个时刻来体验，你们也将心灵身份与完形分解为微小的自我结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In a fully ego-oriented state of consciousness this is not so, for the ego constantly tries to maintain a rigid electromagnetic balance. This is obviously impossible, but in the attempt egotistical identity is helped in its efforts to maintain a more or less closed system of perceptions.
quotes.translation: 在完全以自我为导向的意识状态中并非如此，因为自我不断试图维持一种刚性的电磁平衡。这显然不可能，但在这种尝试中，自我身份得以在维持相对封闭的感知系统方面获得助力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In the same manner any of the unit intensities behind each number may change position while still remaining itself, and retaining its individuality as a unit. If you use x and y rather than I and 2, basically the same is true. Now this analogy applies to identity. You are in a world where you see one particular intensity unit--belonging say to number 1.
quotes.translation: 同理，每个数字背后的任何单位强度都可能改变位置，同时仍保持自身，并保留其作为单位的个体性。若你用x和y代替1和2，本质上同样成立。现在这个类比适用于身份。你身处一个世界，在其中你看到某个特定的强度单位——比如说属于数字1。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: "You" are not divorced from these other streams of consciousness in any basic way; only your focus of attention closes you off from them, and from the events in which they are involved. If you think of your stream of consciousness as transparent, however, then you can learn to look through and beneath it to others that lie in other beds of reality. You can also learn to rise above your present stream of consciousness and perceive others that run, for analogy's sake, parallel. The point is that you are only limited to the self you know if you think that you are, and if you do not realize that that self is far from your entire identity.
quotes.translation: "你"与这些其他意识流在根本层面上并未分离；只是你的注意力焦点将你与它们隔绝开来，也与它们所涉及的事件隔绝。然而，若你将自身意识流视为透明的，你便能学会透视并穿越它，触及位于其他实相河床中的意识流。你也可以学会超越当前的意识流，感知那些——打个比方——平行流淌的支流。关键在于，只有当你认为自己仅局限于已知的自我，且未能认识到那个自我远非你的完整身份时，你才真正受限于此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that in our methods the ego is changed rather completely but gradually in many cases, and only through its own willingness to do so. It recognizes its identity as a part of. underlined, the inner self. Therefore basically it has no need to fight the inner self, since it knows its survival is dependent upon this inner framework.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，在我们的方法中，自我在许多情况下会相当彻底但渐进地改变，且唯有通过其自身的意愿才能实现。它认识到自己的身份是内在自我的一部分（下划线强调）。因此，它根本无需与内在自我对抗，因为它知道自身的存续依赖于这个内在框架。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: They are not "lost", buried or negated in some superself, without free will, self-determination, or individuality. Instead the identity is what they are, with full freedom to express all probable actions and developments, both in this reality and in others that you do not know.
quotes.translation: 它们并非"迷失"、被埋葬或否定于某个超我之中，失去自由意志、自主性或个体性。相反，身份就是它们本身，拥有充分的自由来表达所有可能的行动与发展——既在此实相中，也在你们所不知的其他实相中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We shall have to consider, later, color as it appears in dreams, but this is not the time for such a discussion. Identities exist within dreams also, and here the same nature of identities applies, as those given earlier. The laws of action also apply here in the dream reality.
quotes.translation: 我们稍后必须考虑梦中出现的色彩，但此刻并非讨论此事的时机。身份认同同样存在于梦境中，且在此处适用的身份本质与先前所述相同。行动法则在梦境实相中同样适用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego then, is only part of a much larger self, but because consciously you do not perceive the whole self you arbitrarily make a unit from a truly indivisible identity, and call this the "I." This designation, this classification, in no way affects the nature of that indivisible self. It merely affects your own conscious attitudes. You succeed in cutting off, in theory, one portion of the self from the whole self.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我只是更广大自性的一部分，但由于你无法有意识地感知整体自性，便武断地将真正不可分割的身份认同切割成单元，称之为"我"。这种命名与分类完全不影响那不可分割自性的本质，它仅影响你自身的意识态度。你在理论上成功地将自性的一部分与整体割裂开来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This portion of the self then can be utilized to keep the ego and the subconscious in balance. Your own identity is still greater than this however. This portion of the self can serve to keep you informed as to the balance and efficiency of the immediate operating personality.
quotes.translation: 自性的这一部分可被用来维持自我与潜意识之间的平衡。然而，你自身的身份认同仍大于此。自性的这一部分能让你随时了解当下运作人格的平衡状态与效能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In such interrelationships, the steps or identities are each immeasurably enriched by the added perception of the others. As mentioned earlier, thoughts, containing their own electromagnetic reality, have form whether or not you perceive it. With each thought, then, you send out from yourself shapes and images that can be quite legitimate realities to those within the system of reality into which they are propelled.
quotes.translation: 在这种交互关系中，每个步骤或身份都因其他身份的额外感知而获得难以估量的丰富。如前所述，思想本身具有电磁实相，无论你是否感知到，它们都拥有形态。因此，每个思想都会从你自身释放出形状与影像，这些形状与影像对它们被推入的实相系统内的存在而言，可能是完全真实的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It operates within you and for you in any case. The awareness of its existence however has strong reassuring elements on a conscious level. You see you are not the low man on the totem pole however. There are lesser, so to speak, personalities within every dominant physical personality, and lesser identities quite independent within each personal system. To these the physical personality would seem like a supraself.
quotes.translation: 无论如何，它都在你之内并为你运作。然而，觉察到它的存在，在意识层面具有强烈的安抚作用。你看，你并非图腾柱上最低等的存在。每个主导性的物质人格内部都存在着所谓较次等的人格，每个个人系统内部也存在着相当独立的次等身份认同。对这些次等身份而言，物质人格仿佛是一个超我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It has been said by some women working toward "equal rights" that the species has only used half of its potential by suppressing the abilities of women. In larger terms, however, each individual suffers whenever identity is defined primarily as a matter of sexual orientation.
quotes.translation: 某些争取"平等权利"的女性曾指出，人类通过压抑女性能力只发挥了半数潜能。但从更宏观的角度看，每当身份认同被主要定义为性取向问题时，每个个体都会遭受损失。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your own personalities will set the pace, for they are well-balanced ones. All of this demands spontaneity and control. This is the motion of consciousness. It is unfortunate that identity is considered generally as a rather static and permanent acknowledgment, for it is not.
quotes.translation: 你们自己的人格会设定步调，因为它们是平衡良好的人格。这一切都需要自发性和控制力。这是意识的运动。很不幸的是，身份通常被视为一种相当静态且永久的认知，但它并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Nevertheless, the atoms and molecules within the nail do possess their own kind of consciousness. The atoms and molecules that make up the pages of this book are also, within their own level, aware. Nothing exists -- neither rock, mineral, plant, animal, or air -- that is not filled with consciousness of its own kind. So you stand amid a constant vital commotion, a gestalt of aware energy, and you are yourselves physically composed of conscious cells that carry within themselves the realization of their own identity, that cooperate willingly to form the corporeal structure that is your physical body.
quotes.translation: 然而，指甲内的原子和分子确实拥有它们自己的意识。构成这本书书页的原子和分子，在其自身层面上也是有知觉的。没有任何存在——无论是岩石、矿物、植物、动物还是空气——不充满其自身种类的意识。因此，你置身于持续不断的活力骚动中，一个觉知能量的完形，而你们自己身体上是由有意识的细胞组成的，这些细胞自身携带着对其自身身份的认识，并自愿合作形成构成你们肉体的身体结构。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The consciousness of the personality has not left too soon, or unusually soon, as in your father's case, but stubbornly persists. It is as if an artist found the last painting showing up over and over in the next one. In such cases there is a lack of understanding. The inner identity does not understand that it is simply taking a different guise, fulfilling different obligations, or using unfulfilled energies.
quotes.translation: 人格的意识并没有过早或异常迅速地离开，就像你们父亲的情况那样，而是顽固地持续存在。这就像一位艺术家发现上一幅画作在下一幅中反复出现。在这种情况下，存在一种理解上的缺失。内在身份不明白它只是换了一种不同的伪装，履行不同的义务，或运用未实现的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The type of telepathy which is most commonly thought of as telepathy is of course not the elemental type of which I spoke earlier, but a different variety. This particular, more advanced telepathy could not and did not occur in its most complicated form until the development within your plane of psychically developed personalities. This development involved separations and concentrations of energy into self-conscious identities. This development was an advancement, yet this advancement led also to a separation and objectifying of consciousness, into dual segments of subject and object.
quotes.translation: 通常被认为是心电感应的那种心电感应，当然不是我之前提到的基本类型，而是另一种变体。这种特定的、更高级的心电感应，在你们层面上发展出心灵上高度发展的人格之前，无法也不可能以其最复杂的形式出现。这种发展涉及将能量分离和集中到自我意识身份中。这是一种进步，然而这种进步也导致了意识的分离和客体化，分裂成主体和客体的二元部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A mountain exists. It is composed of rocks and trees, grass and hills, and in your terms of time you can look at it, see it as such, give it a name, and ignore its equally independent parts. Without those parts the mountain would not exist. It is not invaded by the trees or rocks that compose it, and while trees grow and die the mountain itself, at least in your terms of time, exists despite the changes. It is also dependent upon the changes. In a manner of speaking, your own identities as you think of them are dependent upon the same kinds of living organizations of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 一座山存在。它由岩石、树木、草地和丘陵组成，用你们的时间术语来说，你可以看着它，把它视为如此，给它一个名字，而忽略它同样独立的组成部分。没有这些部分，山就不存在。它没有被构成它的树木或岩石入侵，而当树木生长和死亡时，山本身，至少用你们的时间术语来说，尽管有变化却依然存在。它也依赖于这些变化。从某种意义上说，你们所认为的自己的身份，也依赖于同样类型的意识活组织。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Jung's dark side of the self is the ego, not the unconscious. The complicated, infinitely varied, unbelievably rich tapestry of Jung's, in quotes "unconscious," could hardly be unconscious. It is the product of an inner consciousness with far more sense of identity and purpose than the daily ego. It is the daily ego's ignorance and limited focus that makes it view so-called unconscious activity as chaotic.
quotes.translation: 荣格所说的自我的阴暗面是自我，而不是无意识。荣格那复杂、无限多样、难以置信的丰富织锦，即所谓的“无意识”，几乎不可能是无意识的。它是内在意识的产物，其身份感和目的感远胜于日常自我。正是日常自我的无知和有限的焦点，使其将所谓的无意识活动视为混乱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: And so it is from your larger identity that you form the reality that you know. It is up to you to do this with joy and vigor, clearing your conscious mind so that the deeper knowledge of your greater identity can form joyous expressions in the world of the flesh.
quotes.translation: 因此，正是从你更大的身份中，你形成了你所知的实相。你有责任以喜悦和活力来完成这件事，清理你的意识心智，以便你更大身份的深层知识能在肉身世界中形成喜悦的表达。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Consciousness is a way of perceiving the various dimensions of reality. Consciousness as you know it is highly specialized. The physical senses allow you to perceive the three-dimensional world, and yet by their very nature they can inhibit the perception of other equally valid dimensions. Most of you identify with your daily physically oriented self. You would not think of identifying with one portion of your body and ignoring all other parts, and yet you are doing the same thing (smile) when you imagine that the egotistical self carries the burden of your identity.
quotes.translation: 意识是一种感知实相不同维度的方法。你所知的意识是高度专门化的。肉体感官让你能感知三维世界，然而，就其本质而言，它们也会抑制对其他同样有效维度的感知。你们大多数人认同于日常的、以肉体为导向的自己。你不会想到只认同自己身体的一部分而忽略其他所有部分，然而，当你想象自我背负着你身份的重担时，你就在做同样的事情（微笑）。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The constant interchange that exists biologically means that the same physical stuff that composes a man or a woman may be dispersed, and later form a toad, a starfish, a dog or a flower. It may be distributed into numberless different forms. That arithmetic11 of consciousness is not annihilated. It is multiplied and not divided. Reminiscent within each form is the consciousness of all the other combinations, all of the other alliances, as identity continually forms new creative endeavors and gestalts of relatedness. There is no discrimination, no prejudice.
quotes.translation: 生物学上存在的持续交换意味着，构成一个男人或女人的相同物质可能会被分散，后来形成一只蟾蜍、一只海星、一条狗或一朵花。它可能被分配到无数不同的形式中。那种意识的算术不会被消灭。它被倍增而非分割。在每个形式中，都隐约存在着所有其他组合、所有其他联盟的意识，因为身份持续形成新的创造性努力和相关性的完形。没有歧视，没有偏见。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It can therefore, without loss of its basic integrity, change egos when such a change becomes necessary. Now. In some cases this may cause inconvenience and considerable psychological difficulties, but when such an instance occurs it is because the ego structure that is being deposed was not carrying out the main aims or goals of the identity which originally gave it that envied position of dominance.
quotes.translation: 因此，它可以在不丧失其基本完整性的情况下，在必要时更换自我。现在。在某些情况下，这可能会造成不便和相当大的心理困难，但当这种情况发生时，是因为被废黜的自我结构没有实现最初赋予它那个令人羡慕的主导地位的身份的主要目标或目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Consciousness is not limited. Identities can mix and merge while retaining their inviolate nature and memories. This is all for now, but again, later, you will see where it relates, and how you can disperse your own characteristics into another and they can disperse theirs into you, with your consent and theirs, to form new aspects of reality and to cast new light on combined purposes and challenges.
quotes.translation: 意识不受限制。身份可以混合和融合，同时保留其不可侵犯的本质和记忆。目前就这些，但稍后，你会看到它如何关联，以及你如何能将你自己的特性分散到另一个人中，而他们也能在得到你和他们的同意下，将他们的特性分散到你之中，以形成实相的新面向，并为结合的目的和挑战带来新的光明。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 726
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Prime identities cannot be duplicated. Duplication, exact duplication, is always merely an effect of insufficient knowledge. In some cases two thoughts may indeed appear identical, but whether or not examination can show it, such exact duplication is impossible. Now. When receiver B receives this transmitted thought, he may react and interpret that part of the thought that is similar to the original.
quotes.translation: 首要身份无法被复制。复制，精确复制，始终仅仅是知识不足的结果。在某些情况下，两个想法可能确实看起来相同，但无论检查是否能显示出来，这种精确复制是不可能的。现在。当接收者B接收到这个被传递的想法时，他可能会反应并解释该想法中与原始想法相似的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Because you are obsessed with the idea of time as past, present and future, you are forced to think of reincarnations as strung out one before the other, and indeed we speak of past lives simply because you are used to the time sequence concept. What you have of course, loosely speaking, is something like the developments narrated in The Three Faces of Eve. You have various dominant egos, all part of an inner identity, dominant in various existences. To make the concept understandable to you it is convenient to speak of past and future reincarnations.
