quotes.translation: 由于你们执著于过去、现在与未来的时间观念，被迫将转世视为前后相继的序列——我们之所以谈论"前世"，不过是因为你们习惯时间序列概念。若以松散的说法，你们实际拥有的状态，类似于《三面夏娃》中叙述的发展过程。你们拥有多个主导性自我，皆属于内在身份的一部分，在不同存在中轮流主导。为了让你们理解这个概念，我们才方便地谈论"过去"与"未来"的转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The cells and molecules, forming their psychic gestalt into a particular human physical structure, are separated from what you might call the outer environment, and yet they are also connected to the outer environment more than they are separated from it. It is the inner ego, and the inner vitality and the inner ego's determination, along with the cooperation of all the cells that compose the physical body, that enables such a particular structure as the human body to exist as a separate construction, and to maintain the necessary sense of identity.
quotes.translation: 细胞与分子将自身的心灵完形凝聚成特定的人类物质结构，它们既与所谓的外在环境分离，却又比分离状态更紧密地与之相连。正是内在自我、内在生命力与内在自我的决心，配合组成肉体的所有细胞，才使人体这般特殊结构得以作为独立构造存在，并维持必要的身份感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As a personality learns to use its abilities it becomes more aware of complexity, and able to operate as an identity within it. Since I have known your time it is meaningful for me, though it no longer hampers me. I merely understand its reality for you. Other psychological structures have not been initially aware of this peculiar relationship between your physical framework and your time concept.
quotes.translation: 当人格学会运用自身能力，便会更清晰地觉察到复杂性，并能在其中以身份运作。由于我知晓你们的时间概念，这对我仍有意义——尽管它已不再束缚我。我只是理解它对你而言的真实性。其他心理结构最初并未意识到你们物质框架与时间概念之间的特殊关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: A very delicate network of imbalances is here maintained. The ego must not be too rigid, or too much a disciplinarian, or it ceases to speak for the whole personality, and becomes a warden, imprisoning the main expressive urges of the deeper self. It must not on the other hand be composed of too disorganized a system of actions, for in this case it is not capable of maintaining a consistent sense of identity or purpose, and is not strong enough to act in a magnetic manner, that will attract or hold the basic energies of the personality.
quotes.translation: 此处维持着精微的不平衡网络。自我不能过于僵化，也不能成为严苛的纪律执行者，否则它将不再代表完整人格发言，而沦为囚禁深层自我主要表达冲动的狱卒。另一方面，自我也不能由过于混乱的行动系统构成，否则它将无法维持一致的身份感或目标感，缺乏足够力量以磁性方式运作，无法吸引或凝聚人格的基本能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now in your terms only, these other counterparts are like latent patterns within your mind. Echoes. How many of you have actually thought of what the unconscious may be? Or, the voices that you hear within your mind or heart? Are they yours? To what counterparts do they belong? And yet each of you, in your own identity, has the right to do precisely as you wish, and to form your own reality....
quotes.translation: 现在仅就你们的说法而言，这些对应体如同潜伏在意识中的模式。回响。你们中有多少人真正思考过无意识可能是什么？或是你们内心或脑海中听到的声音？它们属于你们吗？它们属于哪些对应体？然而你们每个人，在自己身份中，都拥有完全按自己意愿行事、塑造自身实相的权利……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (The material in these recent excerpts rather prepared us for Seth's introduction of counterparts, then, in Session 721. In ESP class the next evening [on November 26], Seth began contending with some of the questions that instantly arose as a result of his new material. I'd just read aloud portions of the 721st session when one longtime student, whom I'll call Florence, commented that there "has to be a balance between each of us and our counterparts." Speaking strongly and humorously, Seth immediately took over the discussion.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Dictation. (Pause.) While men had their dream bodies alone they enjoyed a remarkable freedom, of course, for those bodies did not have to be fed or clothed. They did not have to operate under the law of gravity. Men could wander as they wished about the landscape. They did not yet identify themselves to any great degree (underlined) as being themselves separate from either the environment or other creatures. They knew themselves to be themselves, but their identities were not as closely allied with their forms as is now the case.
quotes.translation: 口述。（停顿。）当人类仅拥有梦体时，他们自然享有非凡的自由——因为这些身体无需进食穿衣，不必受重力法则约束。人们可以随心所欲地在风景中漫游。他们尚未将自己（着重号）与周遭环境或其他生物明确区分开来。他们知道自己是自己，但身份与形态的关联远不如现在这般紧密。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is also a natural tension, then, between sexes that is based on far deeper causes than physical ones. The tension results from the nature of your consciousness that arises from the anima, but depends for its continuation upon the "aggressiveness" of the animus. I have to some extent explained the fascination that one has for the other, as resulting from the inner knowledge of the whole self, that strives to attain true identity as it struggles to combine and fulfill the seemingly opposite tendencies that are a part of it.
quotes.translation: 两性之间也存在一种自然的紧张关系，其根源远比生理因素更为深远。这种紧张源于你意识的本性——它源自阿尼玛，却依赖阿尼姆斯的"进取性"来延续。我在某种程度上解释过两性间的相互吸引，这源于对完整自我的内在认知——当自我努力整合并实现自身所包含的看似对立倾向时，便试图达成真正的身份认同。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You will recall that the ego, while disliking change, is nevertheless dependent for its identity upon change. The ego to a large degree, therefore, chooses during its development those characteristic actions which will form its nature. Because the ego necessarily changes however, actions or emotions which at one time it chose as acceptable, at a later date so to speak it may attempt to deny.
quotes.translation: 你们当记得，自我虽厌恶改变，却仍需依赖改变来维持其身份认同。因此自我在发展过程中，很大程度上会选择那些能塑造其本性的典型行为。但由于自我必然改变，那些曾被它接纳的行为或情感，在日后可能会被它否认。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: One form may indeed serve, and then consciousness may project out of it into a new form that is familiar with other dimensions. In Ruburt's experience three different forms were used. He spoke, incidentally to his Father Trainor, and Lizzie Roohan together, while he was in the second form . He was then led by me into a further dimension of reality in which his third form was used. You must remember that all of these portions of the self exist at once, and that the whole inner self knows them as a part of its own identity.
quotes.translation: 一种形态确实可以服务，随后意识可能从中投射进入熟悉其他维度的新形态。在鲁柏的经历中，他使用了三种不同形态。顺便一提，当他处于第二种形态时，曾与特雷纳神父和莉齐·鲁汉同时交谈。随后我被引导进入另一个实相维度，在那里他使用了第三种形态。你们必须记住，自我的所有这些部分同时存在，而内在整体自我知晓它们是其身份认同的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The race of man is far more than the physical race however. You see him in but one stage of development. When an individual leaves your system it is for other systems. He has learned his A B C s, but that is all. There are some exceptions--identities that choose, then, to return and teach. They are not in the same league, so to speak, as those whose re-incarnational cycles are not complete.
quotes.translation: 然而人类种族远不止是生理种族。你们所见到的只是其发展的一个阶段。当个体离开你们的系统时，是为了进入其他系统。他学会了基础知识，但也仅此而已。存在一些例外——那些选择返回教导的身份认同。可以说，它们与尚未完成转世循环的个体不在同一层级。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These counterparts form psychic families. They are family representations on another level. First of all, such groups have a built-in focus -- political, civic, religious, sexual, or whatever. (Pause.) Certain members of the group express the repressed tendencies of others. Yet each is supported through a common sense of belonging, so that the group sometimes seems to have its own overall identity, in which each member plays a part. Any reader can easily discover this by examining the groups to which he or she belongs.
quotes.translation: 这些对应体形成心灵家族。它们是家族在另一层面的表征。首先，这类群体具有内置焦点——政治、公民、宗教、性或任何其他方面。（停顿。）群体中的某些成员表达着他人被压抑的倾向。然而每个人都通过共同的归属感获得支持，因此群体有时似乎拥有自己的整体身份认同，每个成员都在其中扮演角色。任何读者通过审视自己所属的群体都能轻易发现这一点。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 732
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: What I am trying to get across here is that, because of the superficial studies done so far, it seems that telepathy operates with separateness because of the limitations set by the ego on the definition of self. It is the similarity, or sympathy, of those in telepathic communication that makes telepathy possible. The limited idea of the self held by the ego clouds and distorts the main issue, for the ego is not conscious of the underlying bonds of sympathy that serve to merge, momentarily, the identities involved.
quotes.translation: 我在此试图阐明的是：由于迄今所做的研究过于肤浅，似乎心灵感应是在分离状态下运作的，这是因为自我对自我定义设定了限制。正是心灵感应交流中的相似性或共鸣使心灵感应成为可能。自我所持有的有限自我观念遮蔽并扭曲了主要问题，因为自我并未意识到那些暂时融合相关身份认同的潜在共鸣纽带。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The psychic centers would be activated more frequently, and the entire identity of the personality would be better strengthened and maintained. The resulting mobility and flexibility of consciousness would cause an added dividend in increased conscious concentration, and fatigue levels would always remain below danger points. A greater equalization, both physical and mental, would result.
quotes.translation: 通灵中心会更频繁地被激活，人格的整体身份会得到更好的强化与维持。由此产生的意识流动性与灵活性将带来额外红利：意识专注度提升，疲劳程度始终低于危险阈值。身心两方面都将达成更均衡的状态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: So, often such dreams are like programmed dramas, in that you clothe such visitations in familiar props. The same sort of thing frequently occurs when you experience extraordinary flashes of inspiration, or perceive other unofficial data. Quickly you try to make sense of such material in usual terms. An out-of-body experience into another level of reality becomes a visit to heaven, for example; or the heretofore-unrecognized voice of your own greater identity becomes the voice of God, or a spaceman or prophet.
quotes.translation: 因此，这类梦境常如同编排好的戏剧——你为这些访客披上熟悉的道具外衣。当你经历非凡的灵感闪现或感知到非官方信息时，同样的情况也频繁发生。你迅速试图用惯常术语理解这些素材。例如，进入另一层实相的灵魂出体体验会变成天堂之旅；而此前未被识别的、你自身更大身份的声音，则被当作上帝、太空人或先知的声音。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Session 757 was devoted to other matters that Jane and I were interested in.)

quotes.text: They come to understand then their basic oneness, while still retaining their own identity, since change is never still. In quotes: "By the time" this realization comes, inner value fulfillment has already created new realities. The answer, as closely as I can approximate it for you, is this: the purpose is being. This is something different than your idea (underlined) of brute survival.
quotes.translation: 于是他们开始理解自身本质的一体性，同时仍保有各自的身份认同——因为变化永不停歇。用引号来说："当"这种领悟到来时，内在价值完成早已创造出新的实相。我能为你最接近的答案是：目的是存在本身。这与你（划线强调的）"野蛮生存"的概念截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: For now, dictation: As most of you know, the atoms that compose your cells, as well as the cells themselves, constantly die and are replaced. The stuff of the internal organs changes and yet they always retain their form. Their identity is intact.
quotes.translation: 现在开始口授：如诸位所知，构成你细胞的原子以及细胞本身，都在不断死亡与更替。内脏器官的物质不断变化，却始终保持着形态。它们的身份完整无缺。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He has been reading various sections of the material, including portions having to do with the ego, personality and action, and you see attempted to set himself aside from the action in which his whole personality was intimately involved. As impossible [to do] as the ego's general attempt to insist upon some sort of permanent, unchanging, stable identity, since it is composed of action.
quotes.translation: 他一直在阅读材料的各个章节，包括涉及自我、人格与行动的部分，你看他试图将自己置身于行动之外——而他的整个人格正与这行动紧密相连。这就像自我普遍坚持要维持某种永恒不变、稳定身份的努力一样不可能实现，因为自我本身正是由行动构成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: (11:44.) The features in a portrait are painted on canvas or board, but your soul is not painted on your body. It enters into and becomes part of it. Physically, you cannot contain all of your identity, and that "free" portion unconsciously creates the flesh, in your terms. Again, you direct its form through your beliefs, but the unconscious part of you does the "work" of producing it.
quotes.translation: （11:44）肖像画的特征是画在画布或木板上的，但你的灵魂并非画在身体上。它进入身体并成为身体的一部分。从物质层面而言，你无法容纳全部身份，而那个"自由"的部分——用你们的说法——无意识地创造了肉体。再次强调，你通过信念引导其形态，但无意识部分完成了"生产"它的工作。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is less differentiation, in your terms, in no time, but far more differentiation in terms of consciousness, and psychological experience. All probabilities have their reality in no time, and the creative accomplishments that take place within no time generate all the probable realities that will ever exist or have existed within the various time systems. In various dream states you do delve into no time, and it is of course here that you have your primary existence and the ground of your identity.
quotes.translation: 就你们的说法而言，在无时间状态中分化较少，但就意识与心理体验而言，分化却大得多。所有可能性都在无时间状态中拥有其实相，而在无时间状态中发生的创造性成就，生成了所有曾在或将在各种时间系统中存在的可能性实相。在各种梦境状态中，你们确实会深入无时间状态，而你们的主要存在与身份根基当然就在此处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In that state, with the functions of the ego somewhat stilled, there is some considerable communication between various portions of the entire identity. In dreams you may have glimpses of probable roads that you might have taken. You may think that these are fantasy, but instead you may be perceiving a legitimate picture of events that did occur within another system of probabilities.
quotes.translation: 在那状态中，当自我功能稍显平静时，整个身份的各部分之间会有相当多的交流。在梦中，你们可能瞥见自己本可能走上的可能道路。你们或许认为这些是幻想，但相反，你们可能正在感知另一个可能性系统内确实发生的事件的合法画面。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your main point of contention is brought about by the emotional barriers that are caused by the difference in terms. It is as if you choose to work for a day in the slums. It would be ridiculous for you to choose to do this, and then say to yourself, "Why did I choose to work in the slums? I would prefer to work on Fifth Avenue." You know the reason, and your entire identity knows the reason. You hide it from the present self simply to insure the fact that the present reality is not a pretended one.
quotes.translation: 你们的主要争议点是由术语差异引起的情感障碍所致。这就像你选择在贫民窟工作一天。如果你选择这样做，然后对自己说："我为什么选择在贫民窟工作？我宁愿在第五大道工作。"这将是荒谬的。你知道原因，你的整个身份也知道原因。你只是对当前自我隐瞒这个事实，以确保当前实相不是虚假的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They can confuse you as to the nature of your own identity. You become the role. There should be a standing back within yourself for a while. The problems which you have set yourself can be solved, or the challenges you have set yourself can be met, in several ways. You have choices. There is not one way. It is your attitude that is important, and the flexibility of your inner self.
quotes.translation: 它们可能混淆你对自身身份本质的认识。你变成了那个角色。你应该暂时退后一步，在内心保持距离。你为自己设定的问题可以解决，你为自己设定的挑战可以通过多种方式应对。你有选择。并非只有一条路。重要的是你的态度，以及你内在自我的灵活性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now to return to our discussion. The matter of time is highly important if you have any hopes of understanding the self in its entirety, or other personalities that do not operate within your system. The Psychological frameworks are so different. The apparent cause and effect sequence is absent, and identity knows itself as itself through other means than continuity, in your terms.
quotes.translation: 现在回到我们的讨论。如果你希望理解完整的自我，或理解不在你系统内运作的其他人格，时间问题就极为重要。心理框架如此不同。明显的因果序列并不存在，而身份通过连续性之外的其他方式认识自身——按你们的说法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These body forms however are necessary camouflages, for you cannot yet think of identity without some kind of physical body. Therefore you project yourself in a body form. It varies according to your own abilities, and without it you would feel lost indeed. The form itself is not important, but the form can tell you something about the dimension in which you are having experience.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些身体形态是必要的伪装，因为你们还无法在没有某种物质身体的情况下思考身份。因此，你们以身体形态投射自己。它根据你们自身能力而变化，没有它你们确实会感到迷失。形态本身并不重要，但形态能告诉你关于你正在体验的维度的一些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now: An artist does the same thing in different terms, when he or she imagines the probable versions that a painting, or a book or a sculpture, for example, might take. (Pause.) The artist does not usually understand, however, that those probable art productions do literally exist; he perceives only the final, physically chosen work. Speaking simply, some of us are able to hold intact the nature of our own identities while following patterns of probable realities in which we also play a part.
quotes.translation: 现在：艺术家在做同样的事情，只是用不同的方式——比如当他或她想象一幅画、一本书或一座雕塑可能存在的各种版本时。（停顿）然而，艺术家通常并不理解，那些可能的艺术作品确实真实存在；他只能感知最终在物质层面被选中的那一个。简单来说，我们有些人能够在追随我们参与其中的可能实相模式时，完整地保持自身身份的本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 744
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Full and uninhibited use of even the outer senses would lead you to inner reality. Usually only a strong and disciplined self, a well-structured identity, can perceive in this manner, and then only occasionally. Full operation of inner and outer senses, you see, in your present stage of development as a race, would be blinding, as you can see in your reading of drug experiences.
quotes.translation: 即使充分且无拘束地运用外在感官，也会引导你进入内在实相。通常只有强大而自律的自我、一个结构良好的身份，才能以这种方式感知，而且只是偶尔为之。你看，在你们种族目前的发展阶段，内在与外在感官的完全运作会令人目眩，就像你在阅读药物体验的记载中所见的那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The ego is the only part of the self that regards physical objects as anything but symbols. It is highly difficult for other parts of the self to experience the ego for this reason. The ego, while always changing, is one of the most rigid aspects of identity. To the inner self neither house nor walls exist. They are perceived only as vague self limiting ideas on the ego's part.
quotes.translation: 自我是自我中唯一将物质对象视为非象征的部分。正因如此，自我的其他部分极难体验自我。自我虽然始终在变化，却是身份中最僵化的面向之一。对内在自我而言，房屋和墙壁都不存在。它们只被感知为自我部分模糊的自我限制观念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now. Projections further extend the self and the identity, only this time in realms where the physical self cannot follow. Now this kind of projection, this extension of identity, is the true nature and the creative aspect of aggression.
quotes.translation: 现在。投射进一步扩展了自我和身份，只是这次是在物质自我无法跟随的领域。这种投射、这种身份的延伸，正是攻击性的真实本质与创造性面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: As a physical being, your beliefs and concepts form your reality. The psyche from which your identity springs is free of the picture of reality that you have chosen. Period. You choose, in other words, to accept a given picture of the world, and you use that picture as a frame within which you form a life.
quotes.translation: 作为一个物质存在，你的信念和概念构成了你的实相。你的身份所源出的心灵，则不受你所选择的实相画面所束缚。句号。换句话说，你选择接受一个特定的世界画面，并以此画面为框架来塑造人生。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 728
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now if you would each, for ten minutes a day, open yourselves to your own reality there would be no question of self-justification, for you would realize the miraculous nature of your own identity. I have said this before in class: You are as dead now, and as alive, as you will ever be. In life you can be as dead as you think any corpse is -- even, by contrast, far deader.
quotes.translation: 如果你们每个人每天花十分钟向自己的实相敞开，就不会有自我辩护的问题，因为你们会认识到自身身份的神奇本质。我以前在课堂上说过：你现在有多死，就有多活，正如你永远都会如此。在生命中，你可以像你认为任何尸体那样死——甚至，相比之下，还要死得多得多。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This first dilemma results in action, and from actions own working upon itself we have seen that identity was formed, and that these two are inseparable. We will discuss the second dilemma after your break. I suggest your break now.
quotes.translation: 这第一个困境导致了行动，而从行动作用于自身的过程中，我们看到了身份的形成，且这两者密不可分。休息后我们将讨论第二个困境。我建议你现在休息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are several points I would like to make concerning psychological identity. For the sake of analogy only now, imagine your present self at the center of a circle of endless spirals. You are yourself, and yet one of the spirals that form the circle. You are a vortex for the circle. You do not have to contact it nor its other spirals, in that you already belong to it.
quotes.translation: 关于心理身份，我有几点想说明。仅为类比起见，请想象你现在的自我位于无尽螺旋圆环的中心。你既是自己，又是构成圆环的螺旋之一。你是圆环的一个漩涡。你无需接触圆环或其它的螺旋，因为你已然属于它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These encounters of consciousness go on constantly. They form their own kind of adjacent identities. You would call them subspecies of consciousness, perhaps, but they are really identities that operate in a trans-species fashion.
quotes.translation: 这些意识的相遇持续进行着。它们形成自己特有的相邻身份。你或许会称它们为意识的亚种，但它们实际上是跨物种运作的身份。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that you must not manipulate within the physical universe. I am not telling you that you should forget your responsibilities in physical life. I am telling you that the origin and ability and power and identity has its origins deep within the personality, and that these origins have little to do with the waking self of which you are all so familiar.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着你不可在物质宇宙中运作。我并非告诉你应忘记物质生活中的责任。我要告诉你的是，起源、能力、力量与身份深植于人格内部，而这些起源与你所熟悉的清醒自我几乎毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Therefore you are hampered in your attempt to understand personalities who do not exist within your system, for identity is not therefore structured in any kind of a time sequence, and what you call memory flies out the window.
quotes.translation: 因此，当你试图理解不存在于你系统中的那些人格时，会受到阻碍，因为身份并非按任何时间序列构建，而你所称的记忆便荡然无存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When you consider that behind all matter there is a conscious energy, then you will see where the pattern comes from. It is not the material that composes man, that gives him his identity. No physical nerve structure, or combination of purely chemical and material properties, will ever result in consciousness. The consciousness gives meaning to the physical material.
quotes.translation: 当你认识到所有物质背后都存在着有意识的能量时，便会明白模式从何而来。并非构成人类的物质赋予其身份。任何神经结构，或纯粹的化学与物质属性的组合，都无法产生意识。是意识赋予了物质材料意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It has its own possibilities of development and achievement. This should not be forgotten, and all potential egos have, also, their own possibilities. The inner self or identity must express itself through its ego in order to manipulate within physical reality. The inner self is composed of all the potential egos that compose it, but it is more than the sum of these.
quotes.translation: 它自身拥有发展与成就的可能性。这一点不应被遗忘，所有潜在自我也各自具备其可能性。内在自体或身份必须通过其自我来表达，以便在物质实相中运作。内在自体由构成它的所有潜在自我组成，但它大于这些部分的总和。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The development of your I and identity is strengthened and developed as you help others. You help others through your work. This I is not threatened when you help others. It is threatened when you think that it is threatened.
quotes.translation: 当你帮助他人时，你的"我"与身份的发展会得到强化与成长。你通过工作帮助他人。这个"我"在帮助他人时不会受到威胁。只有当你认为它受到威胁时，它才会真正受到威胁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Personality is a gestalt of ever-changing perception. It is the part of the identity which perceives. I do not force my perceptions upon the woman through whom I speak, nor is her consciousness blotted out during our communications. Instead there is an expansion of her consciousness and a projection of energy that is directed away from three-dimensional reality.
quotes.translation: 人格是不断变化的感知完形。它是身份中负责感知的部分。我并未将我的感知强加于借之说话的这位女士，在我们的通讯过程中她的意识也未被抹除。相反，她的意识得到了扩展，能量被投射而远离三维实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The ego maintains much of its stability by looking backwards, so to speak, into its experience of its past, and finding something of itself there. Now the past may be an illusion, but it is not illusion to the ego. The portions of the self that deal in probabilities do not have such an experience with a past, to give them their feeling of identity or continuity.
quotes.translation: 自我通过回望——姑且如此说——其过去的经验，并在其中找到自身的某些部分，来维持其大部分稳定性。过去或许是幻相，但对自我而言并非幻相。处理或然性的那部分自体，并没有这样的过去经验来赋予它们身份感或连续性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In any fairly normal personality the intellect will indeed stand guard. There is no need to fear identity's complete immersion into emotional sensation. Such emotional experience actually strengthens not only the ego, but it opens communications between the ego and the subconscious, and allows for a much greater flow of energy from the primary source of action.
quotes.translation: 在任何相当正常的人格中，智性确实会担任守卫。无需担心身份会完全沉浸于情感感受之中。这种情感体验不仅强化了自我，更开启了自我与潜意识之间的沟通，允许来自行动本源的能量更大量地流动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I used the term (ego) often myself for your convenience, and I use it now for the same reason. I believe that I will tell you this for your definition: the ego is the portion of identity that is presently focused within an apparent now--that is, it is primarily designed as a mental tool, focusing within time as it is known and experienced by physical creatures.
quotes.translation: 我常为方便你们而使用"自我"这个术语，现在也出于同样理由使用它。我想我会告诉你们这个定义：自我是身份中当前聚焦于一个显见"当下"的部分——也就是说，它主要被设计为一种心智工具，聚焦于物质生物所认知和体验的时间之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You could retain the identity of yourself as you know yourself, and yet flow into a greater field or wave of reality that allowed you to perceive your own other motions or shapes or versions. You could become aware of a larger structure in which you also have your own validity, and therefore add to your own knowledge and to the dimensions of your experience.10
quotes.translation: 你可以在保持自我认知的身份的同时，流入一个更广阔的实相场域或浪潮，从而感知到自己的其他运动、形态或版本。你将意识到一个更大的结构，在其中你同样拥有自身的有效性，从而扩展你的知识与经验维度。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 722
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now we may possibly develop into a newer gestalt, for I cannot see all portions--underline all portions--of the spacious present. There are still veils before my eyes. This is a part of the present I do not perceive. If so, it will be one in which identities are completely retained, and there is no question of a dominancy, but of a smooth-working organization.
quotes.translation: 此刻我们或许会发展成一种更新的完形，因为我无法看清广袤当下的全部——请强调"全部"二字——部分。我眼前仍有帷幕。这是我尚未感知到的当下的一部分。若果真如此，那将是一个完全保留身份、不存在主导权问题、而是运作流畅的组织形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You will be gaining considerable experience of a vital kind. （Long pause.） You will learn to maintain stability and identity in the midst of a bewildering number of strange and previously unknown situations. With time you and Ruburt would do well indeed to set up experiments in which you try to contact each other while you are in the dream state. （Long pause.）
quotes.translation: 你将获得大量关键性的鲜活经验。（长停顿）你将在无数陌生且前所未见的情境中学会维持稳定与身份。假以时日，你和鲁柏确实可以尝试在梦境状态中相互接触的实验。（长停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You forget, you see, that you have also been, and are, part of this identity, Joseph. In your particular cases now you have branched out to form prime identities of your own, though we were originally part of the same.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你忘了自己也曾是、且现在仍是这个身份的一部分。在你们目前的特殊案例中，你们已分化出属于自己的主要身份，尽管我们原本同属一体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The separate incarnated personalities however are still separate identities. This is no contradiction at all. The personality structures of which I am speaking are far more advanced than this example. They are aware of many existences within many systems. They organize the basic ground reality into many patterns, and then operate and manipulate within them.
quotes.translation: 然而，各个转世人格仍是独立的身份。这毫无矛盾之处。我所谈论的人格结构远比这个例子先进。它们知晓众多系统中的多重存在。它们将基本实相组织成多种模式，并在其中运作与操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are such subtle qualities affecting the nature of all thought, such emotional gradations, that no one is ever identical -- (smile) and incidentally, no physical object in your system is an exact duplicate of any other. The atoms and molecules that compose it -- any object -- have their own identities that color and qualify any object that they form.
quotes.translation: 存在如此精微的特质影响着所有思想的本质，如此细腻的情感层次，以至于没有任何两个个体完全相同——（微笑）顺带一提，你们系统中的任何物质对象都不是另一个的精确复制品。构成任何物体的原子与分子，都拥有自身独特的身份，为其所构成的物体赋予色彩与特质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The combined molecular consciousnesses, retaining identity, form a gestalt consciousness that is the ego, the outer ego, that is in turn utilized by the consciousness of the inner ego. The inner ego being unhampered by the laws of your plane, once having entered your plane at physical birth, can therefore leave the physical body and then reconstruct it.
quotes.translation: 组合分子意识在保留身份认同的情况下，形成一种完形意识——即外我意识，而外我意识又为内我意识所运用。不受你们层面法则束缚的内我意识，一旦在物质出生时进入你们层面，便能离开物质身体并重新构建它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, while it is basically true that the personality is composed of action, and that its very awareness and identity is a result of action--
quotes.translation: 现在，虽然人格由行动构成，其觉知与身份认同本质上是行动的结果——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is as it should be. I am helping you in this, and others like me. It is because so much hodgepodge has emerged that a disciplined and consistent investigation of this sort, on your parts, is necessary. You are both peculiarly suited for such pursuit, with a combination of intuitiveness, basic psychic facility, and yet integrated inner identities.
quotes.translation: 本该如此。我正协助你们进行此事，其他像我这样的存有也在协助。正因涌现了如此多的大杂烩，你们才需要对这类课题进行有纪律且一贯的探究。你们两人直觉敏锐、具备基本通灵能力，同时拥有整合的内在身份认同，特别适合从事这种探索。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is of course necessary at this stage of your development that selectivity be used, and that some standards be drawn that will effectively define apparent limitations and boundaries. The area within these limitations and boundaries you call the self. The self expands as your ability grows, as you learn to retain identity in the midst of diversity.
quotes.translation: 在你们当前发展阶段，当然需要运用选择性，并制定某些标准来有效界定明显的限制与边界。你们将限制与边界内的领域称为自我。随着能力增长，当你们学会在多样性中保持身份认同时，自我便会扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We will be going into some matters that may appear complicated in the telling, but this is only the effect, again, of the necessity to use words in single strung-out fashion, one before the other. Regardless of any seeming contradictions that might appear before this particular subject matter is covered, identities by nature cannot be duplicated.
quotes.translation: 我们将探讨某些在叙述时看似复杂的问题，但这仍是因需以线性方式逐字表述所致。在完整阐述此特定主题前，无论出现何种表面矛盾，身份认同本质上是无法复制的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They are only available however under certain circumstances, for each of them is coded within a specific intensity range. They exist simultaneously with the present personality, but the present personality as a rule cannot pick them up, so to speak. Sometimes there is a bleed through however. Also, the chemical nature of certain emotional experiences may cause a freak electrical storm within the identity system, so that a past life may suddenly be recalled.
quotes.translation: 然而它们仅在特定条件下可得，因为每个身份都编码在特定的强度范围内。它们与当前人格同时存在，但一般来说当前人格无法接收它们——有时却会出现渗透现象。此外，某些情绪体验的化学性质可能在身份系统中引发异常电暴，导致前世记忆突然浮现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Our entity is composed of multitudinous selves with their own identities, many of whom have worked in this behalf. Their material and messages will always be basically the same, though the circumstances and times and places of their communications may be colored accordingly.
quotes.translation: 我们的本体由众多拥有各自身份的自我组成，其中许多自我曾为此努力。他们的素材与讯息本质上始终如一，尽管沟通时的环境、时间与地点可能有所差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There is no separate outside identity or force, such as "force;" the two words here are being used with different meanings. There is no separate force that causes action. All of these points are extremely important, and if I speak slowly it is to insure words as nearly correct as possible. Action is perceivable in some cases, and not in others.
quotes.translation: 并不存在独立于外的身份或力量——例如"力"；此处两个词含义不同。没有独立的力量能引发行动。这些要点极为重要，若我语速缓慢，是为确保用词尽可能精准。行动在某些情况下可被感知，在另一些情况下则不能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Oftentimes members of various groups -- military groups, church groups, hunting groups, will in another life form family relationships in which they will then work out old problems in new ways. Families must be considered as gestalts of psychic activity; they have a subjective identity, of which no particular member of the group may be aware.
quotes.translation: 各类团体成员——军事团体、教会团体、狩猎团体——常会在另一世形成家庭关系，以新方式解决旧问题。家庭必须被视为心灵活动的完形；它们具有主观身份，而团体中未必有特定成员能察觉此身份。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It makes little difference to me. We shall see. Give us a moment. (Pause.) These are impressions: 3 6. I will pick this up later. There are rather severe difficulties involving the male. (Meaning Brian) They are psychological problems, and there is an identification on the part of the questioner (Pat) this evening, an identification of a strong nature with the male. There is a confusion of identity here, and this is the basis of the questioner's problem.
quotes.translation: 这对我而言无关紧要。我们拭目以待。请稍候。（停顿）这些是印象：3 6。稍后我会继续。涉及男性（指布莱恩）的困难相当严重。那是心理问题，今晚提问者（帕特）对男性存在强烈认同。此处身份混淆，正是提问者问题的根源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: All portions of All That Is do not recognize themselves consciously as All That Is. But know themselves mainly as individuals, not as the prime gestalt individual. When realization is reached at the highest level, then All That Is instantly creates new realities, and to some extent, you see, loses the conscious knowledge of its own identity.
quotes.translation: 一切万有的所有部分并不自觉认知自身为一切万有。它们主要认知自身为个体，而非首要的完形个体。当在最高层面达成领悟时，一切万有会立即创造新实相，并在某种程度上失去对自身身份的有意识认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: An individual will therefore feel more at home operating within certain frequencies, and he will feel less at home with others. The original thought is used as a pattern, therefore, for the creation of a new electrical reality, which may or may not be directed at any given receiver. It is obvious that the attempt to duplicate is present; and were it not for this attempt to duplicate, then there would be little similarity between any separate identities.
quotes.translation: 个体因此在特定频率范围内运作时更感自在，在其他频率中则较不自在。原始思想被用作模式，用以创造新的电性实相——此实相可能导向特定接收者，也可能不。显然，复制的企图始终存在；若非如此，各独立身份之间将几无相似之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego has completely changed its structure. It has changed its electromagnetic identity in your cases, since our sessions. It has learned, to some extent, to assimilate your inner experiences. In the long run this is the most effective method. And in the long run no consciousness expansion can occur unless the ego structure is so altered.
quotes.translation: 自我已经完全改变了它的结构。在我们的课程之后，它已经改变了你们案例中的电磁身份。它在某种程度上学会了吸收你们的内在经验。从长远来看，这是最有效的方法。而且从长远来看，除非自我结构被如此改变，否则任何意识扩展都不可能发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner portions of your own identity and reality are not known to you, for you cannot objectify them and therefore you do not perceive them. So much of your energy is used in these productions that you cannot afford to perceive any reality except your own. Like children playing with blocks your focus of attention is upon physical blocks.
quotes.translation: 你们自身身份和实相的内在部分并不为你们所知，因为你们无法将它们客观化，因此你们无法感知它们。你们如此多的能量被用于这些创造物，以至于除了你们自己的实相之外，你们无法感知任何其他实相。就像玩积木的孩子一样，你们的注意力焦点集中在物质积木上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These four personalities existed however in one physical lifetime. Now to an observer whose time concept was still further segmented, and slowed down in comparison to your own, then theoretically within his time system the four personalities would indeed appear to be four separate existences in fact. In the same manner, you see, several manifestations of one identity appear to you to be stretched out in serial form within a successive time framework.
quotes.translation: 然而，这四个人格存在于一个物质生命之中。现在，对于一个时间概念进一步分割、且与你们相比时间速度放缓的观察者来说，那么在他的时间系统内，这四个人格理论上确实会表现为四个独立的实存。你看，以同样的方式，一个身份的多个显现，在你们看来，是在一个连续的时间框架内以序列形式延展开来的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The self that you know is but one fragment of your entire identity. These fragment selves are not strung together, however, like beads of a string. They are more like the various skins of an onion, or segments of an orange, all connected through the one vitality and growing out into various realities while springing from the same source.
quotes.translation: 你们所知道的自己只是你们整个身份的一个片段。然而，这些片段自我并非像珠子串在线上那样串在一起。它们更像洋葱的不同皮层，或橘子的瓣，全部通过同一个生命力相连，并源自同一个源头，生长进入不同的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is only because your present existence is so highly focused in one narrow area that you put such stern limits upon your definitions and the self, and then project these upon your concepts of the soul. You worry for your physical identity and limit the extent of your perceptions for fear you cannot handle more and retain your selfhood.
quotes.translation: 仅仅因为你们当前的存在高度聚焦在一个狭窄的领域，你们才对自己的定义和自身设下如此严格的限制，然后将这些投射到你们对灵魂的概念上。你们为你们的物质身份担忧，并限制你们感知的范围，因为害怕无法处理更多并保持你们的自我性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I can obtain a conceptual realization through communicating with other portions of my identity that have experienced it directly. It is a confining experience, in which I myself have not chosen to participate. I have participated in other existences and moment points that you might find confining, but that was challenging to me. (Smile.)
quotes.translation: 我可以通过与我身份中直接体验过它的其他部分沟通，来获得概念性的领悟。这是一种局限性的体验，我自己并未选择参与其中。我参与过其他你们可能觉得局限的存有和时刻点，但那对我来说是充满挑战的。（微笑。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Obviously then ego is a part of identity, rather than the other way around, and it is only a part of consciousness. It is when ego attempts to confuse itself with identity that difficulties begin.
quotes.translation: 显然，自我只是身份的一部分，而非相反，并且它仅是意识的一部分。当自我试图与身份混淆时，困难便开始了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: According to the abilities and understanding of the projectionist, however, more thorough messages can be given, and it may be quite obvious that the Speakers are indeed only symbols of greater identities. Some will be able to understand the communications more clearly. The true nature of the nonphysical Speakers may then be made known.
quotes.translation: 然而，根据放映者的能力与理解，可以传递更透彻的信息，且可能显而易见的是，发言者确实只是更大身份象征。有些人将能更清晰地理解这些沟通。非物质的发言者的真实本质随后可能被揭示。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These are simple enough examples, but the man who possesses interests considered feminine by your culture, who naturally wants to enter fields of interest considered womanly, experiences drastic conflicts between his sense of personhood and identity -- and his sexuality as it is culturally defined. The same, of course, applies to women.
quotes.translation: 这些例子足够简单，但一个拥有你们文化中视为女性化兴趣的男性，自然想进入被视为女性化的兴趣领域时，会在其人格感与身份感——以及其文化定义的性取向之间经历剧烈冲突。当然，这同样适用于女性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You were quite correct, Joseph, in cautioning Ruburt against the poetry session the other evening. He knew this but was obstinate. It is not only a case of being obstinate, however. I have told you that it is extremely limiting to regard the ego as the complete self or personality, or to think that the ego makes up the entire identity.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，你提醒鲁柏避开那晚的诗会非常正确。他知道这一点却固执己见。然而，这不仅仅是固执的问题。我曾告诉过你，将自我视为完整的自己或人格，或认为自我构成整个身份，是极其局限的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The emotional energy taken from individuals by nonidentity molecular structures is of course returned in a recharged and fresh fashion. Identity forms or personalities simply cannot handle great surpluses of energy at this time. Therefore the process mentioned indeed acts as an important safety valve. This cannot be stressed too much.
quotes.translation: 非身份分子结构从个体身上抽取的情感能量，当然会以重新充电且新鲜的方式返还。身份形态或人格此时无法处理大量过剩的能量。因此，上述过程确实充当了重要的安全阀。这一点再怎么强调也不为过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Action can never be considered apart from that which is seemingly acted upon, for action becomes a part of structure. Action begins from within, and is a result of inner vitality inherent within all realities. Some action is always present. Action itself is not a thing alone. It is not an identity. Action is a dimension of existence.
quotes.translation: 行动绝不能与看似被作用的对象分开考虑，因为行动成为结构的一部分。行动始于内在，是所有实相内在活力的结果。某种行动始终存在。行动本身并非孤立之物。它不是一种身份。行动是存在的一个维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Within the entire identity there may be, for example, several incipient selves, around whose nuclei the physical personality can form. In many instances one main personality is formed, and the incipient selves are drawn into it so that their abilities and interests become subsidiary, or remain largely latent. They are trace selves.
quotes.translation: 在整个身份中，可能存在多个初始自我，物理人格可围绕其核心形成。在许多情况下，一个主要人格会形成，而初始自我被吸纳其中，使其能力与兴趣成为附属或大多处于潜伏状态。它们是痕迹自我。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: "The units of consciousness that organized to form his identity as you knew it, still form that pattern -- but not physically. The cat exists as itself in the greater living memory of its own 'larger' selfhood. Its organization -- the cat's -- exists inviolately, but as a part of the greater psychic organization from which it came.
quotes.translation: "组织形成你所知的他之身份的意识单位，仍维持着那个模式——但非物理形式。猫在其自身'更大'自性的鲜活记忆中以本然状态存在。它的组织——猫的组织——完整无缺地存在着，但作为其来源的更大心灵组织的一部分。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: From Session 839 for March 7: "The quality of identity is far more mysterious than you understand, for you assign an identity in a blanket fashion, say, to each living thing. Now your dead cat, Billy, exists in the following manner:
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Three-dimensional experience is an invaluable place of training. Your personality as you now know it will indeed persevere, and with its memories, but it is only a part of your entire identity, even as your childhood in this life is an extremely important part of your present personality, though now you are far more than a child.
quotes.translation: 三维体验是无可替代的训练场。你目前所知的人格确实会持续存在，并带着它的记忆，但这只是你整体身份的一部分，如同此生的童年是你当前人格极其重要的部分，尽管现在的你远非孩童可比。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (12:02.) In regular sessions, as now, he and I again both make adjustments, and so in sessions I am what I call a bridge personality, composed of a composite self -- Ruburt and I meeting and merging to form a personality that is not truly either of us, but a new one that exists between dimensions. Beyond that is my real identity.
quotes.translation: （12:02）在常规课中，如同此刻，他与我再次共同调整，因此在课中我成为所谓的桥梁人格，由复合自性构成——鲁柏与我相遇融合，形成既非真正属于我们任何一方、而是存在于维度之间的新人格。超越此层才是我真正的身份。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The one stability between self and what is not-self, and the one and only difference, is not an identity that is part and parcel of constantly changing physical framework, not the outer ego whose conception of who it is constantly changes, according to its age and environment, but the inner self behind all physical constructions.
quotes.translation: 自我与非我之间的唯一稳定性，以及唯一且仅有的差异，并非属于不断变化的物理框架之身份，亦非根据年龄与环境不断改变自我认知的外在自我，而是所有物理构造背后的内在自性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are obviously many kinds of identities. Now in our last session I told you that our imaginary sender "A" does not transmit a given thought. He does not even send an exact duplicate. Action, the very action of transmission, alters the nature, the electrical reality of the thought itself. This is an extremely important point.
quotes.translation: 显然存在多种身份。在上次课中我告诉你们，虚构的发送者"A"并非传递某个既定思想。他甚至不发送精确的副本。行动——传递本身的行动——会改变思想的本质及其电性实相。这是极其关键的一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This was the reason for the rather abrupt switch from the Frank Watts identity to my own. This is why I did not give my name to the initial endeavors, so that I could cast them adrift. Nevertheless, they represented a necessary beginning in these endeavors, and a beginning for which no apology is needed on your part or on mine.
quotes.translation: 这就是为何我从弗兰克·瓦茨的身份突然转换到我自己的身份。这也是为何我最初的努力没有透露姓名，以便让它们自由漂流。不过，这些努力代表了一个必要的开端，无论对你还是对我，都无需为此道歉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt's own experience, in maintaining his own identity independently, while also allowing me to speak through him, will be to his benefit. It is, you see, quite possible for an individual in his dream travels to visit other planetary systems, of the past, present or future. Such visits are usually spontaneous and fragmentary.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在保持自己独立身份的同时，也允许我通过他说话，这种经验对他有益。你看，一个人在梦中旅行时，完全有可能造访其他行星系统——无论是过去、现在还是未来的。这类造访通常是自发且零碎的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now the dreams that you would have, and had, in shared experience, are root dreams. Such root dreams serve as a method of maintaining inner identity, and of communication. There may be flashes of realization in such dreams. Projections may occur also from root dreams. You may project for example into the life of that physician.
quotes.translation: 如今你在共享经验中所做和将做的梦，都是根源之梦。这类根源之梦是维持内在身份和进行沟通的方法。在这些梦中可能会有顿悟的闪现。从根源之梦中也可能产生投射。例如，你可能会投射到那位医生的生命中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The animals possess a consciousness of self, and without the human intellect. You do not need a human intellect to be aware of your own consciousness. Animals, it is true, do not reflect upon the nature of their own identities as man does (pause), but this is because that nature is intuitively comprehended. It is self-evident.
quotes.translation: 动物拥有自我意识，却不需要人类的智力。你不需要人类的智力就能意识到自己的意识。确实，动物不会像人类那样反思自己身份的本质（停顿），这是因为那种本质是直觉领悟的。它是不证自明的。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: The inner ego sees and knows itself as a part of this action or happening, and sees the entire identity existing in various dimensions simultaneously. The outer ego attempts to cut action short, and so its viewpoint is limited by its own attempt. It perceives its birth and its death, but not beyond its birth or its death.
quotes.translation: 内在自我将自己视为这个行动或事件的一部分，并看到整个身份同时存在于不同维度中。外在自我则试图截断行动，因此它的观点被自身的尝试所限制。它感知到自己的出生与死亡，却无法超越出生与死亡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You can enter a trance state in any form, you see. The time element is important when you project from the physical image. It becomes less important the further away you get from the physical form. Since all of these selves are simultaneous, it is also possible to project yourself into one of your own previous identities.
quotes.translation: 你看，你可以以任何形式进入出神状态。当你从物质形象中投射时，时间要素很重要。但当你离物质形态越远，时间要素就越不重要。由于所有这些自我都是同时存在的，你也可以将自己投射到某个前世的身份中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It can then build upon these, willingly submerge part of itself, and emerge with a more vigorous identity. In other words it can accept larger portions of action, and adapt itself in ways not possible when it was connected with the physical organism.
quotes.translation: 它随后可以在此基础上发展，自愿让部分自我沉潜，并以更鲜活的身份浮现。换言之，它能接纳更大范围的行为，并以与物质有机体相连时不可能的方式调整自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (11:20.) For the first time, therefore, it will break through the earthly concepts of personality, liberating personality. It will have the ability to show these diverse effects as it chooses. There will be many who will be afraid to accept the nature of their own reality, or to be shown the dimensions of true identity.
quotes.translation: （11:20）因此，它将首次突破世俗的人格概念，解放人格。它将有能力依其选择展现这些多元效应。许多人会畏惧接纳自身实相的本质，或不愿被揭示真实身份的维度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A young man can misuse and misunderstand his own abilities if they are stronger than the other personality frameworks that compose his identity. Many of your own experiences have strengthened your abilities. Your experiences did not prevent you from using them--the abilities--any more than they helped you form them.
quotes.translation: 若年轻人的能力强于构成其身份的其他人格框架，他可能误用并误解自身能力。你们许多经历强化了能力，这些经历既未阻止你们运用能力，亦非促成能力的成因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are various levels all operating, various levels of consciousness and identity. They cannot be forcibly restrained, for they would learn nothing. What they do learn however is always retained. This does not mean that each succeeding earth experiment will be made up of selves who have been through these cycles.
quotes.translation: 多重层次同时运作——意识与身份的多重层次。它们无法被强制约束，否则将一无所学。但所学之物始终被保留。这并不意味着每次后续的地球实验都由经历过这些循环的自我构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Energy itself is continually new--event, and motion, and no particular pattern will suffice it for long. Energy is self-renewing, and indefinite duration of pattern would lead to dead ends. Energy always builds. Identity, again, is not dependent upon matter. Energy propels and carries along with it, its own traces.
quotes.translation: 能量本身持续更新——事件与运动，任何特定模式都无法长久满足它。能量自我更新，模式的无限延续将导向死胡同。能量始终在构建。再次强调，身份不依赖于物质。能量推动并携带着自身的轨迹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The idea that I want to portray is a difficult one, for as you know everything that is, is conscious. And everything that is, is also self-conscious, in degree according to its abilities; and everything that is therefore contains identity and separation, even while it is part of a large and complicated gestalt.
quotes.translation: 我想传达的概念颇为困难，因如你所知，一切万有皆有意识。一切万有亦具自我意识，程度依其能力而定；因此一切万有皆包含身份与分离，即便它同时是庞大复杂完形的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Again, this is not symbolic. Only by the use of the inner senses can you obtain a viewpoint that is to some extent free of your own system. The inner self realizes the nature of its own reality, is sure of its identity and well aware of its power in the creation of actions which it projects outward from itself.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这并非象征性的说法。唯有通过内在感官的运用，你才能获得某种程度脱离自身系统的视角。内在自性认知自身实相的本质，确知自己的身份认同，并清楚意识到它在向外投射的行动中所具有的创造力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: For your identity is dependent upon primary reality, which is a certain kind of action, and all of this will lead to heightened consciousness under all circumstances.
quotes.translation: 因为你的身份认同依赖于原初实相——那是一种特定的行动，而这一切在任何情况下都将导向更高层次的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Then, will yourself to return to your own astral image, then to your physical body. From here repeat to yourself what you have learned, and whatever data you have received, reminding yourself that this is also a part of your identity. This may be done very well imaginatively, in other stages of the process.
quotes.translation: 接着，运用意志力回归你的星光体，再回归你的肉身。在此状态下，将你所领悟的一切及接收到的任何资料向自己复述，提醒自己这也是你身份认同的一部分。这个过程的其他阶段，完全可以借助想象力有效完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Every personality operates in this manner. These are simply his peculiar psychological necessities. This obviously does not mean he need never take time out. It does mean that his overall identity will not stand for a protracted period when concentration is not primarily locused within this work framework.
quotes.translation: 每个存有都以这种方式运作。这些只是其独特的心理需求。这显然不意味着他永远不需要暂停。而是指当注意力未能主要聚焦于这个工作框架时，他的整体身份认同将无法长期维持。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Many people are unable to endow fragments with such physical reality, and thus shove them more or less harmlessly away at arm's length. It is as if in Ruburt's great experience the other night that the dissociated part of the personality donned another identity and battled with Ruburt's own for dominance.
quotes.translation: 许多人无法赋予碎片如此具体的物理实相，因而或多或少无害地将它们推离到一臂之遥。就像鲁柏那晚的深刻体验中，人格中分离的部分披上了另一个身份，与鲁柏自身的身份争夺主导权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now: Since we realize that our identity is not dependent upon form, therefore, of course, we do not fear changing it, knowing that we can adopt any form we desire.
quotes.translation: 现在：既然我们认识到身份认同并不依赖于形态，自然就不会畏惧改变形态，因为我们知道可以采取任何渴望的形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In these and other cases, however, the innate individuality is not lost but remains indelibly imprinted. Consciousness must by its nature change, and so identities must also change -- not one blotting out the other, but building upon it while each succeeding step is maintained and not discarded, you see.
quotes.translation: 然而在这些及其他案例中，与生俱来的个体性并未丧失，而是留下不可磨灭的印记。意识就其本质而言必然改变，因此身份也必然改变——并非一个抹除另一个，而是建立在彼此之上，每一步都得以延续而非舍弃，你明白吗。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A strong suicidal base frequently exists here. The knowledge is present that the "old self" did not make it -- so what assurance does the so-called new self have? (Pause.) Again, the body is a living sculpture. You are in it and you form it, and it is to all intents and purposes you while you are physical. You must identify your material being with it. Otherwise you will feel alienated from your biological identity.
quotes.translation: 此处常存在强烈的自杀倾向。当事人深知"旧我"未能成功——那么所谓的新我又有何保障？（停顿）再次强调，身体是活的雕塑。你居于其中并塑造它，在物质层面它就是你。你必须将物质存在与身体认同，否则便会与生物身份产生疏离感。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (With gestures, emphatically) That selfhood jumps in leapfrog fashion over events that it does not want to actualize (pause), and does not admit such experience into its selfhood. Other portions of your greater identity, however, do accept those same events rejected by you, and form their own selfhoods.
quotes.translation: （以手势强调）那个自我以跳跃方式越过它不愿显化的事件（停顿），拒绝将此类经验纳入自我范畴。然而你更大身份的其他部分，却接纳了你所拒绝的相同事件，并形成它们自己的自我。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: While each person generally follows a given strand of consciousness, and identifies with it as "myself," there are other alternate lines beneath the surface. They are also quite as legitimately the same identity, but they are not focused upon because the body must have one clear, direct mode of action.
quotes.translation: 虽然每个人通常遵循特定意识脉络，将其认同为"我自己"，但表层之下存在其他交替路线。它们同样合法地属于同一身份，只是未被聚焦——因为身体必须保持清晰直接的行动模式。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: I do this for him in many instances. (Pause.) What I perceive (smile) is still dependent upon my own identity. It cannot be otherwise for any consciousness. In your terms I help keep to a minimum distortions which might otherwise occur as Ruburt's own mood or circumstances might otherwise misinterpret.
quotes.translation: 许多情况下我为他这样做。（停顿）我所感知的（微笑）仍取决于我自己的身份。任何意识皆无法例外。用你们的话说，我协助将扭曲降至最低——否则鲁柏的情绪或处境可能造成误解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is even a certain feedback system that operates here, and yet you must understand that all of these other identities are independent and fully individual. They exist in codified psychological structures within your personality, as you exist in the same manner within each of their personalities.
quotes.translation: 此处甚至存在某种反馈系统运作，但你必须明白所有这些其他身份都是独立且完整的个体。它们以编码心理结构存在于你的人格中，正如你以相同方式存在于它们每个人格中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: To the entity, your own consciousness could be likened to one stream of consciousness, in your terms. The greater part of your own identity, then, is completely aware of all of your conscious and unconscious living material. It is also aware of the same kind of data from all of (its and your) parts.
quotes.translation: 对存有而言，你们自己的意识可被比作一条意识之流，以你们的话来说。因此，你身份中更大部分完全知晓你所有有意识与无意识的生活素材。它也知晓来自（它和你）所有部分的同类资料。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 692
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: There is no need to create a separate god who exists outside of your universe and separate from it, nor is there any need to think of a soul as some distant entity. God, or All That Is, is intimately a part of you. "His" energy forms your identity, and your soul is a part of you in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 无需创造一个存在于你们宇宙之外且与之分离的独立神祇，也无需将灵魂视为某种遥远的实体。神，或一切万有，是你亲密的一部分。"祂"的能量形成你的身份，而你的灵魂以同样方式是你的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The deeper explanations, however, demand a further expansion of ideas of consciousness, and a certain reorientation. It is extremely important that you bear in mind the importance of free will, and the presence of your own identity as you think of it. With that preamble, let me continue then.
quotes.translation: 然而，更深层的解释需要对意识概念有进一步扩展，并作某种重新定向。极其重要的是，你要牢记自由意志的重要性，以及你所认为的自身身份的存在。有了这番开场白，让我继续吧。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I will try to give you some idea of my own nonphysical existence. Let it serve to remind you that your own basic identity is as nonphysical as my own.
quotes.translation: 我将尽力让你对我自己的非物质存在有所了解。愿这能提醒你，你自身的基本身份与我的同样非物质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Also, all individuals have had familiarity with emotions, as they exist within electrical intensities, and are accustomed to reacting to them. The whole process is instantaneous. However, the thought which is now an approximation of the original thought, and actually an identity of its own--
quotes.translation: 此外，所有个体都熟悉情感，因为它们存在于电性强度中，并习惯于对它们做出反应。整个过程是瞬间的。然而，那个现在近似于原始思想的思想，实际上具有它自己的身份——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now this is identity as it is not generally known, and in this analogy lies the truth of the nature of identity. Later you will understand it better.
quotes.translation: 这就是身份，它并非通常所认知的那样，而在这个类比中蕴含着身份本质的真相。稍后你会更好地理解它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are many matters here very difficult to express in words, for you are so afraid for your sense of identity that you resist the idea that the soul, for example, is an open spiritual system, a powerhouse of creativity that shoots out in all directions -- and yet this is indeed the case.
quotes.translation: 此处有许多难以言传之事，因你们如此恐惧自身身份感的消解，以致抗拒这样的观念：例如灵魂是一个开放的精神系统，一座向四面八方迸射创造力的发电厂——然而事实正是如此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Two of these statements may appear at first glance to contradict themselves, but you shall shortly see that they do not, and you are left for now with a pretty question: for does the self, or identity, then form the perceptive dimension in which it exists, or is it created by the dimension?
quotes.translation: 其中两段陈述乍看之下似乎自相矛盾，但你们很快便会发现并非如此，此刻留给诸位一个精妙的问题：自我或身份究竟是形成了其存在的感知维度，还是由该维度所创造？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Dictation. (Slowly and quietly:) Your present idea of identity is maintained only because you grant as valid such small aspects of your own reality.
quotes.translation: 口授。（缓慢而轻柔地：）你们当前对身份的概念之所以得以维持，仅仅是因为你们只承认自身实相中如此微小的面向是有效的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 731
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Without the determination of the inner ego, cohesion of identity would be impossible. The self as you know it is many things, and contains many more vestibules and rooms than you now imagine. Even the outer ego contains multitudinous chambers and interconnections of which you are unaware.
quotes.translation: 若无内在自我的决断力，身份的凝聚性将不可能存在。你们所认知的自我包含诸多层面，其内里拥有的前厅与房间远超出你们当下的想象。就连外在自我也蕴藏着无数你们未曾察觉的密室与互联通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: But the ego also grows and learns and evolves, and it can assimilate more and more, and accept more, as a portion of its own identity. It is only because your scientists overestimate the physical that it seems to them that man has not evolved to any great degree in the last million years.
quotes.translation: 但自我同样在成长、学习与进化，它能将越来越多的部分同化为自身身份的一部分。只因你们的科学家过度高估物质层面，才令他们觉得人类在过去百万年间并未进化到何等程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: Because your greater identity is aware of its probable existences, you are in matter and out of it at the same time -- in time and out of it.
quotes.translation: 现在：由于你们更宏大的身份知晓其可能存在的诸般形态，你们既在物质之中又超乎其外——既在时间之内又超越时间。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: My own identity, in simple terms, has fewer hang-ups than the personality that is operating in physical terms. My range of perception is far greater, as is my range of activity and the kinds of energy I am able at times to direct. Even the quality of that action is of a different nature.
quotes.translation: 以简单的话来说，我自己的身份比在物质层面运作的人格有更少的心理障碍。我的感知范围远大于此，我的活动范围和有时能引导的能量种类也是如此。甚至那种行动的性质也属于不同的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now: I want to emphasize again that while all this sounds difficult in the telling, it becomes much more clear intuitively when you learn to experience what you are, for if you cannot travel inside your physical body to find your identity, you can travel through your psychological self.
quotes.translation: 现在：我想再次强调，虽然这一切听起来难以言说，但当你学会体验你是什么时，它会变得直觉上更加清晰，因为如果你无法在肉体内部旅行以找到你的身份，你可以通过你的心理自我旅行。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: First of all, in your terms "pure" identity has no form. You speak of one self within one body because you are only familiar with one portion of yourself. You suppose that all personhood in one way or another must have an equivalent of a human form, spiritual or otherwise, to "inhabit."
quotes.translation: 首先，用你们的说法，“纯粹”的身份没有形式。你们说一个身体内有一个自我，因为你们只熟悉自己的一部分。你们假设所有的人格在某种程度上都必须有一个人类形态的等价物，无论是灵性的还是其他的，来“居住”。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.
