quotes.text: As each separate identity then seeks to know and experience its other portions then All That Is learns who and what it is. Action never ceases its own exploration of itself. All That Is can never know itself completely, since action must always act and each action creates a new unknown.
quotes.translation: 当每个独立的身份寻求了解和体验它的其他部分时，一切万有便了解它自己是谁、是什么。行动从未停止对自身的探索。一切万有永远无法完全了解自己，因为行动必须不断行动，而每个行动都会创造一个新的未知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Practically speaking however there are usually only three. Your own fourth-dimensional personality structure obviously operates constantly. One of the main purposes and goals of the whole self is to become aware of all such existences, and to correlate them into an identity structure.
quotes.translation: 然而，实际上通常只有三个。你自己的第四维人格结构显然在持续运作。整个自我的主要目的和目标之一，就是意识到所有这样的存在，并将它们关联成一个身份结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Some people structure their lives around their children, others around a career, or pleasure, or even pain. Again, these are simply certain focuses that you choose, that direct your experience. You can add other focuses while still retaining your own identity -- indeed, enriching it.
quotes.translation: 有些人以孩子为中心构建生活，有些人以事业、快乐甚至痛苦为中心。再次强调，这些只是你选择的一些焦点，它们引导你的体验。你可以在保留自己身份的同时添加其他焦点——事实上，这会丰富它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 735
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Those that do not presently combine to form a complicated strong identity-pattern （hyphen） nevertheless still maintain the need for value fulfillment. By helping to form into charged emotional patterns, they share in a certain kind of awareness fulfillment otherwise denied to them.
quotes.translation: 那些目前尚未结合形成复杂强烈身份模式的存在，却仍保持着价值实现的需求。通过协助形成带电的情感模式，它们得以分享某种原本被拒于门外的觉知实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You can learn to experience some of these, and the experience of no-time is a particular facet to which I am referring. The experience itself will automatically to some extent allow you to understand the dimensions of your own identity, but old familiar props will not be available.
quotes.translation: 你可以学习体验其中某些部分，而无时间体验正是我所指的特殊面向。这种体验本身会在某种程度上自动让你理解自身身份的维度，但那些熟悉的旧有支撑将不复存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We will further consider this evening the nature of identities. In our earlier discussions concerning the nature of matter, we made it plain that each individual created any given material object, through use of the inner senses, and following certain rules which were mentioned.
quotes.translation: 今晚我们将进一步探讨身份的本质。在先前关于物质本质的讨论中，我们已阐明每个个体都通过运用内在感官，遵循某些提及的规则，创造出任何特定的物质客体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now, the ego, the dominant ego, does indeed affect the inner identity, and changes it even as it affects and changes the dominant ego. For we are dealing here after all with an interdependent gestalt. The interworking's of the whole gestalt have never been completely understood.
quotes.translation: 现在，自我——主导自我——确实影响着内在身份，并在影响和改变主导自我的同时改变着它。毕竟我们在此探讨的是一个相互依存的完形。整个完形的内在运作从未被完全理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your psychological life is dependent upon your ability to perceive and react to such action events. Your reaction, of course, creates new ones. Your identity, your inner self, is a main action event, forming other such events that are the various portions of your personality.
quotes.translation: 你的心理生活取决于你感知和回应此类行动事件的能力。你的回应当然会创造新的事件。你的身份、你的内在自我，是一个主要的行动事件，形成其他构成你人格各个部分的事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: So psychological structures form to which various names are given. The names are meaningless, but the structures behind them are not. Such psychological structures also retain their identity, their pattern of uniqueness, even while they change constantly, die and are reborn.
quotes.translation: 因此形成了被赋予各种名称的心理结构。名称毫无意义，但其背后的结构并非如此。这类心理结构即使在不断变化、死亡与重生之际，仍保有它们的身份与独特模式。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Here knowledge is sifted through self structures. (Pause.) Pure knowledge is not impersonal. To the contrary (smile; pause), it is meaningless unless it is (smile; gesture; pause), experienced intimately within every part of an identity. But to you it would seem impersonal.
quotes.translation: 在此，知识透过自我结构被筛选。（停顿）纯粹知识并非非个人性的。恰恰相反（微笑；停顿），除非它被身份认同的每个部分亲密地体验，否则毫无意义（微笑；手势；停顿）。但对你们而言，它显得非个人性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You will not find yourself by running from teacher to teacher, from book to book. You will not meet yourself through following any particular specialized method of meditation. Only by looking quietly within the self that you know can your own reality be experienced, with those connections that exist between the present or immediate self and the inner identity that is multidimensional.
quotes.translation: 你不会通过从一个老师跑到另一个老师、从一本书跑到另一本书而找到自己。你不会通过遵循任何特定的冥想方法而遇见自己。只有安静地审视你所知的自我，才能体验到你自己的实相，以及当下或直接自我与那多维内在身份之间的那些连结。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It makes no difference to the frog, to the nature of the frog, and it changes no smallest cell within him, if you choose to enclose what you call him, as an idea unit called frog, or whether you consider instead the complete picture. The identities still remain the same.
quotes.translation: 对青蛙而言，对青蛙的本质而言，无论你选择将你所称的它封闭为一个称为青蛙的概念单元，还是考虑完整的画面，都毫无差别，也不会改变它体内的任何一个微小细胞。身份认同依然保持不变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is the prime identity of the whole present personality. In many cases it is the I of your dreams. It is definitely the I of your creative activity. It is the I, you see, which survives physical existence, and the physical, physically-oriented ego is only a part of it.
quotes.translation: 它是整个当前人格的首要身份。在许多情况下，它是你梦境中的"我"。它无疑是你创造性活动中的"我"。你看，它是那个在物质存在之后存续的"我"，而物质性的、以物质为导向的自我只是它的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is made vulnerable to all those forces it was meant to lead, while being stripped of its natural logical abilities -- indeed, of its very sense of identity. (Intently:) There is nothing exterior against which it can work, and no framework in which it can get balance.
quotes.translation: 它变得易受所有它本应引领的力量的影响，同时被剥夺了其自然的逻辑能力——事实上，被剥夺了其身份认同感本身。（专注地：）没有任何外在的东西可以让它与之对抗，也没有任何框架可以让它获得平衡。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your own multidimensional personality is so endowed that it can have these experiences and still retain its identity. It is, of course, affected by the various plays in which it takes part. There is instant communication and an instant, if you prefer, feedback system.
quotes.translation: 你自己的多维人格被如此赋予，以至于它可以拥有这些体验，同时仍然保持其身份认同。当然，它受到它所参与的各种戏剧的影响。存在即时的沟通，以及如果你愿意的话，即时的反馈系统。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: On the other hand you may draw another man to you, and end the marriage that has served its purposes in all ways, finding now the impetus and the reasons for change. Because your imagination transcends time, it is one of your greatest touchstones to your own identity.
quotes.translation: 另一方面，你可能会吸引另一个人到你身边，结束那已在各方面完成其使命的婚姻，此时你找到了改变的动力与理由。因为你的想象力超越时间，它是你认识自身身份最重要的试金石之一。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You organize yourselves out of other matter, you see. The difference is a psychic one, and not a physical one as it appears. The inner identity extends itself over larger and larger groups of energy forms, and acts as an overall psychic pattern. But all is connected.
quotes.translation: 你看，你们是从其他物质中组织出自身的。区别在于心灵层面，而非表面显现的物理层面。内在身份不断扩展自身，覆盖越来越大的能量形式群，并作为一个整体心灵模式运作。但一切皆相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: These make up the basic identity structure of one whole self. Again, this does not mean that the portions are not independent and individual. Also, the divisions are arbitrary to a large degree, for they can indeed be carried further, for example, to the entity.
quotes.translation: 这些构成了一个完整自体的基本身份结构。再次强调，这并不意味着这些部分不具备独立性与个体性。此外，这些划分在很大程度上是任意的，因为它们确实可以进一步延伸，例如延伸到存有层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now: Distorted ideas about sexuality prevent many people from attaining any close connection with the inner experience that continually stirs beneath ordinary consciousness. It is a good idea, then, to look at the psyche and its relationship to sexual identity.
quotes.translation: 现在：关于性别的扭曲观念，阻碍了很多人与持续涌动在普通意识之下的内在体验建立任何紧密联系。因此，审视心灵及其与性别身份的关系是个好主意。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Because the entity has not expressed but withheld the basic femininity of its nature, it has fed back upon itself so that the overall identity of the entity appears as feminine simply because there is a backlog of those characteristics thought of as feminine.
quotes.translation: 由于存有并未表达而是压抑了其本质中的基本阴性特质，它便反作用于自身，以至于存有的整体身份显现为阴性，仅仅是因为那些被视为阴性的特征积压过多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You may know that intense immersion into any particular activity results in a momentary loss, or seeming loss, of ego identity, in that the activity and the personality become one. Ruburt becomes his poem during such occasions, and you become your painting.
quotes.translation: 你或许知道，全神贯注于任何特定活动会导致自我身份的短暂丧失或看似丧失，此时活动与人格合为一体。鲁柏在那些时刻变成了他的诗，而你变成了你的画。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You may not be able to make sense from what appears to be a chaotic jumble of disconnected images and actions. The main reason for your confusion is your inability as an egotistical identity to perceive an order that is not based upon continuity of moments.
quotes.translation: 你或许无法从看似混乱无序、支离破碎的意象与行动中理出头绪。你困惑的主因在于，作为自我本位的身份认同，你无法感知一种不基于瞬间连续性的秩序。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: These psychic entities are real, however. It is quite true to say that their reality consists not only of the core of their own identity, but also is reinforced by those projected thoughts and feelings of the earthly audience for whom the drama is enacted.
quotes.translation: 然而这些心灵实体是真实的。完全可以这样说，它们的实相不仅包含自身身份的核心，更被那些上演这场戏剧的人间观众所投射的思想与感受所强化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Again, this is an important point. The ego has accepted the goals of the inner self. Its identity has already changed, so that its main concern, underline main, is no longer primarily with physical manipulation, but with inner growth and development.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这是关键所在。自我已接纳内在自我的目标。其身份已然转变，以至于其主要关注——请注意"主要"二字——不再首要聚焦于物质操控，而是转向内在成长与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The belief in guilt therefore would be a cementing structure that would hold together other similar core beliefs, and add to their strength. You must understand that these are not simply dead ideas, like debris, within your mind. They are psychic matter. In a sense then they are alive. They group themselves like cells, protecting their own validity and identity.
quotes.translation: 因此对罪恶感的信念会成为固化结构，将其他相似的核心信念凝聚在一起，并增强其力量。你必须明白，这些并非如碎片般悬浮在意识中的死寂观念。它们是心灵物质。从某种意义上说，它们具有生命。它们像细胞般聚合，捍卫自身的有效性与身份认同。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When consciousness leaves the body, it identifies itself with one of these portions, and travels in its form. Each form, embodying certain identity characteristics, has its own environment. Its abilities allow it to operate in particular dimensions.
quotes.translation: 当意识离开身体时，它会与这些部分中的某一区块认同，并以其形态旅行。每种形态都承载着特定的身份特征，拥有自身环境。其能力使其能在特定维度中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: At one level of your being there is a common ground where body consciousness merges with that higher consciousness from which your own identity springs. This is the ground of your being where soul and flesh meet, both in time and out of it.
quotes.translation: 在你存在的某个层面存在共同根基，在此处身体意识与孕育你自身身份的那个更高意识相融合。这是你存在的根基，灵魂与肉身在此相遇，既在时间之内，亦在时间之外。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is a self materialized in physical form. It is conscious of itself as belonging to action. The fact that it may be part of a larger gestalt self in no way belittles its own identity. It is conscious of the gestalts of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 这是一个在物质形态中具体化的自己。它意识到自己属于行动。它可能是更大整体自己的一部分，这一事实绝不贬低其自身身份。它意识到自己所从属的整体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The authors ignore this question. The decision has been made on the part of the basic identity. It is not dependent upon any particular ego structure, but it is dependent upon an ego structure for its existence within a physical universe.
quotes.translation: 作者们忽略了这个问题。决定是由基本身份做出的。它不依赖于任何特定的自我结构，但它在物质宇宙中的存在确实依赖于一个自我结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You can, or you will be able to, travel within your own camouflage universe. There are other intelligent identities in it and they are on your own plane. This is travel along what we may call for simplicity's sake a horizontal level.
quotes.translation: 你可以，或将会能够，在你自己的伪装宇宙中旅行。其中存在其他有智慧的身份，它们与你处于同一层面。为简便起见，我们可以称之为水平层面的旅行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Indeed. Remember, this is your entire identity of which we are speaking. It is only you who are presently aware of but one portion of it; and this portion you insist upon calling yourself. You are the self who makes these decisions.
quotes.translation: 确实如此。记住，我们谈论的是你的整个身份。目前你只意识到它的一部分；而这一部分你坚持称之为自己。你就是做出这些决定的自己。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is much to be considered here. Identity is not dependent upon physical existence.
quotes.translation: 这里有很多需要考虑之处。身份并不依赖于物质存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your identity is simply not dependent upon your psychological or biological sexuality.
quotes.translation: 你的身份根本不依赖于你的心理或生理性别。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Generally speaking, the people living within any given century are related in terms of consciousness and identity. This is true biologically and spiritually, through interrelationships you do not understand.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……一般而言，生活在任何特定世纪的人们在意识与身份方面都是相互关联的。这在生物学与灵性层面皆然，通过你们尚未理解的相互关联性而成立。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 721
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The inner ego is then this inner identity. It is closely allied with the entity, and connects a reality that is purely psychic, the reality of the entity, with a reality that is mainly physical, the reality of the physical self.
quotes.translation: 内在自我即此内在身份。它与存有紧密相连，将纯粹心灵性的实相（存有的实相）与主要物质性的实相（物质自我的实相）联结起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Suffice it to say however that in the future what I am telling you will be more generally known. Men will become familiar to some extent with their own inner identity, with other forms of their own con sciousness. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 但足以说明的是，未来我告诉你们的这些事将更为人所知。人类将在某种程度上熟悉自己的内在身份，以及自身意识的其他形式。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The identity may, and will, move out of its dimension into another, and it therefore has within it the innate capacity to perceive more than it is allowed to perceive at any given point by the limitations set upon it.
quotes.translation: 身份能够且将会脱离其维度进入另一维度，因此它内在具备超越任何特定时刻所受限制的感知能力——那些限制本不允许它感知更多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I am not telling you that individuality does not exist, that it is an illusion, and that therefore I do not perceive it. I am telling you that you do not perceive your own individuality as a whole identity.
quotes.translation: 我并非告诉你们个体性不存在、是个幻象，因此我感知不到它。我是在告诉你们：你们并未将自身的个体性视为一个完整的身份来感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There is communication between these various aspects of inner identity that are obviously cooperative. As a rule I make no attempt to take over the mechanism that Ruburt operates in any general manner.
quotes.translation: 内在身份这些显然相互合作的各个面向之间存在着沟通。一般而言，我无意以任何普遍方式接管鲁柏运作的机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The disorientation is only temporary, and when the form is severed from the physical body, then all the memories and identity within the electromagnetic system become part of the inner self, of course.
quotes.translation: 这种迷失方向感只是暂时的，当形态与肉体分离时，电磁系统内的所有记忆与身份当然都会成为内在自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The psychic structure of consciousness that organizes that bodily gestalt is, however, not dependent upon it, and so the you that you experience is only a portion of this greater identity.
quotes.translation: 然而，组织身体完形的意识心灵结构并不依赖于此，因此你所体验的"你"只是这个更大身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: An identity is by definition and nature, one.
quotes.translation: 身份就其定义与本质而言，是"一"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We will have more to say concerning this point, but for now it is enough to realize that your sense of identity and continuity is not dependent upon the ego.
quotes.translation: 关于这一点我们会有更多阐述，但目前只需认识到：你的身份感与连续性并不依赖自我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Since this is obviously impossible, since no consciousness or identity can exist without action, because they are inseparable, we have our third dilemma.
quotes.translation: 既然这显然不可能——因为没有行动就没有意识或身份存在，因为它们不可分割——我们就面临第三个困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: While identity and consciousness are regarded as the result of primarily physical processes, then the nature of personality will never be understood.
quotes.translation: 只要身份与意识仍被视为主要源于物质过程的结果，人格的本质就永远无法被理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned that any action has an electromagnetic reality, and so thoughts and dreams as well form this identity system.
quotes.translation: 我曾提过，任何行动都具有电磁实相，因此思想与梦境也构成了这个身份系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He does not interpret the thought. He interprets its meaning, and forms a new thought identity.
quotes.translation: 他并非诠释思想本身，而是诠释其意义，并形成一个新的思想身份。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json
